promise_text_en: Divisive forces such as caste and communalism are obstacles to our growth. Therefore, we will continue to act with due importance given to social reform policies and progressive ideas.
promise_text_ta: தமிழர்களைப் பிளவுபடுத்தும் சாதிப் பிரிவினைகள், வகுப்புவாதம் உள்ளிட்ட பேதங்கள் நமது வளர்ச்சிக்கு தடை ஏற்படுத்தும் விலங்குகள். ஆகவே, சமுதாய சீர்திருத்தக் கொள்கைகளுக்கும் முற்போக்கு எண்ணங்களுக்கும் உரிய முக்கியத்துவம் அளித்துத் தொடர்ந்துச் செயல்படுவோம்.

promise_text_en: The promise made by former Prime Minister Pandit Nehru, that English will continue as the official language of the Union as long as non-Hindi speaking people desire it, must be protected. Making all Indian state languages official languages is the permanent solution for this.
promise_text_ta: இந்தி பேசாத மக்கள் விரும்பும் வரை ஆங்கிலமே ஒன்றிய ஆட்சி மொழியாக நீடிக்கும் என்ற அன்றைய பிரதமர் பண்டித நேருவின் வாக்குறுதி காக்கப்பட வேண்டும். இந்திய மாநில மொழிகள் அனைத்தையும் ஆட்சிமொழி ஆக்குவதே இதற்கு நிரந்தரத் தீர்வாகும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 14
impact_mechanism: This seeks to achieve linguistic equality at the national level through a constitutional amendment.

promise_text_en: Limits must be set on the powers and taxation rights of the Union government, and the Indian Constitution should be amended accordingly. In fiscal devolution, fifty percent must be allocated to the states.
promise_text_ta: ஒன்றிய அரசின் அதிகாரங்களுக்கும் வரி விதிப்பு உரிமைகளுக்கும் வரம்பு நிர்ணயிக்கப்பட வேண்டும். அதற்கேற்ப இந்திய அரசமைப்புச் சட்டம் திருத்தப்பட வேண்டும். நிதிப் பகிர்வில் ஐம்பது விழுக்காடு மாநிலங்களுக்கு வழங்க வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 14

promise_text_en: Since all political, social, and economic decisions of the Union government affect the states, the Union government must make such decisions only after consulting with the state governments.
promise_text_ta: ஒன்றிய அரசின் அரசியல் - சமூக - பொருளாதார முடிவுகள் அனைத்தும் மாநிலங்களைப் பாதிப்பதால், மாநில அரசுகளின் ஆலோசனைகளைப் பெற்ற பிறகே ஒன்றிய அரசு அந்த முடிவுகளை எடுக்க வேண்டும்.

promise_text_en: We will reject all measures taken against the principle of secularism; we will create awareness among the people and oppose them firmly.
promise_text_ta: மதச்சார்பற்ற தன்மைக்குப் புறம்பாக எடுக்கப்படும் அனைத்து நடவடிக்கைகளையும் நிராகரிப்போம்; மக்களுக்கு விழிப்புணர்வூட்டி உறுதியுடன் எதிர்ப்போம்!

impact_mechanism: This is a political commitment to oppose policies perceived as undermining secularism through public awareness and political action.

promise_text_en: The party will take all necessary actions, in collaboration with like-minded movements, to make the recommendations of the committee headed by retired Supreme Court Justice Kurian Joseph a matter of national debate, to halt the autocratic tendencies of the Union Government, and to establish state rights.
promise_text_ta: ஓய்வுபெற்ற உச்சநீதிமன்ற நீதியரசர் குரியன் ஜோசப் தலைமையிலான குழு பரிந்துரைகளை, நாடு தழுவிய விவாதப் பொருளாக்கி, ஒன்றிய அரசின் எதேச்சாதிகாரப் போக்கைத் தடுத்து நிறுத்தி, மாநில உரிமைகளை நிலைநாட்டிட, உடன்பாடான கருத்துள்ள இயக்கங்களுடன் இணைந்து செயல்பட்டு, அதற்குத் தேவையான அனைத்து நடவடிக்கைகளையும் கழகம் மேற்கொள்ளும்.

promise_text_ta: ஆங்கிலம் நிரந்தர ஆட்சிமொழிகளில் ஒன்றாக இருக்க வேண்டும். எட்டாவது அட்டவணையில் உள்ள அனைத்து மொழிகளையும் ஆட்சிமொழியாக அறிவிக்க வேண்டும். ஆங்கிலம் மட்டுமே ஒன்றிய - மாநில அரசுகளுக்கு இடையே இணைப்பு மொழியாக இருக்க வேண்டும் என தி.மு.க. தொடர்ந்து போராடும்.

promise_text_en: We will urge the Union government to make the necessary constitutional amendment to introduce a reservation system in the appointment of High Court judges to establish social justice.

source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 19
impact_mechanism: Advocates for a constitutional amendment to introduce a formal reservation system in the appointment of High Court judges, aiming to increase diversity in the higher judiciary.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union government to make the necessary constitutional amendment to introduce a reservation system in the appointment of High Court judges.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political demand directed at the Union government to amend the Constitution. It has no direct financial cost to the state of Tamil Nadu.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the Tamil Nadu state budget. This is a demand for a constitutional amendment.

promise_text_en: We will oppose the injustice of not fully implementing the 27% reservation for Other Backward Classes as per the Mandal Commission's recommendation in high posts of the Union government, Public Sector Undertakings, and premier higher education institutions like IITs, IIMs, AIIMS, and National Law Schools.
promise_text_ta: ஒன்றிய அரசின் உயர்பதவிகளிலும், பொதுத்துறை நிறுவனங்கள், ஐ.ஐ.டி., ஐ.ஐ.எம்., எய்ம்ஸ், தேசிய சட்டப்பள்ளிகள் போன்ற உயர்கல்வி நிறுவனங்களிலும் மண்டல் கமிஷன் பரிந்துரைப்படி இதர பிற்படுத்தப்பட்ட வகுப்பினருக்கு 27% இடஒதுக்கீடு முழுமையாக நிறைவேற்றப்படாத அநீதியை எதிர்ப்போம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 19
impact_mechanism: Applies political pressure on the Union government to ensure the complete implementation of the 27% OBC reservation quota in central government jobs and educational institutions.

promise_components.component: Oppose the injustice of not fully implementing the 27% reservation for Other Backward Classes in high posts of the Union government, PSUs, and premier higher education institutions.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political stance and a demand for enforcement directed at the Union government. It has no direct financial cost to the Tamil Nadu state budget.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the Tamil Nadu state budget. This is a political demand concerning Union government recruitment and admission policies.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise aims to enforce a pre-existing structural policy (Mandal Commission recommendations) at the national level. It addresses the root cause of under-representation, which is the failure to implement the law fully.

promise_text_en: The legally mandated reservation quotas will be fully implemented and will be continuously monitored.
promise_text_ta: சட்டபூர்வமாகத் தரப்பட்டுள்ள இடஒதுக்கீடு எண்ணிக்கையானது முழுமையாக நடைமுறைப்படுத்தப்படும்; அது தொடர்ந்து கண்காணிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 19

promise_components.component: The legally mandated reservation quotas will be fully implemented.

promise_text_en: We will urge the Union government to replace the All India Quota system in Tamil Nadu's medical colleges and instead follow the state's reservation policy.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union government to replace the All India Quota system in Tamil Nadu's medical colleges.

promise_text_ta: உயர்தனிச் செம்மொழியாம் அன்னைத் தமிழின் சிறப்பினைப் போற்றிடும் வகையில் பன்னாட்டுத் தமிழ் அறிஞர்களையும் மொழி வல்லுநர்களையும் கொண்டு சங்கத்தமிழ் முதல் கணினித்தமிழ் வரையிலான தமிழ்மொழியின் வளர்ச்சியையும், அதன் எதிர்காலப் பயணத்திற்கான பாதைகளையும் வகுக்கும் நோக்கில் 'செம்மொழி மாநாடு' சென்னையில் சிறப்பாக நடத்தப்படும்.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost is unstated and cannot be estimated. The cost of a large-scale international conference can be significant but is a one-off expenditure.

promise_text_en: In the age of Artificial Intelligence, a data repository of texts, speeches (from various dialects), and images will be created to develop Large Language Models for the Tamil language. Based on this, AI-based language technology tools will be developed.
promise_text_ta: செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவு காலத்தில், தமிழ்மொழிக்கான பெருமொழி மாதிரிகளை (Large Language Models) உருவாக்கிட உரைகள், பேச்சுகள் (பல்வேறு வட்டார வழக்குகள்), படங்கள் ஆகியவற்றைச் சேகரித்துத் தரவுக் களஞ்சியம் உருவாக்கப்படும். அதனை அடிப்படையாகக் கொண்டு செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவுசார் மொழித் தொழில்நுட்பக் கருவிகள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.

promise_text_en: To encourage the development of Artificial Intelligence software for the Tamil language, a 'Tamil-AI Fellowship' will be offered in educational institutions.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்மொழிக்கான செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவு மென்பொருள்கள் உருவாக்கத்தை ஊக்குவிக்க கல்வி நிறுவனங்களில் ‘தமிழ்-செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவு புத்தாய்வு நிதிநல்கை’ (Tamil-Al Fellowship) வழங்கப்படும்.

promise_text_en: A museum with modern library facilities will be established in Pollachi, Coimbatore district, at a cost of ₹10 crore, for the younger generation to learn about the history of the language struggle.

fiscal_cost_note: One-time capital cost: ₹10 crore. This represents ₹10 crore / ₹1,30,000 crore = ~0.008% of the state's annual discretionary budget. This is highly affordable.

promise_text_en: The DMK will continue to strive to protect the uniqueness and cultural elements of Dravidian languages, including Tamil.

These will be fully studied and published as a series of books with appropriate historical explanations under the title 'A Grand Compendium of Tamil Nadu Inscriptions'.

promise_text_en: We will continue to urge the Union Government to promptly release the Keeladi excavation report, which scientifically establishes the historical antiquity of the Tamils.
promise_text_ta: தமிழர்களின் வரலாற்றுத் தொன்மையை அறிவியல்பூர்வமாக நிறுவியுள்ள கீழடி அகழாய்வு குறித்த அறிக்கையை விரைவில் வெளியிட ஒன்றிய அரசைத் தொடர்ந்து வலியுறுத்துவோம்.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This promise involves political communication and has no direct fiscal impact on the state budget.

promise_text_en: Pre-historic sites, hero stones, rock paintings, sculptures, and historical symbols will be fully identified and digitally documented. They will all be declared as Protected Monuments under government protection and recovered from encroachments.
promise_text_ta: வரலாற்றுக்கு முற்பட்ட கால இடங்கள் (Pre-Historic Sites), நடுகற்கள் (Hero Stones) பாறை ஓவியங்கள், சிற்பங்கள் மற்றும் வரலாற்றுச் சின்னங்களை முழுமையாகக் கண்டறிந்து, டிஜிட்டல் முறையில் ஆவணப்படுத்தப்படும். இவை அனைத்தும் அரசுப் பாதுகாப்பில் உள்ள நினைவுச்சின்னங்களாக (Protected Monuments) அறிவிக்கப்பட்டு, ஆக்கிரமிப்புகளிலிருந்து மீட்கப்படும்.

promise_components.component: Recover sites from encroachments.

promise_text_en: Ancient water management structures like 'Kumizhi' and 'Thoompu', which are evidence of Tamils' ancient water management, along with any inscriptions found with them, will be protected and declared as heritage symbols.
promise_text_ta: குமிழி, தூம்பு உள்ளிட்டவை தமிழர்களின் பண்டைய நீர் மேலாண்மைக்குச் சான்றுகளாக விளங்குகின்றன. அதனுடன் கிடைக்கும் கல்வெட்டுகள் யாவும் பாதுகாக்கப்படுவதோடு, அவை மரபுச் சின்னங்களாக அறிவிக்கப்படும்.

impact_mechanism: Preserves specific elements of ancient agricultural heritage by granting them protected status.

promise_components.component: Protect ancient water management structures like 'Kumizhi' and 'Thoompu'.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of identifying, restoring, and physically protecting these structures across the state is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Declare them as heritage symbols.
promise_components.analysis: This involves an administrative and legal process, the cost of which is not specified in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The costs for survey, restoration, and legal declaration cannot be estimated from the provided data.
sustainability_reasoning: By declaring these structures as heritage symbols, the promise provides a legal and administrative basis for their permanent protection. This addresses the root cause of their decay, which is neglect and lack of formal recognition.

promise_text_en: Archaeological studies based on historical and cultural chronology will continue in all regions of Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டின் அனைத்து நிலப்பரப்புகளில் வரலாறு மற்றும் பண்பாட்டுக் காலவரிசைப்படியான தொல்லியல் தளங்களில் மேற்கொள்ளப்பட்டு வரும் ஆய்வுகள் தொடரும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 23
impact_mechanism: Ensures the continuation of state-led archaeological research, leading to new historical discoveries and knowledge.

promise_components.component: Archaeological studies based on historical and cultural chronology will continue in all regions of Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This is a commitment to continue an existing government function. The annual budget for the state archaeology department's excavations is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This represents a recurring operational cost within the state budget, but the specific amount is not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise supports the ongoing, core function of the state's archaeology department. Continuous research is fundamental to uncovering and understanding history, thus addressing the root need for primary historical investigation.

promise_text_en: An international-standard laboratory will be established in Chennai for archaeological research, incorporating scientific techniques such as AMS dating, pottery analysis, and pollen analysis.
promise_text_ta: தொல்லியல் ஆய்வில் அறிவியல் தொழில்நுட்பங்கள் பயன்படுத்தும் விதமாக, உயர்நிலை கதிரியக்கக் கரிம காலக்கணிப்பு (AMS dating) ஆய்வு, மட்பாண்ட ஆய்வு, மகரந்தத் தூள்கள் ஆய்வு ஆகிய ஆய்வுகளை உள்ளடக்கிய பன்னாட்டுத் தரத்தில் ஓர் ஆய்வகம் சென்னையில் நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 23
impact_mechanism: Builds in-state capacity for advanced scientific analysis of archaeological findings, reducing reliance on external labs and speeding up research.

promise_components.component: An international-standard laboratory will be established in Chennai for archaeological research.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of establishing a high-tech laboratory, including capital expenditure for equipment (like AMS dating machines), construction, and recruitment of specialized personnel, is not available in the reference data. This would be a major one-time and recurring cost.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is a major capital project with significant setup and recurring operational costs that cannot be estimated from the provided data.
sustainability_reasoning: Establishing a state-owned laboratory creates a permanent piece of research infrastructure. It addresses the root problem of lacking indigenous capacity for scientific dating and analysis, which currently acts as a bottleneck for archaeological research in the state.
coverage_gap_note: The promise covers the lab's creation but does not explicitly guarantee funding for the research projects that will utilize its services.

promise_text_en: A committee comprising linguists, archaeologists, anthropologists, and art historians will be formed to conduct studies on the linguistic and cultural similarities between the aboriginal people of Australia and Tamils.
promise_text_ta: ஆஸ்திரேலியாவிலுள்ள பழங்குடி மக்களுக்கும் தமிழர்களுக்கும் உள்ள மொழியியல் மற்றும் பண்பாட்டு ஒற்றுமைகளைக் கண்டறிய மொழியியலாளர்கள், தொல்லியலாளர்கள், மானுடவியலாளர்கள், கலை வரலாற்று ஆய்வாளர்கள் ஆகியோரைக் கொண்ட குழு அமைக்கப்பட்டு ஆய்வுகள் மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 23
impact_mechanism: Initiates a formal academic inquiry into a specific anthropological and linguistic hypothesis.

promise_components.component: A committee of linguists, archaeologists, anthropologists, and art historians will be formed.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of forming and running a committee, including potential international travel and research grants, is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: The committee will conduct studies on linguistic and cultural similarities between the aboriginal people of Australia and Tamils.

coverage_gap_note: The research is highly specific and its direct benefits are confined to the academic community and those interested in the specific hypothesis.

promise_text_en: The DMK urges the Union Government to accept the identity cards issued by the Tamil Nadu government as valid proof for Sri Lankan Tamils applying for citizenship, instead of demanding passports and visas.
promise_text_ta: இலங்கைத் தமிழ் மக்கள் குடியுரிமைக்கு விண்ணப்பிக்கும்போது, அவர்களிடம் கடவுச்சீட்டு, நுழைவு அனுமதி போன்றவற்றைக் கோராமல் தமிழ்நாடு அரசு வழங்கியுள்ள அடையாள அட்டையைச் சான்றாதாரமாக ஏற்க ஒன்றிய அரசை தி.மு.க. கோருகிறது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 24
impact_mechanism: Advocates for a policy change at the Union Government level to ease the citizenship application process for a specific refugee group.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union Government to accept identity cards issued by the Tamil Nadu government as valid proof for Sri Lankan Tamils applying for citizenship.
promise_components.analysis: This is an act of political advocacy directed at the Union Government, which has sole authority over citizenship laws. It has no direct cost to the state.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. As an advocacy effort, this has no direct fiscal impact on the state budget. Implementation is fully dependent on the Union Government.
sustainability_reasoning: The state government has no authority to implement this promise; it can only lobby the Union Government. The promise is a political statement of support for a specific community, not a direct action the state can take to solve the underlying legal barrier.
coverage_gap_note: This addresses only one specific documentation hurdle (passports/visas) and may not resolve other complexities in the citizenship application process for refugees.

promise_text_en: The DMK urges the appointment of district-level officers to facilitate, verify, and take further action on citizenship applications from Sri Lankan Tamils.
promise_text_ta: இலங்கைத் தமிழர்கள் குடியுரிமைக்கு விண்ணப்பிக்கவும் அதனைச் சரிபார்த்து மேல் நடவடிக்கை எடுத்திடவும் மாவட்ட அளவில் அதிகாரிகளை நியமிக்க தி.மு.க. கோருகிறது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 24
impact_mechanism: Creates a dedicated administrative channel within the state bureaucracy to process citizenship applications for a specific refugee group.

promise_components.component: Appoint district-level officers to facilitate, verify, and take further action on citizenship applications from Sri Lankan Tamils.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative action. The cost involves salaries for an unspecified number of officers. The reference data does not contain information on government salaries or the number of districts. Therefore, a precise cost cannot be calculated. Final authority on citizenship rests with the Union Government.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost would be for administrative salaries, which cannot be quantified from the available data but is likely a minor expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise improves the administrative process for applying for citizenship but does not address the core legal and political barriers to obtaining it, which are under the Union Government's purview.
coverage_gap_note: This measure does not apply to other refugee or migrant groups within Tamil Nadu.

promise_text_en: The DMK urges the Union Government to clearly state the legal status of Eelam Tamils who have migrated and are living in India.
promise_text_ta: இந்தியாவில் குடிபெயர்ந்து வாழும் ஈழத்தமிழர்களின் சட்டப்பூர்வ நிலையைத் தெளிவாகக் கூறிட ஒன்றிய அரசை தி.மு.க. வலியுறுத்துகிறது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 24
impact_mechanism: Uses political advocacy to pressure the central government for a policy change regarding the ambiguous legal status of a refugee group.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union Government to clearly state the legal status of Eelam Tamils who have migrated and are living in India.
promise_components.analysis: This is an act of political advocacy directed at the Union Government. It has no direct financial cost to the state. The outcome is entirely dependent on the Union Government's policy decisions.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state government.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise is to 'urge' the Union Government, which is a political statement of intent. The state government has no authority to implement this change itself, making it a form of political signalling rather than a direct action.
coverage_gap_note: Focuses exclusively on Eelam Tamils, not other refugee or stateless populations.

promise_text_en: We will continue to urge the Union Government to grant Indian citizenship to Sri Lankan Tamils who have been residing in Tamil Nadu for many years.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில் பல ஆண்டுகளாக வசித்து வரும் இலங்கை தமிழர்களுக்கு இந்தியக் குடியுரிமை வழங்கிட ஒன்றிய அரசிடம் தொடர்ந்து வலியுறுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 24
impact_mechanism: Employs continued political lobbying to influence the central government's citizenship policy for a specific long-term refugee population.

promise_components.component: Continue to urge the Union Government to grant Indian citizenship to Sri Lankan Tamils residing in Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This is a continuation of an existing advocacy position. The power to grant citizenship is exclusively held by the Union Government. This promise carries no direct fiscal cost for the state.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state government.
sustainability_reasoning: As the promise is to 'continue to urge,' it represents a political stance rather than a new, implementable action. The outcome is entirely outside the state's control and depends on the Union Government.
coverage_gap_note: Does not address the status of those who may not want or qualify for citizenship, even if offered.

promise_text_en: The Indian government must immediately take appropriate diplomatic measures to protect the rights of Sri Lankan Tamils. Demographic changes, land grabs, and the erosion of Tamil identity in traditionally Tamil areas must be prevented.
promise_text_ta: இலங்கைத் தமிழர் உரிமைகளைப் பாதுகாத்திட உரிய தூதரக நடவடிக்கைகளை இந்திய அரசு உடனடியாக எடுக்க வேண்டும். பாரம்பரியமாகத் தமிழர்கள் வாழ்ந்து வந்த பகுதிகளில் மேற்கொள்ளப்பட்டுள்ள மக்கள்தொகை மாற்றங்கள், நில அபகரிப்புகள், தமிழ் அடையாளத்தின் சிதைவு ஆகியவைத் தடுக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 24
impact_mechanism: Advocates for the central government to use its foreign policy tools to protect the rights of an ethnic minority in a neighboring country.

promise_components.component: Urge the Indian government to take diplomatic measures to protect the rights of Sri Lankan Tamils and prevent demographic changes and land grabs in their traditional areas.
promise_components.analysis: This is a foreign policy advocacy promise. Foreign policy is an exclusive domain of the Union Government. The state government's role is limited to lobbying and passing resolutions.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state government.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a statement on foreign policy, an area where the state government has no jurisdiction. It serves as political signalling to both the Union Government and constituencies within Tamil Nadu.
coverage_gap_note: This is a foreign policy position, not a domestic welfare measure for residents of Tamil Nadu.

promise_text_en: We will urge, through the Union Government, that the Sri Lankan government give full recognition to the just demands of the Sri Lankan Tamils. We will also insist on establishing a federal system that ensures equality and non-discrimination for all citizens, including the Malaiyaha Tamils.
promise_text_ta: இலங்கைத் தமிழர்களின் நியாயமான கோரிக்கைகளுக்கு முழு அங்கீகாரத்தினை இலங்கை அரசு வழங்க ஒன்றிய அரசு மூலமாக வலியுறுத்துவோம். மலையகத் தமிழர் உட்பட அனைத்து குடிமக்களுக்கும் சமத்துவத்தையும் பாகுபாடின்மையையும் உறுதி செய்யும் ஒரு கூட்டாட்சி முறையை நிறுவ வலியுறுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 24
impact_mechanism: Advocates for a specific political solution in another country through the central government's diplomatic channels.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union Government to press the Sri Lankan government to establish a federal system ensuring equality for all Tamils.
promise_components.analysis: This is a foreign policy advocacy promise concerning the internal political structure of Sri Lanka. The state government can only make requests to the Union Government, which controls foreign relations.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state government.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise is to 'urge' and 'insist' on a foreign policy matter. This is a political position, not an action the state can implement. Its success depends on complex international relations.
coverage_gap_note: This is a foreign policy position, not a domestic welfare measure.

promise_text_en: A comprehensive "Overseas Tamil Welfare Policy" will be formulated to benefit and protect diaspora Tamils, who contribute significantly to our state's economy, both during their service period abroad and after their return.
promise_text_ta: அயலக வாழ் தமிழர்கள் நம் மாநிலத்தின் பொருளாதார வளர்ச்சிக்கு சிறந்த பங்களிப்பை வழங்கி வருகின்றனர். அவர்களது பணிக்காலத்திலும் அயல்நாட்டு பணி காலத்திற்குப் பின்னரும் பலனளித்து பாதுகாக்கும் வண்ணம் ஒரு விரிவான "வெளிநாடு வாழ் தமிழர் நலக் கொள்கை” ஒன்று உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 25
impact_mechanism: Creates a formal policy framework to guide government actions and resource allocation for the welfare of the Tamil diaspora.

promise_components.component: Formulate a comprehensive 'Overseas Tamil Welfare Policy'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy formulation exercise. The promise is to create the policy document itself. The cost of this exercise is administrative and minimal. The financial implications of the resulting policy are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of formulating a policy is negligible. The fiscal impact will depend on the specific programs introduced under the policy, which are not detailed.
sustainability_reasoning: A formal policy creates a durable, long-term framework for government action. It institutionalizes the state's approach to diaspora welfare, moving beyond ad-hoc measures.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are intended for the Tamil diaspora, not for internal migrants or other communities.

promise_text_en: Additional funds will be allocated to the Non-Resident Tamils' Welfare Department, and its services will be expanded based on the model of the Kerala government's NORKA Roots.
promise_text_ta: அயலக வாழ் தமிழர் நலத்துறைக்கு கூடுதல் நிதி ஒதுக்கீடு வழங்கப்பட்டு கேரள அரசின் NORKA Roots மாதிரியில் அதன் சேவைகள் விரிவாக்கம் செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 25
impact_mechanism: Increases the financial and operational capacity of a specific government department to expand its services for the diaspora.

promise_components.component: Allocate additional funds to the Non-Resident Tamils' Welfare Department and expand its services based on the Kerala NORKA Roots model.
promise_components.analysis: This is a budgetary and administrative promise. The amount of 'additional funds' is not specified, so a cost cannot be calculated. The NORKA model implies a wide range of services for diaspora members and returnees.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is for 'additional funds' without specifying an amount, making it impossible to calculate the fiscal impact.
sustainability_reasoning: Strengthening a dedicated government department with more funds and a proven service model is a long-term institutional improvement. It builds state capacity to address diaspora issues systematically.

promise_text_en: Measures will be taken to provide compensation to the families of workers who die in accidents while working abroad, and business loan assistance will be provided to their relatives to prevent financial hardship.
promise_text_ta: வெளிநாட்டு வேலைக்குச் சென்று அங்கு விபத்துகளில் உயிரிழக்கும் தொழிலாளர்கள் குடும்பங்களுக்கு இழப்பீடும் அவரது உறவுகள் பொருளாதார ரீதியாக பாதிக்கப்படாத வகையில் அவர்களுக்கு தொழிற்கடன் உதவிகள் வழங்கவும் நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 25
impact_mechanism: Provides direct financial relief to families of deceased migrant workers and offers credit access to support their livelihoods.

promise_components.component: Provide compensation to families of workers who die in accidents while working abroad.
promise_components.analysis: The compensation amount is not specified, and data on the number of such incidents is not available in the reference material. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Provide business loan assistance to relatives of deceased workers.
promise_components.analysis: This implies facilitating access to credit, possibly with interest subvention. The cost is dependent on the number of beneficiaries and the terms of assistance, which are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. Key data such as compensation amount, number of annual beneficiaries, and loan assistance details are not available.
sustainability_reasoning: This measure provides critical financial relief to families after a tragedy, addressing the immediate symptom of financial hardship. It does not address the root causes of workplace accidents or the economic precarity of overseas work.
coverage_gap_note: Coverage is limited to families of workers who die in accidents, excluding those who suffer non-fatal injuries, illness, or other forms of exploitation.

promise_text_en: Necessary steps will be taken to increase the number of registrations with the Non-Resident Tamils' Welfare Board.
promise_text_ta: அயலகத் தமிழர் நல வாரியத்தில் பதிவு எண்ணிக்கையினை உயர்த்தத் தேவையான நடவடிக்கைகள் மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 25
impact_mechanism: Expands the formal database of diaspora members, enabling better targeting and communication for welfare schemes.

promise_components.component: Take necessary steps to increase registrations with the Non-Resident Tamils' Welfare Board.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative goal to be achieved through awareness campaigns and process simplification. The direct cost for such activities is typically minor and is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of awareness campaigns is not specified but is expected to be a minor administrative expense.
sustainability_reasoning: Building a more comprehensive database of the diaspora is a long-term institutional asset. It enhances the state's capacity for targeted policy planning and service delivery.
coverage_gap_note: Effectiveness is dependent on the voluntary action of Non-Resident Tamils to register.

promise_text_en: NRT (Non-Resident Tamil) help centers will be established at the 4 international airports in Tamil Nadu to explain the welfare schemes being implemented by the government for diaspora Tamils.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில் உள்ள 4 பன்னாட்டு விமான நிலையங்களிலும் ஒரு NRT உதவி மையத்தினை அமைத்து அயலகத் தமிழர்களுக்கு அரசு மேற்கொண்டு வரும் நலத்திட்டங்கள் குறித்து விளக்க உரிய முன்னெடுப்புகள் மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 25
impact_mechanism: Creates physical points of contact at key transit hubs to provide information and assistance to diaspora Tamils.

promise_components.component: Establish NRT (Non-Resident Tamil) help centers at the 4 international airports in Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This involves setting up and staffing small offices or kiosks at four airports. The cost would include airport space rental and staff salaries. These figures are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost depends on staffing levels and rental agreements with airport authorities, for which no data is provided.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates permanent physical infrastructure for information dissemination and assistance. It institutionalizes a point of contact for the diaspora at critical transit locations.
coverage_gap_note: Only benefits those traveling through the four international airports, not those using other airports or land routes.

promise_text_en: Over 20 lakh farmers receiving free electricity will be provided with new, modern electric pumpsets that are not fitted with any meters, according to their current pump capacity and irrigation needs.
promise_text_ta: இலவச மின்சாரம் பெறும் சுமார் 20 லட்சத்திற்கும் மேற்பட்ட விவசாயிகளுக்கு, அவர்கள் தற்போது வைத்திருக்கும் பம்புகளின் சக்தி மற்றும் அவர்களின் பாசனத் தேவைக்கு ஏற்ப, எவ்வித மீட்டரும் பொருத்தப்படாத நவீன மின்சாரப் பம்புசெட்டுகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 26
impact_mechanism: Reduces capital expenditure for farmers by providing free equipment, potentially improving irrigation efficiency with modern pumps.

promise_components.component: Provide new, modern electric pumpsets to 20 lakh farmers.
promise_components.analysis: The promise targets 20 lakh farmers. The cost of a 'modern electric pumpset' is not provided in the reference data. Cost per pumpset data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

fiscal_cost_note: Total annual cost cannot be calculated as the cost per pumpset is not provided. The promise states 20 lakh beneficiaries.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a one-time capital subsidy that provides relief from equipment costs but does not alter the underlying economics of farming or resource management. The explicit exclusion of meters works against sustainable water and energy use.
coverage_gap_note: Farmers without existing electric connections or those not among the 20 lakh selected are excluded.

promise_text_en: Compensation for crops damaged by floods during disasters will be increased to ₹25,000 per hectare for irrigated and paddy crops, ₹27,000 for perennial crops, and ₹12,000 for rain-fed crops.
promise_text_ta: பேரிடர் காலங்களில் மழை வெள்ளத்தால் பாதிக்கப்படும் இறவைப் பாசன பயிர்கள் மற்றும் நெல் பயிர்களுக்கு வழங்கப்படும் இழப்பீட்டுத்தொகை ஹெக்டேர் ஒன்றுக்கு 25,000 ரூபாயாகவும், நீண்டகாலப் பயிர்களுக்கு 27,000 ரூபாயாகவும், மானாவாரிப் பயிர்களுக்கு 12,000 ரூபாயாகவும் உயர்த்தி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 26
impact_mechanism: Provides a higher financial safety net for farmers who lose crops to floods, mitigating disaster-related income shocks.

promise_components.component: Increase flood compensation to ₹25,000/hectare for irrigated and paddy crops.
promise_components.analysis: This is a contingent liability. The annual area affected by floods is data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

promise_components.component: Increase flood compensation to ₹27,000/hectare for perennial crops.
promise_components.analysis: This is a contingent liability. The annual area affected by floods is data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

promise_components.component: Increase flood compensation to ₹12,000/hectare for rain-fed crops.
promise_components.analysis: This is a contingent liability. The annual area affected by floods is data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

fiscal_cost_note: The total annual cost is contingent on unpredictable disaster events (floods) and the area affected. Therefore, a precise annual cost cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a disaster relief payment, a classic symptomatic treatment. It alleviates the financial pain of a flood event but does nothing to prevent future floods or make agriculture more resilient.
coverage_gap_note: Farmers whose crops are damaged by other disasters (e.g., drought, pests) are not covered by this specific promise.

promise_text_en: The Net Cultivable Area will be increased to 50 lakh hectares.
promise_text_ta: நிகர சாகுபடி பரப்பு (Net Cultivable Area) 50 இலட்சம் ஹெக்டேராக உயர்த்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 26
impact_mechanism: Aims to increase agricultural output and capacity by bringing more land under cultivation.

promise_components.component: Increase the Net Cultivable Area to 50 lakh hectares.
promise_components.analysis: Current Net Cultivable Area data unavailable — cannot calculate the required increase or associated costs.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost cannot be estimated as the current cultivable area and the cost per hectare for land conversion/reclamation are not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Expanding the fundamental resource base (land) for agriculture is a structural change. However, its sustainability depends heavily on how it's done, particularly regarding water resources and ecological impact.
coverage_gap_note: The promise doesn't specify how the newly available land would be distributed among landless or marginal farmers.

promise_text_en: Wherever possible, temporary Direct Paddy Procurement Centers will be converted into permanent buildings with attached drying yards.
promise_text_ta: தற்காலிக நேரடி நெல் கொள்முதல் நிலையங்கள், வாய்ப்பு இருக்கும் அனைத்து இடங்களிலும் உலர்களத்துடன் கூடிய நிரந்தரக் கட்டடங்களாகக் கட்டப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 26
impact_mechanism: Improves post-harvest infrastructure for farmers, reducing crop wastage and delays by providing permanent, all-weather procurement facilities.

promise_components.component: Convert temporary Direct Paddy Procurement Centers into permanent buildings with attached drying yards.
promise_components.analysis: The number of temporary DPCs to be converted is not specified ('Wherever possible'). The cost to build a permanent DPC with a drying yard is not in the reference data. Number of DPCs to be converted and cost per unit are data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost cannot be calculated as the number of temporary DPCs to be upgraded is not specified, and the construction cost per unit is not available.
sustainability_reasoning: Building permanent infrastructure like procurement centers and drying yards is a structural improvement. It directly tackles the root problem of inadequate post-harvest facilities, leading to better outcomes for farmers year after year.
coverage_gap_note: Farmers in areas without any DPC, or where temporary DPCs are not deemed 'possible' to upgrade, are left out.

promise_text_en: The procurement price for paddy will be increased to ₹3,500 per quintal.
promise_text_ta: நெல் கொள்முதல் விலை குவிண்டால் ஒன்றுக்கு ரூ. 3,500-ஆக உயர்த்தி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 26
impact_mechanism: Increases farmers' income directly by raising the government-guaranteed price for their paddy produce.

promise_components.component: Increase the procurement price for paddy to ₹3,500 per quintal.
promise_components.analysis: The promised increase over the current MSP is ₹3,500 - ₹2,300 = ₹1,200 per quintal. The total volume of paddy procured by the state government annually is not in the reference data. Annual paddy procurement volume data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

fiscal_cost_note: The total annual cost cannot be calculated as the total quantity of paddy procured by the state government is not available. The additional cost would be ₹1,200 per quintal procured.
sustainability_reasoning: Raising the procurement price is a direct subsidy, a classic symptomatic treatment for low farm income. It does not address structural issues like yield, input costs, or water availability that determine long-term profitability.
coverage_gap_note: Farmers growing other crops, or paddy farmers who sell to private traders, do not benefit.

promise_text_en: The procurement price for sugarcane will be increased to ₹4,500 per ton.
promise_text_ta: கரும்பு கொள்முதல் விலை டன் ஒன்றுக்கு ரூ. 4,500-ஆக உயர்த்தி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 26
impact_mechanism: Increases sugarcane farmers' income by raising the government-mandated procurement price.

promise_components.component: Increase the procurement price for sugarcane to ₹4,500 per ton.
promise_components.analysis: The current procurement price for sugarcane is not provided in the reference data. The total volume of sugarcane procured annually is also not available. Current sugarcane price and annual procurement volume data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

fiscal_cost_note: The total annual cost cannot be calculated as the current price and the total quantity of sugarcane procured are not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a price intervention that boosts income for a specific group of farmers in the short term. It does not solve underlying problems in the sugar sector, such as mill viability or water-intensive cultivation practices.
coverage_gap_note: Farmers growing any crop other than sugarcane are excluded.

promise_text_en: Desilting works will be undertaken for 10,500 km of 'C' and 'D' category canals in Delta districts and 5,000 km in non-Delta districts.
promise_text_ta: டெல்டா மாவட்டங்களில் 10,500 கி.மீ மற்றும் டெல்டா அல்லாத மாவட்டங்களில் 5,000 கி.மீ நீளத்திற்கு 'சி' மற்றும் 'டி' பிரிவு வாய்க்கால்கள் தூர்வாரும் பணிகள் மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 27
impact_mechanism: Improves water flow and storage capacity in irrigation canals, increasing water availability for agriculture in both Delta and non-Delta regions.

promise_components.component: Desilt 10,500 km of 'C' and 'D' category canals in Delta districts and 5,000 km in non-Delta districts.
promise_components.analysis: The total length to be desilted is 15,500 km. The cost of desilting per kilometer of canal is not provided in the reference data. Cost per km for desilting data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost cannot be calculated as the cost per kilometer for desilting canals is not available in the reference data. The project covers a total of 15,500 km.
sustainability_reasoning: Restoring the carrying capacity of irrigation canals is a fundamental, structural improvement to the agricultural support system. It directly addresses the problem of water blockages and inefficient distribution, providing a long-term benefit.
coverage_gap_note: Farmers in areas not served by these specific canal networks will not see a direct benefit.

promise_text_en: 43 lakh soil health cards will be issued to farmers, and the area under natural farming will be expanded to 17,000 hectares and bio-farming to one lakh hectares.
promise_text_ta: மண்வள அட்டைகள் 43 இலட்சம் உழவர்களுக்கு வழங்கப்பட்டு, இயற்கை வேளாண்மைப் பரப்பு 17 ஆயிரம் ஹெக்டேராகவும், உயிர் வேளாண்மைப் பரப்பு ஒரு இலட்சம் ஹெக்டேராகவும் விரிவுபடுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 27
impact_mechanism: Improves farm productivity and sustainability through scientific soil analysis and promotion of eco-friendly farming practices.

promise_components.component: Issue 43 lakh soil health cards to farmers.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of issuing a soil health card is not in the reference data. Cost per soil health card data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

promise_components.component: Expand natural farming to 17,000 hectares and bio-farming to one lakh hectares.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of promoting expansion of these farming methods per hectare is not available in the reference data. Cost per hectare for farming expansion data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost cannot be calculated as the unit costs for soil health cards and for promoting natural/bio-farming per hectare are not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets the very foundation of agriculture: soil health. By providing information (health cards) and promoting alternative methods (natural/bio-farming), it aims to create a more resilient and sustainable agricultural system from the ground up.
coverage_gap_note: Farmers not receiving the soil health cards (~40 lakh) or those outside the targeted areas for natural/bio-farming are not covered.

promise_text_en: To conserve water, which is the basis of agriculture, micro-irrigation will be expanded to 21 lakh hectares.
promise_text_ta: வேளாண்மைக்கு ஆதாரமான நீரைச் சேமிக்க நுண்ணீர்ப் பாசனம் 21 இலட்சம் ஹெக்டேராக விரிவுபடுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 27
impact_mechanism: Promotes water conservation and efficiency in agriculture by expanding the use of drip and sprinkler irrigation systems.

promise_components.component: Expand micro-irrigation to 21 lakh hectares.
promise_components.analysis: The promise targets 21 lakh hectares. The cost to install micro-irrigation per hectare is not provided in the reference data. Cost per hectare for micro-irrigation is data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost cannot be calculated as the installation cost per hectare for micro-irrigation is not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a classic structural intervention. It changes the technology of production to address a core resource constraint (water), creating lasting efficiency gains and making agriculture more resilient to drought.
coverage_gap_note: The promise doesn't specify if it covers all types of farmers (e.g., marginal farmers) or if there are eligibility criteria.

promise_text_en: One thousand rainwater harvesting structures will be built in the Western and Eastern Ghats. Canals and sluices will be renovated, and water management will be improved to transform water-scarce areas into fertile regions.
promise_text_ta: மேற்கு, கிழக்கு தொடர்ச்சி மலைகளில் ஆயிரம் மழைநீர் சேகரிப்பு கட்டமைப்புகள் கட்டப்படும். கால்வாய்கள் - மதகுகள் புனரமைக்கப்பட்டு, நீர் மேலாண்மையைச் சீர்செய்து, தண்ணீர் தட்டுப்பாடான பகுதிகள் வளமான பகுதிகளாக மாற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 27
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve water availability by increasing rainwater capture, renovating storage infrastructure, and improving overall water management.

promise_components.component: Build one thousand rainwater harvesting structures in the Western and Eastern Ghats.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to build one rainwater harvesting structure is not in the reference data. Cost per rainwater harvesting structure data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

promise_components.component: Renovate canals and sluices.
promise_components.analysis: The length/number of canals and sluices to be renovated is not specified, nor is the cost per unit. Cost for canal/sluice renovation data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost cannot be calculated as the unit costs for rainwater harvesting structures and canal/sluice renovation are not available. The scope of renovation is also not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise focuses on augmenting water supply (harvesting) and improving its distribution (canal renovation). These are investments in physical infrastructure that address the root cause of water scarcity and provide lasting benefits.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are localized to the areas where the structures are built and canals are renovated.

promise_text_en: Food production will be increased to 125 lakh metric tons.
promise_text_ta: உணவு உற்பத்தி 125 இலட்சம் மெட்ரிக் டன்னாக உயர்த்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 27
impact_mechanism: Achieves a macro-level increase in the state's food grain output through unspecified programmatic interventions.

promise_components.component: Increase total food production to 125 lakh metric tons.
promise_components.analysis: This is an outcome-based target. The current food production level is not provided in the reference data, so the required increase and the cost to achieve it cannot be calculated. The specific programs or investments to reach this goal are not defined.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is an aspirational goal without a specified program budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a high-level production target, not a specific policy or program. Without a clear, funded mechanism to address the underlying constraints on production (like water, soil health, or credit), it serves primarily as political signalling.

promise_text_en: A "Village-level Crop Cultivation Plan" will be prepared and implemented to help farmers achieve higher yields by adopting suitable crops and best cultivation practices for their region.
promise_text_ta: உழவர்கள் தங்கள் பகுதிக்கு ஏற்ற பயிர்களைச் சிறந்த சாகுபடி முறைகளைப் பின்பற்றி அதிக மகசூலை அடைந்திடும் வகையில், “கிராம அளவிலான பயிர்ச் சாகுபடித் திட்டம்” தயாரிக்கப்பட்டு செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 27
impact_mechanism: Improves farmer decision-making by providing localized, data-driven advice on crop selection and cultivation methods.

promise_components.component: Prepare and implement a "Village-level Crop Cultivation Plan" for higher yields.
promise_components.analysis: This is an advisory and planning service. The cost would depend on the intensity of the program (e.g., hiring new extension officers vs. using existing staff), which is not specified. Reference data does not provide costs for such programs.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The financial outlay for creating and disseminating these plans across all villages is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative addresses a root cause of low productivity: the mismatch between crops and local agro-ecological conditions. By building a knowledge-based system for farm planning, it creates a lasting improvement in agricultural efficiency.
coverage_gap_note: The plan benefits landowners and cultivators but does not directly address the needs of landless agricultural laborers.

promise_text_en: Action will be taken to increase the area under Organic Farming from 40,000 hectares to one lakh hectares in the next 5 years, and continuous advisory services will be provided to ensure its full benefits are realized.
promise_text_ta: உயிர்ம வேளாண்மை (Organic Farming) சாகுபடி பரப்பினை 40,000 ஹெக்டேரிலிருந்து அடுத்த 5 ஆண்டுகளில் ஒரு லட்சம் ஹெக்டேராக உயர்த்த நடவடிக்கை எடுப்பதுடன், அதன் பயன் முழுமையடையும் வகையில் தொடர் ஆலோசனைகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 27
impact_mechanism: Promotes a shift to a more sustainable and potentially higher-value farming system by expanding the area under certified organic cultivation.

promise_components.component: Increase area under Organic Farming from 40,000 to 1,00,000 hectares in 5 years.
promise_components.analysis: The promise targets an increase of 60,000 hectares. The cost of incentives, certification support, and advisory services per hectare is not available in the reference data, so a total cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Provide continuous advisory services for organic farming.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of providing specialized advisory services is not specified and cannot be estimated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of subsidies or support for converting 60,000 hectares and providing advisory services is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root causes of soil degradation from chemical-intensive agriculture and can improve farmer incomes through premium pricing. It encourages a long-term shift in farming practices towards ecological and economic sustainability.
coverage_gap_note: The program is limited to farmers willing and able to transition to organic, a small subset of the total farming population.

promise_text_en: Action will be taken to increase the area under Natural Farming five-fold in 5 years. The participation of Women's Self-Help Groups will be fostered in the production of inputs for natural farming.
promise_text_ta: இயற்கை வேளாண்மை (Natural Farming) சாகுபடி பரப்பினை 5 ஆண்டுகளில் 5 மடங்கு அதிகரிக்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும். இயற்கை வேளாண்மைக்குத் தேவையான இடுபொருட்கள் தயாரிப்பில் மகளிர் சுயஉதவிக் குழுக்களின் பங்களிப்பு உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 27
impact_mechanism: Reduces farmer input costs and improves soil health by expanding natural farming, while creating local enterprises for women.

promise_components.component: Increase the area under Natural Farming five-fold in 5 years.
promise_components.analysis: The current area under natural farming is not provided in the reference data, so the target area for expansion cannot be quantified. The cost of promotion is unknown.

promise_components.component: Foster participation of Women's Self-Help Groups in producing natural farming inputs.
promise_components.analysis: This creates an economic opportunity for SHGs. The cost of training and capitalizing these SHG-led enterprises is not specified. There are ~63 lakh women in SHGs who are potential participants.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The baseline area for the five-fold increase is unknown, and the investment in SHG enterprises is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This tackles the root problems of high input costs and soil degradation. Involving Women's SHGs in the input supply chain builds local economic resilience and creates a sustainable, decentralized support system for the farming practice.
coverage_gap_note: The scale of the program is undefined, so the number of farmers and SHGs who will benefit is unknown.

promise_text_en: To increase the area under agroforestry, the cultivation of trees such as Pungan, Jamun, Rosewood, Teak, Sandalwood, Red Sanders, Mahogany, Malai Vembu, and Neer Maruthu will be encouraged.
promise_text_ta: வேளாண் காடுகள் பரப்பினை அதிகரிக்கும் வகையில் புங்கன், நாவல், ஈட்டி, தேக்கு, சந்தனம், செம்மரம், மகோகனி, மலைவேம்பு, நீர் மருது போன்ற மரங்களை வளர்ப்பது ஊக்குவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 27
impact_mechanism: Diversifies farm income and improves ecological resilience by encouraging the integration of valuable timber and fruit trees with crops.

promise_components.component: Encourage cultivation of specific tree species to increase the area under agroforestry.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of intent. It does not specify a target area, a budget for incentives (e.g., free saplings), or the number of farmers to be covered. The cost of 'encouragement' is not defined.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. No quantifiable targets or financial commitments are provided.
sustainability_reasoning: Agroforestry is a structural solution that addresses multiple root causes, including land degradation, climate vulnerability, and income instability. It creates a long-term, diversified, and resilient production system.
