promise_text_ta: பருப்பு வகைகள், எண்ணெய் வித்துக்கள் போன்றவற்றைக் கூடுதலாக விளைவித்திடச் சிறப்புத் திட்டங்கள் வகுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 29
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to boost local production of essential food items by creating special schemes for farmers.

promise_components.component: Formulate special schemes to increase the cultivation of pulses and oilseeds.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy formulation promise. No specific financial allocation or cultivation targets are provided. The cost of potential schemes (e.g., subsidies, MSP incentives) cannot be calculated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The promise is to create schemes, with no specified budget.
sustainability_reasoning: By aiming to increase domestic production of pulses and oilseeds, this addresses the state's reliance on imports and market volatility. It is a structural attempt to improve food security and farmer income.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to farmers in agro-climatic zones suitable for cultivating pulses and oilseeds.

promise_text_en: 5 crore palm seeds will be planted in 5 years. Special clusters for palm products will be established. Arrangements will be made to market palm products produced in Tamil Nadu through Aavin outlets.
promise_text_ta: 5 ஆண்டுகளில் 5 கோடி பனை விதைக்கப்படும். பனைப் பொருட்களுக்கான சிறப்புக் குழுமங்கள் அமைக்கப்படும். தமிழ்நாட்டில் உற்பத்தியாகும் பனைப் பொருட்களை ஆவின் விற்பனை நிலையங்கள் வழியாகச் சந்தைப்படுத்த ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 29
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to create a new rural industry by building a value chain from palm cultivation to retail.

promise_components.component: Plant 5 crore palm seeds in 5 years.
promise_components.analysis: This translates to 1 crore seeds per year. The cost of seeds and labor for planting is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Establish special clusters for palm products.
promise_components.analysis: The number and cost of establishing industrial clusters are not specified and cannot be calculated from reference data.

promise_components.component: Arrange for marketing of palm products through Aavin outlets.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy decision to leverage an existing distribution network. The direct fiscal cost is likely low, relating to logistics and administration.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of seeds, planting, and establishing clusters is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to create a long-term agricultural asset and an associated economic ecosystem. It is a structural intervention to generate rural employment and create new product markets.
coverage_gap_note: Direct benefits are for rural communities involved in palm cultivation and processing, not the general population.

promise_text_en: New agro-industrial parks will be created. Special industrial parks for products like eggs, coconuts, bananas, mangoes, paddy, and flowers will be established. Agro-industrial parks for locally produced goods will be set up in places like Pattukkottai, Krishnagiri, Ooty, Yercaud, Kodaikanal, Theni, Ramanathapuram, Tenkasi, Tiruvannamalai, Salem, Pollachi, Oddanchatram, and Tiruvarur.
promise_text_ta: புதிய வேளாண் தொழில் பூங்காக்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும். முட்டை, தேங்காய், வாழை, மா, நெல், பூக்கள் போன்ற பொருட்களுக்கான சிறப்பு தொழில் பூங்காக்கள் அமைக்கப்படும். பட்டுக்கோட்டை, கிருஷ்ணகிரி, உதகமண்டலம், ஏற்காடு, கொடைக்கானல், தேனி, இராமநாதபுரம், தென்காசி, திருவண்ணாமலை, சேலம், பொள்ளாச்சி, ஒட்டன்சத்திரம், திருவாரூர் போன்ற இடங்களில் அந்தந்தப் பகுதிகளில் பரவலாக உற்பத்தி செய்யப்படும் பொருட்களுக்கான வேளாண் தொழில் பூங்காக்கள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 29
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to boost the rural economy by creating dedicated infrastructure for food processing and value addition.

promise_components.component: Create new agro-industrial parks, including specialized parks for specific products and in 13 named locations.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major capital expenditure project. The cost of land acquisition and infrastructure development for an industrial park is significant but is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost per park is unknown and highly variable. This would be a multi-year, high-value capital project.
sustainability_reasoning: Agro-industrial parks address the root cause of post-harvest losses and low value realization for farmers. They create infrastructure for processing, storage, and marketing, which can transform the agricultural economy in the targeted regions.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are geographically concentrated in the regions where parks are established.

promise_text_en: Mobile paddy dryers will be provided as needed at Direct Paddy Procurement Centers operating in paddy growing areas.
promise_text_ta: நெல் விளையும் பகுதிகளில் செயல்படும் நேரடி நெல் கொள்முதல் நிலையங்களில் நகரும் நெல் உலர்த்திகள் தேவைக்கேற்ப வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 29
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to reduce post-harvest losses and improve crop quality for farmers by providing drying technology at procurement points.

promise_components.component: Provide mobile paddy dryers as needed at Direct Paddy Procurement Centers (DPCs).
promise_components.analysis: The number of dryers is not specified ('as needed'). The cost per mobile dryer unit and the total number of DPCs are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of units and cost per unit are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a key bottleneck in the paddy supply chain: high moisture content leading to spoilage and lower prices. Providing dryers is a structural improvement to post-harvest infrastructure.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits only paddy farmers who sell their produce through Direct Paddy Procurement Centers.

promise_text_en: Silo storage facilities will be constructed in areas where paddy is cultivated extensively.
promise_text_ta: நெல் அதிகம் விளையும் பகுதிகளில் தானிய சேமிப்புக் கிடங்குகள் (Silo Storage) உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 29
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to modernize the state's food grain storage system to reduce waste and improve food security.

promise_components.component: Construct silo storage facilities in areas with extensive paddy cultivation.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital-intensive infrastructure project. The number, capacity, and cost of constructing modern silos are not specified in the promise or the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of constructing silos is high but not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Silos are a structural solution to the problem of high post-harvest losses in traditional warehouses. They improve the efficiency and security of the public distribution system and buffer stock management.
coverage_gap_note: Direct benefits are for the state's food supply chain; indirect for the general population.

promise_text_en: In the next 5 years, 20,000 water bodies will be desilted, their banks strengthened, and rejuvenated. Sluices and vents within them will be repaired, and construction works like bathing ghats will also be undertaken.
promise_text_ta: அடுத்த 5 ஆண்டுகளில் 20 ஆயிரம் நீர்நிலைகள் தூர்வாரி, கரைகள் பலப்படுத்தப்பட்டு புனரமைக்கப்படும். அவற்றில் உள்ள மதகுகள், கலுங்குகள் ஆகியவைச் சீர்செய்யப்படுவதுடன், நீராடுதுறை போன்ற கட்டுமானப் பணிகளும் மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 30
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to enhance water security and agricultural productivity by restoring the state's traditional water storage systems.

promise_components.component: Rejuvenate 20,000 water bodies in 5 years (desilting, strengthening banks, repairing sluices).
promise_components.analysis: This involves work on 4,000 water bodies per year. The cost of rejuvenation varies greatly with the size and condition of the water body, and this data is not available in the reference materials.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The average cost per water body is unknown, making a total estimate impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: Restoring water bodies addresses the root causes of water scarcity, falling groundwater levels, and lack of irrigation. It is a fundamental, long-term investment in the state's natural infrastructure and climate resilience.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated in communities located near the rejuvenated water bodies.

promise_text_en: The proliferation of invasive plant species like water hyacinth has become a major obstacle to smooth water flow and irrigation. We will continuously remove these to regulate water flow.
promise_text_ta: ஆகாயத்தாமரை போன்ற தாவர இனங்களின் பெருக்கம் சீரான நீரோட்டத்திற்கும், பாசனத்திற்கும், பெரும் சிக்கலாக உருவாகி உள்ளது. இவற்றைத் தொடர்ந்து அப்புறப்படுத்தி நீரோட்டத்தைச் சீராக்குவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 30
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve water flow and usability in irrigation channels and lakes by clearing biological obstructions.

promise_components.component: Continuously remove invasive plant species like water hyacinth from water bodies.
promise_components.analysis: This is an ongoing maintenance activity. The cost depends on the extent of infestation and frequency of removal, which cannot be determined from the reference data. This work could potentially be executed under MGNREGS, using the specified daily wage of ₹294.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The total area requiring clearing is unknown. Costs would be recurring.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a necessary maintenance activity that treats the symptom (overgrowth) but does not eliminate the root cause (the presence of invasive species in the ecosystem). The need for removal will be continuous.

promise_text_en: All water bodies in urban areas will be rejuvenated, and walkways will be built around them, transforming them for continuous public use.
promise_text_ta: நகர்ப்புறங்களில் உள்ள நீர்நிலைகள் அனைத்தும் புனரமைக்கப்பட்டு, அந்த நீர்நிலைகளைச் சுற்றி நடைபாதைகள் அமைத்து, மக்கள் அதனைத் தொடர்ந்து பயன்படுத்திடும் வகையில் மாற்றி அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 30
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve urban quality of life by restoring water bodies and creating public recreational spaces.

promise_components.component: Rejuvenate all water bodies in urban areas.
promise_components.analysis: The total number of urban water bodies is not available in the reference data, so the scale is unknown.

promise_components.component: Build walkways around them for public use.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of rejuvenation and construction per water body is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of water bodies and cost per unit are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural improvement to urban 'blue-green' infrastructure. It addresses environmental degradation and the lack of public spaces, creating lasting assets for communities.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is specific to urban residents and does not cover rural areas.

promise_text_en: The 'Tamil Nadu Water Security Action Plan 2056' will be created after assessing and studying the state's drinking water, agricultural, and industrial needs for the next 30 years, in order to meet those demands.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டின் அடுத்த 30 ஆண்டுகளுக்கான குடிநீர் தேவை, வேளாண்மை மற்றும் தொழிற்சாலைகளுக்கான தேவைகளைக் கணக்கிட்டு, ஆய்வு செய்து அத்தேவைகளை நிறைவு செய்யத்தக்க வகையில் ‘தமிழ்நாடு நீர்ப்பாதுகாப்புச் செயல்திட்டம் 2056' உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 30
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to create a long-term strategic framework to ensure the state's water needs are met for the next generation.

promise_components.component: Create the 'Tamil Nadu Water Security Action Plan 2056' based on a 30-year needs assessment.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy and planning exercise. The cost involves studies and consultations, which are typically low and absorbed into departmental administrative budgets. No large-scale capital expenditure is involved in creating the plan itself.

fiscal_cost_note: The fiscal cost for creating a plan is negligible relative to the state budget and would be part of administrative expenditure. It cannot be precisely calculated but is considered low.
sustainability_reasoning: Developing a long-term, evidence-based plan is the most fundamental structural step towards achieving water security. It addresses the root cause of ad-hoc water management by creating a strategic foundation for future investments and policies.

promise_text_en: New large reservoirs will be created in needed districts in Tamil Nadu to increase drinking water supply and decentralize water distribution.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில், தேவைப்படும் மாவட்டங்களில் குடிநீர் விநியோகத்தை அதிகரிக்கவும், நீர் வழங்கலைப் பரவலாக்கவும் பெரிய நீர்த்தேக்கங்கள் (Reservoirs) புதிதாக உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 30
impact_mechanism: Increases water storage capacity, aiming to improve water security for drinking and potentially agriculture in targeted areas.

promise_components.component: Create new large reservoirs in needed districts.
promise_components.analysis: The number, size, locations, and cost of land acquisition and construction for new reservoirs are not specified. Reference data does not contain information on public works or infrastructure project costs. Therefore, the fiscal impact cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of large-scale infrastructure projects like reservoirs is highly variable and depends on land acquisition, geography, and scale, none of which are specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a long-term capital investment in water infrastructure. If built, reservoirs create a permanent asset that directly addresses the root cause of water scarcity by increasing storage capacity for future use.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are localized to the 'needed districts' where reservoirs are built; other water-stressed regions may not be covered.

promise_text_en: Under the "Nalamudan Tamil Nadu 2030" plan, the annual income limit for inclusion in the Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme will be raised to ₹5 lakh, and the insurance coverage amount will be increased to ₹10 lakh, to ensure adequate medical insurance for all in need.
promise_text_ta: “நலமுடன் தமிழ்நாடு 2030” என்ற திட்டத்தின்படி தேவைப்படும் அனைவருக்கும் போதிய மருத்துவக் காப்பீடு கிடைக்கும் வகையில் முதலமைச்சரின் மருத்துவக் காப்பீட்டுத் திட்டத்தில் சேர்க்கப்படுவதற்கான ஆண்டு வருமான வரம்பு ரூ.5 இலட்சமாகவும், காப்பீட்டுத் தொகை ரூ.10 இலட்சமாகவும் உயர்த்தப்படும்.
scheme_name: நலமுடன் தமிழ்நாடு 2030, முதலமைச்சரின் மருத்துவக் காப்பீட்டுத் திட்டம்
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 31
impact_mechanism: Reduces out-of-pocket health expenditure for a larger segment of the population by expanding eligibility and coverage limits of a state-run insurance scheme.

promise_components.component: Raise the annual income limit for the Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme to ₹5 lakh.
promise_components.analysis: The number of new households that would become eligible under the raised income limit is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the increase in the beneficiary pool cannot be quantified.

promise_components.component: Increase the insurance coverage amount to ₹10 lakh per family per year.
promise_components.analysis: The current coverage amount, number of beneficiary families, and average claim size are not in the reference data. Therefore, the incremental cost from a higher coverage cap cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The total cost depends on the number of new beneficiaries and the increased utilization and claim size under the higher cap, for which no data is provided.
sustainability_reasoning: The scheme provides a crucial financial safety net that treats the symptom of high medical costs. It does not address the underlying causes of disease or the need for medical treatment itself.
coverage_gap_note: Households with annual incomes above the new ₹5 lakh limit would remain excluded from the scheme.

promise_text_en: Modern cancer treatment facilities, similar to those in Chennai and Kanchipuram government hospitals, will be established in government medical college hospitals in the districts of Cuddalore, Thanjavur, Madurai, Thoothukudi, Tirunelveli, Ramanathapuram, Salem, Tiruppur, Villupuram, Tiruvannamalai, and Coimbatore.
promise_text_ta: சென்னை, காஞ்சிபுரம் அரசு மருத்துவமனைகளில் இருப்பது போன்று கடலூர், தஞ்சாவூர், மதுரை, தூத்துக்குடி, திருநெல்வேலி, இராமநாதபுரம், சேலம், திருப்பூர், விழுப்புரம், திருவண்ணாமலை மற்றும் கோவை ஆகிய மாவட்டங்களில் உள்ள அரசு மருத்துவக் கல்லூரி மருத்துவமனைகளில் புற்றுநோய்க்கான நவீன சிகிச்சை வசதிகள் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 31
impact_mechanism: Improves access to advanced cancer care in multiple districts by decentralizing specialized treatment infrastructure from major cities.

promise_components.component: Establish modern cancer treatment facilities in 11 specified district government medical college hospitals.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to establish one modern cancer treatment facility (including equipment, civil works, and specialized staffing) is not available in the reference data. The cost for 11 such facilities cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This involves significant capital expenditure for medical equipment and infrastructure, for which no cost estimates are provided.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a permanent upgrade of public health infrastructure. It creates lasting capacity for advanced cancer treatment within the public system, addressing a structural gap in regional healthcare access.
coverage_gap_note: Cancer patients in districts other than the 11 specified will still need to travel for similar advanced care.

promise_text_en: Special measures will be taken to achieve the number one position in India in reducing Infant Mortality Rate (IMR) and Maternal Mortality Ratio (MMR).
promise_text_ta: தாய்சேய் நலனில் IMR மற்றும் MMR குறைக்கும் தரவரிசையில் இந்தியாவிலேயே முதல் இடம்பெற சிறப்பு நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 31
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve maternal and child health outcomes through unspecified 'special measures'.

promise_components.component: Take special measures to achieve the number one position in India in reducing Infant Mortality Rate (IMR) and Maternal Mortality Ratio (MMR).
promise_components.analysis: The promise is a statement of intent, not a specific, measurable action. The 'special measures' are not defined, and their cost is therefore incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. As the specific interventions are not outlined, no budget can be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a laudable goal but lacks a concrete plan, budget, or mechanism. As presented, it is a political statement of priority rather than a deliverable policy promise.

promise_text_en: Super-specialty hospitals will be established at the regional level in Thanjavur, Villupuram, and Dharmapuri to ensure advanced treatment for people in the surrounding districts.
promise_text_ta: மண்டல அளவில்- தஞ்சாவூர், விழுப்புரம், தருமபுரி ஆகிய இடங்களில் உயர்சிறப்பு மருத்துவமனைகள் அமைக்கப்படும். இந்த மருத்துவமனைகள் ஒவ்வொன்றின் மூலமும், சுற்றியுள்ள மாவட்ட மக்களுக்கு உயர்சிகிச்சை அளிக்கப்படுவது உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 31
impact_mechanism: Decentralizes advanced medical care by establishing high-level hospitals in three non-metropolitan regional hubs.

promise_components.component: Establish super-specialty hospitals at the regional level in Thanjavur, Villupuram, and Dharmapuri.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to establish a single super-specialty hospital is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost for three such hospitals cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This represents a very large capital investment, but no cost figures are provided for estimation.
sustainability_reasoning: Building hospitals is a classic structural investment. It creates permanent healthcare capacity and fundamentally alters access to advanced medical care for the populations in and around these regions.
coverage_gap_note: People in regions not served by these three new hubs will continue to lack local access to super-specialty care.

promise_text_en: A special scheme will be implemented to control and prevent the top ten non-communicable diseases that cause premature death and reduced lifespan in Tamil Nadu, including heart disease, diabetes, kidney disease, cancer, respiratory illness, and digestive disorders.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில் இளம் வயதினர் உயிரிழப்பிற்கும், வாழ்நாள் குறைவதற்கும் காரணமான இதய நோய்கள், நீரிழிவு நோய், சிறுநீரகப் பாதிப்பு, புற்றுநோய்கள், சுவாச நோய், செரிமானம் சார்ந்த நோய்கள் உள்ளிட்ட முதன்மையான பத்து தொற்றா நோய்களைக் கட்டுப்படுத்தவும், தடுக்கவும் சிறப்புத் திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 31
impact_mechanism: Aims to reduce mortality from major non-communicable diseases (NCDs) through a targeted prevention and control program.

promise_components.component: Implement a special scheme to control and prevent the top ten non-communicable diseases.
promise_components.analysis: The promise is for a 'special scheme' without defining its components (e.g., screening, free medication, lifestyle programs) or scale. The cost is therefore incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost would depend entirely on the design and scale of the unspecified 'special scheme'.
sustainability_reasoning: A scheme focused on 'control and prevention' of chronic diseases is a structural public health intervention. It aims to reduce the disease burden itself, rather than only treating its consequences.

promise_text_en: Special camps will be conducted for the early detection of diseases such as diabetes, high blood pressure, and cancer.
promise_text_ta: நீரிழிவு, உயர் இரத்த அழுத்தம், புற்றுநோய் போன்றவற்றை ஆரம்ப நிலையிலேயே கண்டறிய சிறப்பு முகாம்கள் நடத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 31
impact_mechanism: Improves early diagnosis of common chronic diseases by bringing screening services directly to communities.

promise_components.component: Conduct special camps for the early detection of diseases such as diabetes, high blood pressure, and cancer.
promise_components.analysis: The number, frequency, and scale of the 'special camps' are not specified. The cost per camp is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total annual cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is dependent on the scale and frequency of the camps, which is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: Institutionalizing proactive screening is a structural shift towards a preventative healthcare model. Early detection allows for timely management, addressing the progression of disease at its root.
coverage_gap_note: Coverage is limited to those who are able to and choose to attend the camps.

promise_text_en: Artificial insemination (fertility) centers will be started at the regional level.
promise_text_ta: மண்டல அளவில் செயற்கைக் கருத்தரிப்பு மையங்கள் தொடங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 31
impact_mechanism: Provides access to assisted reproductive technology through the public health system at a regional level.

promise_components.component: Start artificial insemination (fertility) centers at the regional level.
promise_components.analysis: The number of 'regional' centers is not specified. The cost to establish and operate one such specialized center is not available in the reference data. The cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost for establishing and staffing specialized medical centers is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a new, permanent service capability within the public health system. It addresses the medical root cause of infertility for those who cannot afford private sector options.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to couples experiencing infertility who live within a reasonable distance of the new regional centers.

promise_text_en: Multi-specialty eye care centers will be established at the regional level.
promise_text_ta: மண்டல அளவில் பல்நோக்குச் சிறப்பு கண் மருத்துவ மையங்கள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 32
impact_mechanism: Improves access to advanced ophthalmological services by establishing specialized centers at a regional level.

promise_components.component: Establish multi-specialty eye care centers at the regional level.
promise_components.analysis: The number of 'regional' centers is not specified. The cost to establish and operate one such specialized center is not available in the reference data. The cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The capital and operational costs for specialized medical centers are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a permanent addition of specialized health infrastructure. It addresses the structural gap in access to advanced treatment for complex eye diseases, a root cause of preventable blindness.
coverage_gap_note: Access will be limited to those living near the new regional centers.

promise_text_en: To enable the middle class with private insurance to utilize facilities in government hospitals, a special insurance section will be expanded for them.
promise_text_ta: நடுத்தர வர்க்கத்தினர் அரசு மருத்துவமனைகளில் உள்ள வசதிகளைப் பெற, தனியார் காப்பீடு வைத்திருக்கும் மருத்துவப் பயனாளிகளும் பயன்பெறும் வகையில், காப்பீட்டுச் சிறப்புப் பகுதி விரிவுபடுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 32
impact_mechanism: Aims to increase revenue for government hospitals by creating a pathway for privately insured patients to use public facilities.

promise_components.component: Expand a special insurance section in government hospitals for middle-class patients with private insurance.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative and revenue-generating measure, not a direct expenditure promise. The cost of expanding an administrative section is likely minimal and cannot be estimated from reference data. It is intended to be revenue-positive for hospitals.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a revenue-side reform, not a direct expenditure. The administrative cost is likely minimal and is expected to be offset by increased revenue from private insurance claims.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural reform to the financing model of government hospitals. It aims to create a sustainable, non-budgetary revenue stream by tapping into the private insurance market, which can fund service improvements.
coverage_gap_note: This does not benefit the uninsured or those who rely solely on the government's own insurance scheme.

promise_text_en: The Siddha Medical University will be established by removing existing obstacles and enacting necessary legislation. The hospital affiliated with this university will provide treatment and also conduct scientific research to modernize Siddha medicine.
promise_text_ta: சித்த மருத்துவப் பல்கலைக்கழகம் தொடங்குவதில் உள்ள இடர்ப்பாடுகளைக் களைந்து சட்டமியற்றியவாறு அது தொடங்கப்படும். இந்தப் பல்கலைக்கழகத்துடன் இணைக்கப்படும் மருத்துவமனை, சிகிச்சை அளிப்பதுடன் சித்த மருத்துவத்தை நவீனமயமாக்கும் அறிவியல் ஆய்வுகளை மேற்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 32
impact_mechanism: Establishes a permanent state-level institution for education, research, and treatment in Siddha medicine, aiming to modernize and standardize it.

promise_components.component: Establish a Siddha Medical University with an affiliated hospital.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital expenditure for land, buildings, and equipment, plus recurring costs for staff and operations. The reference data does not contain cost estimates for constructing or running a university or hospital.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost would include significant one-time capital investment and recurring annual operational expenses, the scale of which is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a permanent institution dedicated to education, research, and advanced care in a traditional medical system. It addresses the need for institutional support and scientific validation, creating lasting capacity.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated among students, practitioners, and patients of Siddha medicine, not the general population's primary healthcare needs.

promise_text_en: All data related to traditional Siddha medical practices in Tamil Nadu will be documented through the Thanjavur Tamil University.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டிலுள்ள பாரம்பரிய சித்த மருத்துவ முறைகள் குறித்த அனைத்துத் தரவுகளும் தஞ்சாவூர் தமிழ்ப் பல்கலைக்கழகத்தின் மூலம் ஆவணப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 32
impact_mechanism: Preserves and systematizes traditional medical knowledge by creating a permanent, accessible digital and physical archive.

promise_components.component: Document all traditional Siddha medical practices via Thanjavur Tamil University.
promise_components.analysis: This is a research and documentation project. Costs would include salaries for researchers, travel, and publication/digitization. The scale of the project and associated costs cannot be estimated from the provided data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is likely a modest project grant to an existing university, but no figures are available.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative addresses the potential loss of traditional knowledge by creating a permanent, documented corpus. The output is a lasting resource for researchers and practitioners.
coverage_gap_note: The immediate material benefit to the general public is indirect; it primarily serves academic and practitioner communities.

promise_text_en: A 'Drug Information Center' will be created for the public to share information about drug sellers and users, in order to identify offenders and ensure they receive swift punishment.
promise_text_ta: போதைப்பொருள் சம்பந்தப்பட்ட குற்றங்களில் ஈடுபடுவோரை அடையாளம் கண்டு உரிய தண்டனையை விரைந்து பெற்றுத் தரும் வகையில், போதைப் பொருள் விற்பனை செய்வோர், பயன்படுத்துவோர் குறித்த தகவல்களைப் பொதுமக்கள் பகிர்வதற்கு 'போதைப் பொருள் தகவல் மையம்' உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 32
impact_mechanism: Creates a centralized public reporting system to improve law enforcement's ability to identify and act against drug trafficking and use.

promise_components.component: Create a 'Drug Information Center' for the public to report information on drug sellers and users.
promise_components.analysis: This requires setting up a communication platform (e.g., call center, app) and administrative staff to process tips. The cost for IT and personnel is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is likely a small, recurring operational expense for a new administrative unit.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a law enforcement tool that reacts to the symptoms of the drug problem (selling and using). It does not address the underlying socioeconomic or mental health reasons that drive drug abuse and trade.
coverage_gap_note: This focuses on punishment and does not include provisions for the rehabilitation of users or prevention programs.

promise_text_en: 'Hospice Care' centers will be established at the regional level for immobile patients suffering from incurable diseases.
promise_text_ta: தீரா நோய்களால் பாதிக்கப்பட்டு நடமாட இயலாத நிலையில் உள்ளவர்களுக்கு ‘பராமரிப்பு மற்றும் சிகிச்சை மையம்' (Hospice Care) மண்டல அளவில் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 32
impact_mechanism: Fills a gap in the public healthcare system by providing specialized end-of-life palliative care for patients with terminal illnesses.

promise_components.component: Establish regional 'Hospice Care' centers for immobile patients with incurable diseases.
promise_components.analysis: This requires capital investment for facilities and recurring expenditure for specialized medical staff and operations. The number of 'regional' centers, their capacity, and the number of potential beneficiaries are not specified in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is highly dependent on the number and scale of the centers, which is undefined. It would involve significant capital and recurring costs.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a new and permanent tier of healthcare infrastructure to address the unmet need for palliative and end-of-life care. It is a structural addition to the state's health services.
coverage_gap_note: The service is limited to immobile patients with incurable diseases, excluding others who may need palliative care.

promise_text_en: To ensure dialysis treatment is available to all in need, the number of dialysis machines in government hospitals from the district to the taluk level will be doubled from the current number.
promise_text_ta: மாவட்டங்கள் முதல் வட்டங்கள் வரையிலான அரசு மருத்துவமனைகளில் டயாலிசிஸ் சிகிச்சைக்கான வசதிகள், தேவைப்படும் அனைவருக்கும் கிடைத்திடும் வகையில், டயாலிசிஸ் கருவிகளின் எண்ணிக்கை தற்போதுள்ள நிலையில் இருந்து இரண்டு மடங்காக உயர்த்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 32
impact_mechanism: Increases the availability of life-saving dialysis treatment within the public hospital system, reducing travel time and waiting lists for patients.

promise_components.component: Double the number of dialysis machines in government hospitals from district to taluk level.
promise_components.analysis: The promise is to double the current number of machines. The reference data does not contain the current number of machines, so the total number to be procured and the associated cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on the current number of machines and the unit cost for new machines plus recurring operational expenses, none of which are in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This expands treatment capacity for kidney failure, providing critical relief to patients. However, it treats the disease's outcome rather than its root causes, such as diabetes and hypertension.
coverage_gap_note: This is a treatment-focused measure and does not include preventative healthcare to reduce the incidence of kidney disease.

promise_text_en: To ensure everyone has healthy vision, eye check-up camps will be conducted and necessary spectacles will be provided to those in need. This scheme will be implemented as part of the 'Nalam Kaakkum Stalin' program.
promise_text_ta: கண்ணொளி மீட்போம்: அனைவரும் நலமான கண்பார்வையுடன் திகழ்வதை உறுதிசெய்யும் பொருட்டு, கண்பரிசோதனை முகாம்கள் நடத்தப்பட்டு, தேவைப்படுவோருக்கு உரிய கண்ணாடி வழங்கப்படும். நலம் காக்கும் ஸ்டாலின் திட்டத்தின் ஒரு பகுதியாக இத்திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
scheme_name: கண்ணொளி மீட்போம், நலம் காக்கும் ஸ்டாலின் திட்டம்
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 32
impact_mechanism: Directly improves quality of life, education, and employability by correcting refractive errors in vision for a broad population.

promise_components.component: Conduct eye check-up camps and provide free spectacles to those in need.
promise_components.analysis: This involves the operational cost of conducting camps and the procurement cost of spectacles. The number of beneficiaries ('those in need') and the unit cost per person are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The total cost depends on the number of beneficiaries and the unit cost for check-ups and spectacles, which are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: For an individual with a refractive error, providing spectacles is a permanent solution that removes a structural barrier to learning and work. It directly fixes the problem for the recipient.
coverage_gap_note: The program does not cover more complex eye conditions that require surgical intervention, such as cataracts.

promise_text_en: To raise public awareness about diabetes, manufacturers will be required to mention the calorie value on all sweets and beverages sold in Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில் விற்கப்படும் இனிப்பு வகைகள், பானங்கள் ஆகியவற்றில் கலோரி மதிப்பைக் குறிப்பிட வேண்டும் எனத் தயாரிப்பாளர்களுக்கு வலியுறுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 32
impact_mechanism: Empowers consumers to make healthier dietary choices by mandating the disclosure of calorie information at the point of sale.

promise_components.component: Require manufacturers to mention calorie value on all sweets and beverages sold in Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory measure, not a spending program. The cost to the government is minimal, related to drafting and enforcing the rule. The cost is borne by producers.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This is a regulatory policy with negligible direct fiscal cost to the state government.
sustainability_reasoning: This permanently changes the information environment for consumers, addressing the lack of information that contributes to unhealthy diets. It is a structural change in market regulation.
coverage_gap_note: The rule may not cover unpackaged or informally sold food items, where consumption can be high.

promise_text_en: A rabies vaccination program will be implemented for frontline workers who have a high risk of being affected by stray dog bites.
promise_text_ta: தெருநாய்க் கடியால் பாதிப்படையும் வாய்ப்பு அதிகம் உள்ள முன்களப் பணியாளர்களுக்கு ரேபிஸ் தடுப்பூசித் திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 32
impact_mechanism: Reduces the risk of a fatal disease for a specific group of high-risk government and municipal workers through preventative vaccination.

promise_components.component: Implement a rabies vaccination program for frontline workers at high risk of stray dog bites.
promise_components.analysis: This requires identifying the target group and procuring vaccines. The number of 'frontline workers' and the cost of a rabies vaccination course are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The total cost depends on the number of workers identified and the unit cost of vaccination, which are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides essential protection to a high-risk group but does not address the root cause of the risk: the large population of unmanaged and unvaccinated stray dogs.
coverage_gap_note: This program does not protect the general public from stray dog bites or address the animal-level rabies control problem.

promise_text_en: Organ transplant centers in government medical college hospitals will be upgraded.
promise_text_ta: அரசு மருத்துவக் கல்லூரி மருத்துவமனைகளில் உள்ள உறுப்பு மாற்று அறுவைச் சிகிச்சைக்கான மையங்கள் தரம் உயர்த்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 32
impact_mechanism: Enhances the state's public health capacity to perform complex, life-saving surgeries by investing in advanced medical infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Upgrade organ transplant centers in government medical college hospitals.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital investment in existing facilities. The specific nature of the 'upgrade' (e.g., equipment, labs, staff training) and the number of centers are not defined, so the cost cannot be estimated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost would be a significant capital expenditure, but the scope of the upgrade is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a permanent upgrade to the state's healthcare infrastructure. It builds lasting capacity within the public system to provide advanced medical procedures.
coverage_gap_note: Upgrading centers does not address the primary constraint in organ transplantation, which is the severe shortage of donated organs.

promise_text_en: A 'Suicide Prevention Policy' will be formulated in order to reduce deaths by suicide in Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில் தற்கொலைகளால் ஏற்படும் உயிரிழப்புகளைக் குறைக்கும் விதமாக 'தற்கொலை தவிர்ப்புக் கொள்கை' உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 33
impact_mechanism: Creates a guiding framework for coordinated, multi-departmental action to address the complex root causes of suicide.

promise_components.component: Formulate a 'Suicide Prevention Policy'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise to create a policy document. It does not commit to any specific program or expenditure. The cost of drafting the policy itself is negligible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of formulating a policy is minimal. The fiscal impact of the measures eventually proposed in the policy is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: A policy provides a formal, long-term framework for addressing a complex social issue. It guides sustained action across various sectors like health, education, and social welfare, making it a structural intervention.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is only to create a policy document; it does not guarantee any specific actions, funding, or implementation.

promise_text_en: Advanced Diagnostic Labs will be established, initially in Chennai and Madurai, to perform high-cost, high-tech analyses. These labs will be made accessible at a low cost to patients from both government and private hospitals.
promise_text_ta: உயர்தொழில்நுட்பம் கொண்டு மேற்கொள்ள வேண்டிய அதிகச் செலவு ஏற்படும் பகுப்பாய்வுகளை மேற்கொள்ள சிறப்பு ஆய்வகங்கள் (Advanced Diagnostic Labs) சென்னை மற்றும் மதுரையில் முதற்கட்டமாகத் தொடங்கப்படும். அரசு மருத்துவமனைகளில் சிகிச்சை பெறுவோர் மட்டுமின்றி தனியார் மருத்துவமனையில் சிகிச்சை பெறுவோரும் இந்த ஆய்வகங்களைக் குறைந்த செலவில் பயன்படுத்திக் கொள்ள வழிவகை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 33
impact_mechanism: This improves public healthcare by providing subsidized access to expensive diagnostic tests, reducing out-of-pocket expenditure for patients.

promise_components.component: Establish Advanced Diagnostic Labs in Chennai and Madurai.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to establish and equip two high-tech labs is not specified. Data on capital and operational expenditure is unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Make services accessible at low cost to patients from government and private hospitals.
promise_components.analysis: The required subsidy per test or the projected number of patients is not provided. The total annual cost of the subsidy is unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_text_en: As part of the 'Paadham Paadhukappom' (Protecting Feet) scheme, which is a component of the 'Makkalai Thedi Maruthuvam' program, appropriate footwear will be provided to beneficiary patients.
promise_text_ta: மக்களைத் தேடி மருத்துவம் திட்டத்தின் ஒரு பகுதியாக செயல்படுத்தப்படும் பாதம் பாதுகாப்போம் திட்டத்தில் பயன்பெறும் நோயாளிகளுக்கு உரிய காலணிகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
scheme_name: பாதம் பாதுகாப்போம் திட்டம், மக்களைத் தேடி மருத்துவம்
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 33
impact_mechanism: This provides a preventative health benefit to at-risk patients by supplying medical-grade footwear to prevent complications.

promise_text_en: 'Integrated Mental Health Development Centers' will be established in all districts, staffed with psychiatrists and counselors. These centers will provide various mental health services for all age groups, including mental health promotion, stress management counseling, and tele-counseling services.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களிலும் மனநல மருத்துவர் மற்றும் மனநல ஆற்றுப்படுத்துநர்கள் நியமிக்கப்பட்டு, ஒருங்கிணைந்த மனநல மேம்பாட்டு மையங்கள் தொடங்கப்படும். இத்தகைய மையங்கள் மூலமாக, இளம் பருவத்தினர் முதல் முதியவர்கள் வரை, அனைத்து வயதினருக்கும் தேவையான மனநல மேம்பாட்டிற்கான ஆலோசனைகள்; மன உளைச்சல் மேலாண்மைக்கான ஆற்றுப்படுத்துதல் சேவைகள்; தொலைபேசி வழி ஆற்றுப்படுத்துதல் சேவை (Tele Counselling Service) உள்ளிட்ட பல்வேறு மனநலச் சேவைகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 33
impact_mechanism: This builds a foundational public mental healthcare system by establishing accessible, professionally-staffed centers in every district.

promise_components.component: Establish 'Integrated Mental Health Development Centers' in all districts.
promise_components.analysis: The number of districts in Tamil Nadu is not provided in the reference data. The capital cost to establish one center and the recurring salary costs for psychiatrists and counselors are also unavailable. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. The number of centers to be built and the cost per center (both capital and operational) are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a major structural deficit in the public health system by creating permanent infrastructure for mental healthcare. It builds long-term capacity to provide essential services that are currently lacking.

promise_text_en: Palliative and Geriatric care units will be started in all government medical college hospitals.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்து அரசு மருத்துவக் கல்லூரி மருத்துவமனைகளிலும் Palliative and Geriatric care பிரிவுகள் துவங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 33
impact_mechanism: This institutionalizes specialized care for the elderly and terminally ill within the public hospital system.

promise_components.component: Start Palliative and Geriatric care units in all government medical college hospitals.
promise_components.analysis: The number of government medical college hospitals in Tamil Nadu is not available in the reference data. The cost to establish and staff each unit is also not specified. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

sustainability_reasoning: This builds permanent, specialized capacity within existing state infrastructure to address the growing healthcare needs of an aging population and those requiring end-of-life care. It is a long-term enhancement of the public health system.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to patients who can access government medical college hospitals, excluding those in areas without such facilities.

promise_text_en: A new scheme named "Illatharasi" will be implemented. Under this scheme, homemakers from non-income-tax-paying families will receive a coupon worth ₹8,000 each to purchase new home appliances like refrigerators, washing machines, TVs, grinders, etc., or to replace existing ones, from shops in their localities.
promise_text_ta: இல்லத்தரசிகள் தம் வீட்டில் பயன்படுத்தும் ஃபிரிட்ஜ், வாஷிங் மெஷின், டி.வி., கிரைண்டர், மிக்சி, மைக்ரோவேவ் மற்றும் மின் அடுப்புகள் போன்ற வீட்டு உபயோகப் பொருட்களைப் புதிதாக வாங்கவோ அல்லது ஏற்கனவே பயன்படுத்திவரும் இத்தகைய பொருட்களுக்கு மாற்றாக வாங்கவோ, “இல்லத்தரசி” என்ற புதிய திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்படும். இத்திட்டத்தின்கீழ், வருமான வரி செலுத்தாத குடும்பங்களின் இல்லத்தரசிகள் அனைவருக்கும், அவர்கள் வசிக்கும் பகுதிகளில் உள்ள கடைகளிலேயே மேற்கூறிய வீட்டு உபயோகப் பொருட்களை வாங்கிக் கொள்ளும் வகையில் ஒவ்வொரு குடும்பத்திற்கும் தலா 8 ஆயிரம் ரூபாய் கூப்பன் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 35
impact_mechanism: This provides a one-time significant capital good transfer to a majority of households, improving living standards and reducing domestic labor.

promise_components.component: Provide a one-time ₹8,000 coupon to homemakers from non-income-tax-paying families for home appliances.
promise_components.analysis: The number of non-income-tax-paying families is not specified. Using the number of ration-card households as a proxy (2.0 crore), the one-time cost would be: ₹8,000 × 2.0 crore households = ₹16,000 crore.

fiscal_cost_note: Estimated one-time cost is ₹16,000 crore, which is approximately 12.3% of the state's discretionary budget of ₹1.3 lakh crore. This represents a significant, stressed expenditure for a single year.
sustainability_reasoning: The scheme provides a valuable asset that improves quality of life, which is a genuine relief. However, it is a one-time transfer and does not alter the household's underlying income-generating capacity or economic status.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes homemakers in households that pay income tax.

promise_text_en: The monthly assistance under the Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam (Kalaignar Women's Rights Grant) will be increased from ₹1,000 to ₹2,000.
promise_text_ta: கலைஞர் மகளிர் உரிமைத்தொகை மாதம் ஆயிரம் ரூபாயில் இருந்து 2000 ரூபாயாக உயர்த்தி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 35
impact_mechanism: This increases the disposable income of beneficiary women through a larger direct cash transfer, providing greater financial relief.

promise_components.component: Increase monthly assistance under Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam from ₹1,000 to ₹2,000.
promise_components.analysis: The increase is ₹1,000 per beneficiary per month. The number of beneficiaries of this specific scheme is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total annual cost increase (₹12,000 × number of beneficiaries) cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. Without the number of current beneficiaries, the total fiscal impact of doubling the monthly payout cannot be determined.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a direct cash transfer that alleviates financial hardship and boosts consumption. While providing significant relief, it is a welfare measure that manages the symptom of poverty, not its root causes like lack of skills or jobs.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes all women who do not meet the existing eligibility criteria for the scheme.

promise_text_en: The monthly assistance provided to female students under the Pudhumai Penn scheme, which encourages women's higher education, will be increased from ₹1,000 to ₹1,500.
promise_text_ta: பெண்கள் உயர்கல்வி பெறுவதை ஊக்குவிக்கும் புதுமைப்பெண் திட்டத்தின்கீழ் மாதந்தோறும் மாணவியருக்கு வழங்கப்பட்டு வரும் ரூ. 1000 உதவித்தொகை, ரூ. 1500 ஆக உயர்த்தி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 35
impact_mechanism: This strengthens the incentive for women from government schools to pursue higher education by increasing financial support.

promise_components.component: Increase monthly assistance under the Pudhumai Penn scheme from ₹1,000 to ₹1,500.
promise_components.analysis: The increase is ₹500 per beneficiary per month. The number of female students currently enrolled in this scheme is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total annual cost increase (₹6,000 × number of beneficiaries) cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. The number of student beneficiaries is unknown, so the total additional expenditure cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: By making higher education more affordable, the scheme directly invests in women's human capital. This leads to better employment, higher future earnings, and greater economic independence, addressing a root cause of gender inequality.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes female students who did not complete their schooling in government schools.

promise_text_en: Women who are members of Self-Help Groups (SHGs) will be developed into entrepreneurs. To help them start businesses, collateral-free bank loans with subsidies will be provided for investments up to ₹5 lakh. This aims to create at least 3 lakh rural women entrepreneurs, and all necessary assistance for marketing their products will be provided.
promise_text_ta: சுயஉதவிக்குழு உறுப்பினராக இருக்கும் பெண்கள், அவர்கள் தொழில்முனைவோராக உருவாக்கப்படுவர். தொழில் முனைவோர்களாக முன்னேறும் வகையில் 5 லட்சம் ரூபாய் வரை முதலீட்டுடன் தொழில் தொடங்க, மானியத்துடன் வங்கிக் கடனுதவி, பிணை எதுவுமின்றி வழங்கப்படும். இதன் மூலம் குறைந்தது 3 லட்சம் கிராமப்புறப் பெண்கள் தொழில் முனைவோராக உயர்வார்கள். இந்தப் புதிய பெண் தொழில்முனைவோர் உற்பத்தி செய்யும் பொருட்களைச் சந்தைப்படுத்தத் தேவையான அனைத்து உதவிகளும் செய்து தரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 35
impact_mechanism: This aims to transform women from wage-earners to business owners by providing access to significant entrepreneurial capital.

promise_components.component: Provide collateral-free bank loans with subsidies up to ₹5 lakh for SHG women, targeting 3 lakh entrepreneurs.
promise_components.analysis: This is a bank-led credit scheme. The total loan disbursal could be up to 3 lakh women × ₹5 lakh = ₹15,000 crore, which is bank capital, not state funds. The cost to the state is the unspecified subsidy amount and any potential credit guarantee for defaults. This cost is unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. The state's direct fiscal liability from subsidies and potential credit guarantees is not defined. The primary funding mechanism is through bank loans, not the state budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative attempts to create a new class of women entrepreneurs by removing the primary barrier of access to capital. If successful, it creates sustainable, independent livelihoods and assets, which is a fundamental economic shift.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes women who are not members of Self-Help Groups.

promise_text_en: Women's Self-Help Groups (SHGs) will be provided with training in modern production methods. A Common Facility Centre equipped with modern machinery will be established in each district, allowing trained women entrepreneurs to bring raw materials and convert them into marketable finished products.
promise_text_ta: மகளிர் சுயஉதவிக் குழுக்களுக்கு நவீன உற்பத்தி முறை பயிற்சிகள் வழங்கப்படும். ஒரு பொதுநல மையத்தில் (Common Facility Centre) நவீனக் கருவிகள் கொள்முதல் செய்யப்பட்டு, மூலப்பொருட்களை விற்பனை செய்யத்தக்க முழுமையான பொருட்களாக மாற்றி எடுத்துச் செல்லும் வசதி ஒவ்வொரு மாவட்டத்திலும் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 36
impact_mechanism: This builds shared productive infrastructure to help women's micro-enterprises scale up, improve quality, and become more competitive.

promise_components.component: Establish a Common Facility Centre with modern machinery in each district for SHGs.
promise_components.analysis: The number of districts in Tamil Nadu is not provided in the reference data. The capital cost for establishing and equipping one such center is also not specified. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. The number of centers and the cost per center are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of stagnation in micro-enterprises: the lack of access to expensive technology and machinery. By creating shared infrastructure, it enables economies of scale and quality improvement, fostering sustainable business growth.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to SHGs that are geographically close enough to utilize the district-level centers.

promise_text_en: Outstanding women entrepreneurs from various industries will be selected and honored with the Chief Minister's Award annually.
promise_text_ta: பல்வேறு வகையான தொழில்களில் சிறந்து விளங்கிடும் பெண் தொழில்முனைவோர் தேர்வு செய்யப்பட்டு ஆண்டுதோறும் முதலமைச்சர் விருது வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 36
impact_mechanism: This provides public recognition and encouragement to successful women entrepreneurs, serving as a motivational tool.

promise_components.component: Honor outstanding women entrepreneurs with the Chief Minister's Award annually.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of an award scheme (prize money, event costs) is typically minimal and would be absorbed within existing departmental budgets. The financial impact is negligible.

fiscal_cost_note: The fiscal cost is negligible, likely less than 0.001% of the discretionary budget. This is highly feasible.
sustainability_reasoning: While positive for morale and visibility, an award does not provide capital, skills, or market access. It is a form of political signalling and recognition, not a tool for structural economic change.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits only the handful of women selected for the award each year.

promise_text_en: Over the next 5 years, bank loans totaling ₹2 lakh crore will be provided to the approximately 5 lakh Self-Help Groups in rural and urban areas.
promise_text_ta: கிராமங்களிலும், நகர்ப்புறங்களிலும் உள்ள சுமார் 5 லட்சம் சுயஉதவிக் குழுக்களுக்கு, அடுத்த 5 ஆண்டுகளில் 2 லட்சம் கோடி அளவிலான வங்கிக் கடன்கள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 36
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to boost SHG businesses by facilitating a large volume of credit through the banking system.

promise_components.component: Provide bank loans totaling ₹2 lakh crore to ~5 lakh Self-Help Groups over 5 years.
promise_components.analysis: This implies an annual loan disbursement target of ₹40,000 crore (₹2 lakh crore / 5 years). The beneficiaries are the ~4.7 lakh SHGs (comprising ~63 lakh women) in the state. As these are loans, not grants, the direct fiscal cost is not the principal amount but any associated interest subvention or credit guarantee, the details of which are not specified. Therefore, a direct cost to the exchequer cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is for facilitating loans, not grants. The direct fiscal cost from potential interest subventions or guarantees is not specified and cannot be calculated from the provided data.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of business failure and stagnation for micro-enterprises: lack of access to affordable capital. By providing a credit line, it enables SHGs to invest, scale, and generate sustainable income. The success, however, depends on the business viability of the SHGs and loan repayment.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes women who are not members of Self-Help Groups.

promise_text_en: Steps will be taken to give priority to products manufactured by Self-Help Groups in government procurement.
promise_text_ta: அரசின் கொள்முதலில் சுயஉதவிக் குழுக்கள் தயாரிக்கும் பொருட்களுக்கு முன்னுரிமை அளிப்பதற்கு நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 36
impact_mechanism: This policy creates a dedicated market for SHG products within government departments, aiming to provide a stable revenue stream.

promise_components.component: Give priority to products manufactured by Self-Help Groups in government procurement.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change to create a market for products from the ~4.7 lakh SHGs. There is no direct expenditure specified. The financial impact is indirect and depends on the volume of goods procured and any price difference compared to other suppliers, for which data is unavailable.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost is associated with this policy promise. Potential indirect costs from price differentials in procurement cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a structural support system by guaranteeing a market, which is a primary challenge for small producers. A stable demand from government procurement can lead to consistent income and business planning for SHGs. It moves beyond subsidies to market integration.
coverage_gap_note: Only benefits SHGs that produce goods or services required by government departments.

promise_text_en: A special scheme will be implemented to encourage women to secure high-level executive jobs in private companies. A 10% wage subsidy on the salary paid to women hired in such high-paying roles will be provided as a grant to the hiring companies.
promise_text_ta: தனியார் நிறுவனங்களில் உயர் நிர்வாக வேலைவாய்ப்புகளைப் பெண்கள் பெறுவதை ஊக்குவிக்கச் சிறப்புத் திட்டம் ஒன்று செயல்படுத்தப்படும். இப்படி உயர் ஊதிய வேலைகளில் அமர்த்தப்படும் பெண்களுக்கு வழங்கப்படும் ஊதியத்தில் 10 விழுக்காடு அந்நிறுவனங்களுக்கு மானியமாக வழங்கப்படும்.

impact_mechanism: This promise incentivizes private firms to hire women in senior roles by subsidizing a portion of their salary.

promise_components.component: A 10% wage subsidy will be provided to private companies for women hired in high-level executive jobs.
promise_components.analysis: The cost depends on the number of women hired, the definition of 'high-level executive jobs', and their associated salaries. None of these variables are defined in the promise or reference data, so a cost calculation is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost cannot be calculated as the number of beneficiaries and the salary levels for 'high-paying roles' are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy attempts to address the structural issue of the 'glass ceiling' and gender disparity in corporate leadership. By providing a financial incentive, it nudges companies to alter hiring practices at senior levels. However, its effectiveness depends on company uptake and whether it leads to genuine culture change or is just a temporary, subsidy-driven hire.
coverage_gap_note: This targets a very small, elite segment of the female workforce, excluding the vast majority of working women.

sustainability_reasoning: Lack of affordable and safe childcare is a primary barrier to female labor force participation. Establishing creches directly addresses this structural problem, creating enabling infrastructure for working mothers. This is a long-term solution to improve female LFPR.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a mission statement, not a specific program with a defined budget. The cost is unquantifiable.
sustainability_reasoning: Preventing school dropouts is a foundational, structural intervention. It ensures that children acquire the basic education necessary for higher skills, better employment, and social mobility, addressing the root cause of intergenerational poverty.

sustainability_reasoning: A legal framework is a core structural component of governance and social protection. However, its impact is entirely dependent on subsequent implementation and funding.

promise_text_en: Measures will be taken to achieve a zero school dropout rate among Adi Dravidar and Tribal students. All necessary support, including training and guidance, will be provided.

promise_text_en: The "Tamil Nadu Guaranteed Pension Scheme," announced on 03.01.2026 by the Dravidian Model government, will be effectively implemented, ensuring that all retiring government employees and teachers receive 50% of their salary as pension, along with other pension benefits.

source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 48
impact_mechanism: Replaces the contribution-based pension system with a defined-benefit system for government employees, guaranteeing 50% of last salary as pension.

While providing a real benefit to them, it undermines the long-term fiscal health of the state, making it a political choice with severe negative structural consequences.

promise_text_en: We will never accept the Union government's New Education Policy, which, under the guise of reform, autocratically imposes a three-language formula and attempts to force Hindi imposition on Tamil Nadu, a state that has prospered with a two-language policy.

promise_text_en: We will continuously monitor and completely eliminate learning gaps in numeracy and literacy, ensuring 100% of students complete primary education without dropping out.

promise_text_ta: பள்ளி மாணவர்களிடையே அறிவியல் பார்வையை மேம்படுத்தத் தேவையான திட்டங்கள் உருவாக்கப்பட்டு, செயல்படுத்தப்படும். மாணவர்களிடம் கேள்வி கேட்கும் திறன் வளர்த்தெடுக்கப்படும். மனப்பாடம் செய்யும் முறை மாற்றப்பட்டு, அறிந்து தெளியும் முறை வளர்த்தெடுக்கப்படும்.

impact_mechanism: Attempts to fundamentally reform teaching and learning by shifting pedagogy from rote memorization to critical thinking.

promise_components.component: Replace the method of rote memorization with a method of learning with understanding.
promise_components.analysis: This is a pedagogical reform targeting the entire government school system (~89 lakh students). It has no direct, itemizable cost but implies massive, long-term investment in teacher training and examination reform. No data is available to quantify this.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This is a pedagogical goal, not a fiscally quantifiable program. The associated costs for training and reform are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets the very foundation of the learning process. Successfully changing the dominant pedagogical method from rote learning to conceptual understanding would be a permanent, systemic, and transformative reform of the entire education system.

promise_text_en: We will foster the scientific talents of students to create young scientists. Steps will be taken to obtain patents for their inventions.
promise_text_ta: மாணவர்களின் அறிவியல் சார்ந்த திறன்களை ஊக்குவித்து இளம் அறிவியலாளர்களை உருவாக்குவோம். அவர்களின் கண்டுபிடிப்புகளுக்குக் காப்புரிமை பெற நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 54
impact_mechanism: Encourages scientific excellence by identifying talented students and supporting their inventions through the patent process.

promise_components.component: Foster the scientific talents of students to create young scientists.
promise_components.analysis: This is an aspirational goal with no specified program or budget.

promise_components.component: Take steps to obtain patents for their inventions.
promise_components.analysis: The number of potential patents is unknown, and the cost per patent is not provided. The total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The promise is aspirational and lacks quantifiable details on program costs or the number of patents to be filed.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise focuses on a high-visibility, narrow outcome (patents for a few) rather than improving foundational science education for all. It serves primarily as political signalling of a pro-science stance with no clear, scalable mechanism.
coverage_gap_note: This initiative focuses on a very small cohort of high-achieving students, offering no benefit to the majority.

promise_text_en: Funds will be raised through the 'Namma Ooru, Namma Palli' scheme, thereby turning the attention and care of the general community towards government schools.
promise_text_ta: நம்ம ஊரு, நம்ம பள்ளித் திட்டம் வாயிலாக நிதி திரட்டப்படும். இதனால், பொதுச் சமூகத்தின் பார்வையும், அக்கறையும் அரசுப் பள்ளிகளின் மீது திரும்பும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 55
impact_mechanism: Encourages community and private financial support for government schools through a state-promoted fundraising platform.

promise_components.component: Raise funds through the 'Namma Ooru, Namma Palli' scheme to turn community attention towards government schools.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise to promote an existing scheme that facilitates donations from alumni and the community to government schools. It does not involve new expenditure from the state budget.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state exchequer. This is a fundraising initiative, not a government expenditure program.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise repackages an existing fundraising scheme as a new commitment. It creates no new material benefit from the state and shifts the responsibility of school funding from the government to the community, making it primarily a public relations effort.
coverage_gap_note: This model can increase inequality, as schools in wealthier areas are more likely to attract larger donations.

promise_text_en: To increase interest in the Tamil language among students, competitions will be held annually. State-level winners will be awarded the Chief Minister's trophy, special cash prizes, and will be taken on an overseas tour.
promise_text_ta: மாணவர்களிடையே தமிழ்மொழி மீதான ஆர்வத்தை அதிகரிக்கும் வகையில் ஒவ்வொரு ஆண்டும் போட்டிகள் நடத்தப்படும். மாநில அளவில் வெற்றி பெறும் மாணவர்களுக்கு முதலமைச்சர் கோப்பை, சிறப்பு ரொக்கப் பரிசுடன் வெளிநாட்டுச் சுற்றுலாவும் அழைத்துச் செல்லப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 55
impact_mechanism: Promotes interest in the Tamil language through high-profile competitions and rewards for a small number of winners.

promise_components.component: Hold annual Tamil language competitions with winners receiving a trophy, special cash prizes, and an overseas tour.
promise_components.analysis: The value of the 'special cash prizes' and the cost of an 'overseas tour' are not specified. The number of winners is also not specified. The total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The value of prizes and travel costs are not specified, though the total cost is expected to be minimal relative to the state budget.
sustainability_reasoning: The material benefit is confined to a handful of winners. The program's primary function is symbolic, signalling the government's political support for the Tamil language rather than structurally improving language education for all students.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are highly concentrated on a few elite competition winners, with no direct impact on the vast majority of students.

promise_text_en: The monthly assistance provided under the Pudhumai Penn and Thamizh Pudhalvan schemes, launched to increase higher education enrollment of government school students, will be increased to ₹1,500.
promise_text_ta: பொருளாதாரத் தடையை நீக்கி அரசுப்பள்ளி மாணவ, மாணவியரின் உயர்கல்வி சேர்க்கையை அதிகரிக்கும் நோக்கில் தொடங்கப்பட்ட புதுமைப்பெண் மற்றும் தமிழ்ப்புதல்வன் திட்டத்தின்கீழ் மாதந்தோறும் வழங்கப்பட்டு வரும் உதவித்தொகை ரூ. 1,500 ஆக உயர்த்தி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 55
impact_mechanism: Reduces the financial barrier to higher education for government school students through an enhanced direct cash transfer.

promise_components.component: Increase the monthly assistance under the Pudhumai Penn and Thamizh Pudhalvan schemes to ₹1,500.
promise_components.analysis: This is an increase of ₹500 per month from the current ₹1,000. The annual cost increase per beneficiary is ₹500 × 12 = ₹6,000. The total number of beneficiaries under these schemes is not available in the reference data, so the total fiscal impact cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate total cost. The per-beneficiary increase is ₹6,000/year, but the total number of beneficiaries is not provided in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: The cash transfer provides crucial relief from the financial hardship (symptom) that prevents students from poor backgrounds from accessing higher education. However, it is a recurring welfare expenditure that does not fix the root causes of poverty itself.
coverage_gap_note: The scheme is limited to students from government schools, excluding poor students who may have attended private schools.

promise_text_en: In the next five years, laptops will be provided to 3.5 million students pursuing higher education.
promise_text_ta: அடுத்த ஐந்து ஆண்டுகளில் உயர்கல்வி பயிலும் 35 லட்சம் மாணவர்களுக்கும் மடிக்கணினி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 55
impact_mechanism: Addresses the digital divide for higher education students by providing them with a key hardware asset.

promise_components.component: Provide laptops to 3.5 million students pursuing higher education over the next five years.
promise_components.analysis: This translates to 700,000 laptops per year (3.5 million / 5). The reference data does not provide a unit cost for a laptop. Therefore, the total annual cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The annual distribution target is 700,000 units, but the cost per laptop is not specified, making a total cost estimate impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: Providing a laptop is a direct subsidy that treats a symptom of the digital divide (lack of a device). It does not address structural issues like internet connectivity, digital literacy, or quality of online content, and it requires a large, recurring capital outlay.
coverage_gap_note: The term 'higher education' may exclude students in vocational, diploma, or certificate programs.

promise_text_en: The quality of laboratories in government and government-aided colleges will be upgraded. It will be ensured that by 2030, modern laboratories worth ₹200 crore are established in all government colleges in Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: அரசு, அரசு உதவிபெறும் கல்லூரிகளில் நிறுவப்பட்டுள்ள ஆய்வகங்களின் தரம் உயர்த்தப்படும். 2030-ஆம் ஆண்டிற்குள் தமிழ்நாட்டில் உள்ள அரசுக் கல்லூரிகள் அனைத்திலும் ரூ. 200 கோடி மதிப்பீட்டில் நவீன ஆய்வகங்கள் அமைவது உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 55
impact_mechanism: Improves the quality of practical science education by providing modern equipment in government colleges.

promise_components.component: Upgrade laboratories in government and government-aided colleges with ₹200 crore by 2030.
promise_components.analysis: The promise specifies a total capital outlay of ₹200 crore. Spread over 6 years (2024-2030), the approximate annual expenditure would be ₹200 crore / 6 years = ~₹33.3 crore/year. The number of government or government-aided colleges is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Total cost is ₹200 crore. Annualized over 6 years, this is ~₹33.3 crore per year, which is approximately 0.026% of the state's discretionary budget (₹1.3 lakh crore). This is highly affordable.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a capital investment in physical infrastructure for education. Upgraded labs are a permanent asset that improves the quality of teaching and research, addressing a foundational deficit rather than providing temporary relief.
coverage_gap_note: Students in private colleges, which constitute a significant portion of the higher education system, are not covered by this promise.

promise_text_en: To drive development through education, special higher education campuses will be created in 10 backward regions of Tamil Nadu. These campuses will be equipped with facilities including model schools, industrial training institutes (ITIs), arts and science colleges, leading national-level educational institutions, hostels, and skill development centers.
promise_text_ta: கல்வியை முன்னிறுத்தி வளர்ச்சியை எட்டும் வகையில் தமிழ்நாட்டில் பின்தங்கிய 10 பகுதிகளில் உயர்கல்வி சிறப்பு வளாகங்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும். இவ்வளாகங்களில், மாதிரிப் பள்ளிகள், தொழிற்பயிற்சி நிறுவனங்கள், கலை மற்றும் அறிவியல் கல்லூரிகள், தேசிய அளவிலான முன்னணி கல்வி நிறுவனங்கள், தங்கும் விடுதிகள், திறன் பயிற்சி மையங்கள் ஆகியவை அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 56
impact_mechanism: Reduces regional inequality by creating comprehensive educational hubs in underserved areas.

promise_components.component: Create special higher education campuses in 10 backward regions.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to acquire land, construct, and staff multiple institutions (schools, ITIs, colleges, hostels) per campus is not specified. Reference data does not contain unit costs for such infrastructure. Therefore, the total cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from available data. A project of this scale, involving construction of multiple new institutions across 10 locations, would likely cost several thousand crores, representing a very large portion of the discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise aims to build permanent educational ecosystems in underserved regions. This directly tackles the root cause of regional disparities in human capital development by creating lasting infrastructure and opportunity.
coverage_gap_note: Only benefits the 10 selected backward regions, leaving out other backward areas in the state.

promise_text_en: To become a knowledge-based economy, steps will be taken to make Tamil Nadu the science capital of India by creating new organizations, providing necessary funding, and encouraging students to engage in fundamental research.
promise_text_ta: அறிவுசார் பொருளாதாரமாக உயர, அடிப்படை ஆய்வுகளில் மாணவர்கள் ஈடுபட ஊக்குவிக்கும் வகையில் புதிய அமைப்புகளை உருவாக்கி, அதற்குத் தேவையான நிதியையும் வழங்கி, இந்தியாவின் அறிவியல் தலைநகரமாகத் தமிழ்நாட்டை மாற்றுவதற்கான நடவடிக்கைகளை மேற்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 56
impact_mechanism: Signals a policy direction towards prioritizing science and research to build a knowledge economy.

promise_components.component: Take steps to make Tamil Nadu the science capital of India by creating new organizations and providing funding.
promise_components.analysis: This is an aspirational goal, not a specific commitment. The terms 'new organizations', 'necessary funding', and 'encourage students' are not quantified. No specific actions or budgets are provided, so a cost analysis is not possible. 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: No financial commitment is stated. The cost is unquantifiable as 'necessary funding' is undefined.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise lacks concrete, measurable actions, specific timelines, or funding commitments. It functions as a high-level vision statement for political signalling rather than a deliverable policy or program.
coverage_gap_note: The focus is entirely on science, potentially at the expense of arts, humanities, and social sciences.

promise_text_en: To foster research and innovation, central laboratories and Centers of Excellence for vocational education will be established. Campuses of international universities will be established in Tamil Nadu, introducing our students to international education systems.
promise_text_ta: ஆராய்ச்சியும், புதுமையும் செழிக்க மைய ஆய்வகங்களும், Center of Excellence எனும் தொழிற்கல்வி சிறப்பு மையங்களும் நிறுவப்படும். தமிழ்நாட்டில் பன்னாட்டு பல்கலைக்கழகங்களின் கல்வி வளாகங்கள் நிறுவப்பட்டு, அதன்மூலம் நம் மாணவர்களுக்குப் பன்னாட்டுக் கல்விமுறை அறிமுகம் செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 56
