impact_mechanism: Aims to enhance educational quality by establishing high-end research facilities and attracting global universities.

promise_components.component: Establish central laboratories and Centers of Excellence for vocational education.
promise_components.analysis: The number of labs or centers is not specified, and the reference data has no information on the cost of establishing such facilities. 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

promise_components.component: Establish campuses of international universities in Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: The state's financial role in this is unclear. Attracting foreign universities depends heavily on central government regulations (UGC). The cost to the state (e.g., land subsidies, incentives) is not specified. 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is unquantifiable. Establishing Centers of Excellence and incentivizing international universities would require significant, but unspecified, capital and operational expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: If realized, creating permanent, high-quality educational institutions would be a structural improvement. However, its success is contingent on many external factors, including central government policy and the willingness of international partners.
coverage_gap_note: Access to such elite and likely expensive institutions would be limited to a very small fraction of the student population.

promise_text_en: A government college will be established in every revenue taluk that currently lacks one. Similarly, an Industrial Training Institute (ITI) will be established in every revenue taluk without one, with labs meeting Industry 4.0 standards.
promise_text_ta: எந்தவொரு கல்லூரியும் இல்லாத வருவாய் வட்டத்தில் அரசுக் கல்லூரி அமைக்கப்படும். அதேபோல் தொழிற்பயிற்சி நிறுவனம் (ITI) இல்லாத வருவாய் வட்டத்திலும் தொழிற்பயிற்சி நிறுவனம் அமைக்கப்படும். இந்நிறுவனங்களில் ஆய்வகங்கள் நவீனமாகவும் Industry 4.0 தரத்திலும் நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 56
impact_mechanism: Guarantees baseline local access to higher and vocational education across the entire state.

promise_components.component: Establish a government college in every revenue taluk that currently lacks one.
promise_components.analysis: The number of revenue taluks without a government college is not available in the reference data. The cost to build and staff a new college is also unavailable. 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

promise_components.component: Establish an Industrial Training Institute (ITI) in every revenue taluk without one.
promise_components.analysis: The number of revenue taluks without an ITI is not available in the reference data. The cost to build and staff a new ITI is also unavailable. 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is unquantifiable but would be extremely high. It requires a massive, multi-year capital expenditure program for construction and recurring expenditure for staffing across potentially dozens of locations.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise creates permanent physical infrastructure to address the root cause of geographical inequality in access to education. It is a foundational change to the state's educational landscape.
coverage_gap_note: Establishing a building does not guarantee the quality of education or that the courses offered will be relevant to local employment opportunities.

promise_text_en: To encourage female education, girls' hostels will be established in every district to provide residential facilities for female students who come from rural areas to study in urban centers.
promise_text_ta: பெண் கல்வியை ஊக்குவிக்கும் வகையில் மாவட்டந்தோறும் மாணவியர் விடுதிகள்: கிராமங்களில் இருந்து நகர்ப்புறங்களுக்குக் கல்வி கற்பதற்காக வரும் மாணவிகளுக்கு உண்டு உறைவிட வசதிகளை வழங்குவதற்கான மாணவியர் விடுதிகள் மாவட்டம் தோறும் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 56
impact_mechanism: Removes a key socio-economic barrier for rural girls by providing safe and affordable accommodation to access urban education.

promise_components.component: Establish girls' hostels in every district for female students from rural areas.
promise_components.analysis: The number of districts in Tamil Nadu is not available in the reference data. The cost to construct and operate a hostel is also not available. Therefore, the total cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is unquantifiable as the number of districts and the per-hostel cost (capital and operational) are not available in the reference data. This would be a significant capital project.
sustainability_reasoning: This is not a recurring subsidy but an investment in physical infrastructure. It addresses a permanent, structural barrier—lack of safe accommodation—that prevents rural girls from pursuing higher education.
coverage_gap_note: This does not help female students from poor urban families or those studying in institutions within their own rural areas.

promise_text_en: To enhance students' learning ability and knowledge, digital learning centers with Wi-Fi facilities will be established in all government colleges.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்து அரசுக் கல்லூரிகளிலும் மாணவர்களின் கற்றல் திறனையும், அறிவாற்றலையும் மேம்படுத்தும் வகையில் Wi-Fi வசதியுடன் கூடிய டிஜிட்டல் கற்றல் மையங்கள் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 56
impact_mechanism: Reduces the digital divide by providing students in government colleges with access to online resources and connectivity.

promise_components.component: Establish digital learning centers with Wi-Fi facilities in all government colleges.
promise_components.analysis: The number of government colleges is not available in the reference data. The cost to set up and maintain a digital center (hardware, software, internet) is also not available. Therefore, the total cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is unquantifiable as the number of colleges and the per-center cost are unknown. It would involve both capital expenditure for setup and recurring expenditure for internet and maintenance.
sustainability_reasoning: Providing digital infrastructure is a foundational investment in modern education, similar to a library or laboratory. It creates a permanent asset that enhances learning capabilities for all current and future students.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is limited to government colleges, excluding students in government-aided and private institutions.

promise_text_en: 'Social Justice College Hostels' will be opened in all necessary locations.
promise_text_ta: தேவைப்படும் அனைத்து இடங்களிலும் 'சமூகநீதிக் கல்லூரி விடுதிகள்' திறக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 56
impact_mechanism: Provides targeted support for disadvantaged students by offering accommodation, enabling them to access higher education.

promise_components.component: Open 'Social Justice College Hostels' in all necessary locations.
promise_components.analysis: The promise is vague. The number of 'necessary locations' is undefined. The cost to build and operate a hostel is not in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is unquantifiable due to the undefined scope ('all necessary locations'). The potential cost is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Similar to other hostel promises, this involves creating permanent physical infrastructure. This is a structural solution to the problem of accommodation, specifically targeting students from disadvantaged backgrounds.
coverage_gap_note: The vague criterion of 'necessary locations' creates a risk of exclusion, as the selection process is not defined.

promise_text_en: In areas where colleges are located, additional bus services will be operated in the morning and evening to facilitate students' travel without congestion.
promise_text_ta: கல்லூரிகள் அமைந்துள்ள பகுதிகளில் மாணவர்கள் நெரிசலின்றிச் செல்ல வசதியாகக் காலையும், மாலையும் கூடுதல் பேருந்துகள் இயக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 56
impact_mechanism: Improves access to colleges and reduces travel time for commuting students by optimizing public transport schedules.

promise_components.component: Operate additional bus services in the morning and evening on routes with colleges.
promise_components.analysis: This is an operational change. The number of 'additional bus services' is not specified. The operational cost per bus service is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is unquantifiable but would be a recurring operational expense for state transport corporations. The scale is likely manageable within their existing budgets, rather than a major new capital outlay.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a durable improvement in public service delivery. Adjusting bus schedules to meet student demand is a systemic change in operations, not a one-time benefit or subsidy.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to students along existing bus routes and do not help those in areas with no public transport service.

promise_text_en: Special medical camps will be conducted annually for higher education students. Both physical and psychological check-ups will be performed, and necessary treatments will be provided.
promise_text_ta: உயர்கல்வி பயிலும் மாணவர்களுக்கெனச் சிறப்பு மருத்துவ முகாம்கள் ஆண்டுக்கு ஒருமுறை நடத்தப்படும். உடல் ரீதியாக மட்டுமின்றி, உளவியல் ரீதியாகவும் பரிசோதனைகள் மேற்கொள்ளப்பட்டு, தேவைப்படும் சிகிச்சைகளை வழங்கவும் நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 56
impact_mechanism: Improves student welfare through early detection and treatment of physical and psychological health issues.

promise_components.component: Conduct annual special medical camps (physical and psychological) for higher education students.
promise_components.analysis: The number of higher education students is not available in the reference data. The cost per check-up and the potential cost of 'necessary treatments' are also not available. Therefore, the total cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is unquantifiable. While the cost of camps might be estimable, the open-ended commitment to provide 'necessary treatments' could lead to very large and unpredictable expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise provides a recurring service to detect and treat health problems. While beneficial, it addresses the symptoms (illness) rather than the root causes of poor student health, such as nutrition, stress, or lifestyle.
coverage_gap_note: The scope of 'higher education' is not defined; it may or may not include students in polytechnics, ITIs, or other vocational courses.

promise_text_en: Female college students will be screened for anemia, and appropriate treatment will be provided to those who need it.
promise_text_ta: கல்லூரி மாணவிகளுக்கு இரத்தசோகை பரிசோதனை செய்யப்பட்டு தேவைப்படுவோருக்கு உரிய சிகிச்சை அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 57
impact_mechanism: Improves health outcomes for young women, which can enhance educational attainment and future productivity, by directly screening and treating anemia.

promise_components.component: Screening of female college students for anemia.
promise_components.analysis: The number of female college students is not available in the reference data. The cost per screening is also not available. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Provision of appropriate treatment for those diagnosed with anemia.
promise_components.analysis: The prevalence of anemia among the target group and the cost of treatment per person are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The total cost cannot be estimated as the number of beneficiaries, prevalence rates, and per-unit costs for screening and treatment are not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a necessary health intervention that provides relief from a specific medical condition. However, it treats the symptom (anemia) rather than addressing its root causes, such as poor nutrition, which may be linked to economic or social factors.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes women who are not in college, as well as school-aged girls, who may also have high rates of anemia.

promise_text_en: Through 'Naan Mudhalvan 2.0', additional skill training will be provided, enabling our youth to compete globally.
promise_text_ta: 'நான் முதல்வன் 2.0' மூலம் கூடுதல் திறன் பயிற்சிகள் வழங்கப்பட்டு, உலகளவில் நம் இளைஞர்கள் போட்டியிட வழிவகுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 57
impact_mechanism: Increases youth employability and earning potential by providing specific, in-demand skills for the global job market.

promise_components.component: Provide additional skill training through 'Naan Mudhalvan 2.0'.
promise_components.analysis: This is an expansion of an existing scheme. The promise lacks specifics on the number of additional beneficiaries or the cost per student for the new training modules. Therefore, the incremental cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise of 'additional' training does not provide specific financial or beneficiary targets, making a cost estimate impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative addresses the structural gap between academic education and industry requirements. By building human capital with relevant skills, it creates a long-term asset for the state's economy and improves individual income prospects.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to youth within the formal education system targeted by the scheme, potentially excluding those already in the workforce or unemployed.

promise_text_en: Opportunities will be created for higher education students to learn languages useful for global employment, such as German, French, Korean, Mandarin, and Japanese, based on their interests.
promise_text_ta: உயர்கல்வி பயிலும் மாணவர்களுக்கு அவர்கள் விருப்பத்திற்கேற்ப ஜெர்மன், பிரெஞ்சு, கொரியன், மேண்டரின், ஜப்பானிய மொழி உள்ளிட்ட உலக அளவில் வேலைவாய்ப்பைப் பெறுவதற்குப் பயன்படும் மொழிகளைப் பயில்வதற்கான வாய்ப்புகள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 57
impact_mechanism: Enhances the global competitiveness of students by adding valuable foreign language skills to their professional profiles.

promise_components.component: Create opportunities for higher education students to learn languages like German, French, Korean, Mandarin, and Japanese.
promise_components.analysis: The number of higher education students who would opt for these courses is unknown. The cost of hiring qualified instructors and developing curriculum is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is dependent on student uptake and the delivery model (e.g., online, in-person), for which no data is available.
sustainability_reasoning: This is an investment in human capital that addresses a specific skill gap for global employment. Adding language proficiency is a structural enhancement to a student's qualifications, providing a lasting advantage in the job market.
coverage_gap_note: The benefit is self-selected and limited to higher education students with an interest in these specific languages and career paths.

promise_text_en: In the next 5 years, to train youth in modern technologies like Mechatronics, Advanced CNC, and Electric Vehicles, new Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs) and new trades will be started, and the student intake in government ITIs will be doubled from 35,000 to 70,000.
promise_text_ta: அடுத்த 5 ஆண்டுகளில் இளைஞர்களுக்கு Mechatronics, Electronic Mechanic, Advanced CNC, Robotic Welding, Electric Vehicle, Green Energy உள்ளிட்ட நவீனத் தொழில்நுட்பங்களில் பயிற்சியளிக்க புதிய தொழிற்பயிற்சி நிறுவனங்களும் (ITI), புதிய தொழிற்பிரிவுகளும் தொடங்கி அரசு தொழிற்பயிற்சி நிறுவனங்களில் மாணவர் சேர்க்கை இடங்களின் எண்ணிக்கை 35,000 இல் இருந்து 70,000 ஆக இரட்டிப்பாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 57
impact_mechanism: Expands the state's vocational training capacity to meet rising industry demand for youth skilled in modern technologies.

promise_components.component: Double student intake in government ITIs from 35,000 to 70,000 over 5 years.
promise_components.analysis: The promise specifies an increase of 35,000 students. However, the reference data does not contain the capital cost for new ITIs or the operational cost per ITI student. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. While the target of 35,000 additional students is clear, the per-student capital and operational expenditure for high-tech ITIs is not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a direct investment in physical and human capital infrastructure for vocational training. It structurally addresses the mismatch between the skills of the workforce and the needs of new-age industries, which is a root cause of unemployment.
coverage_gap_note: Focuses on specific modern trades, which may not cover the full spectrum of skills needed in the broader economy.

promise_text_en: Appropriate measures will be taken to ensure all students who complete their schooling pursue college education. Institutional infrastructure will be expanded to achieve a Gross Enrolment Ratio of 90% in higher education by 2030.
promise_text_ta: பள்ளிப் படிப்பை முடிக்கும் அனைத்து மாணவர்களும் கல்லூரிப் படிப்பை மேற்கொள்ள உரிய நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும். 2030-ஆம் ஆண்டிற்குள் உயர்கல்வியில் மொத்த சேர்க்கை விகிதம் 90 விழுக்காட்டை எட்டும் வகையில், நிறுவனக் கட்டமைப்பு விரிவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 57
impact_mechanism: Aims for near-universal higher education access by expanding institutional capacity and ensuring a pathway for all school-leavers.

promise_components.component: Expand institutional infrastructure to achieve a Gross Enrolment Ratio (GER) of 90% in higher education by 2030.
promise_components.analysis: This is a high-level policy goal. The current GER, the number of additional students required to reach 90% GER, and the per-student cost of creating new higher education capacity are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is a long-term vision with massive, unquantified capital and operational costs that cannot be estimated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: Achieving this goal requires a fundamental, long-term expansion of the state's educational infrastructure. It addresses the root cause of limited access to higher education, which is a primary barrier to social mobility and economic development.
coverage_gap_note: The goal of 'all' students pursuing college may overlook the needs and preferences of those better suited for vocational training or immediate employment.

promise_text_en: To counter the trend of job reduction due to Artificial Intelligence, programs will be implemented to train all higher education students in that field, turning them into AI-skilled graduates.
promise_text_ta: செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவால் வேலைவாய்ப்புகள் குறையும் என்ற நிலையை மாற்றிடும் வகையில், உயர்கல்வி பயிலும் அனைத்து மாணவர்களுக்கும் அந்தத் துறையில் பயிற்சியளித்து, செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவுத் திறன் பெற்ற மாணாக்கர்களாக அவர்களை உருவாக்குவதற்கான திட்டங்கள் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 57
impact_mechanism: Future-proofs the graduate workforce by equipping all higher education students with foundational skills in Artificial Intelligence.

promise_components.component: Implement programs to train all higher education students in Artificial Intelligence.
promise_components.analysis: The promise targets 'all' higher education students, but the total number of such students is not in the reference data. The cost to develop curriculum, train faculty, and deliver AI education at this scale is also unavailable. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The scale is universal for higher education students, but the per-student cost and total number of beneficiaries are unknown, making estimation impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a forward-looking structural investment in human capital. It proactively addresses a future skills gap that will be created by technological disruption, aiming to make the entire graduate pool more resilient and competitive.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes the existing workforce and those not in higher education, who are also vulnerable to job disruption from AI.

promise_text_en: To engage in new fields like Quantum Computing and Life Science, students must gain proficiency in basic sciences. With this in mind, programs will be designed to attract students to basic science subjects like Biology, Chemistry, and Physics.
promise_text_ta: மாறிவரும் சூழலில் Quantum Computing, Life Science போன்ற புதிய துறைகளில் ஈடுபடுவதற்கான அடிப்படை அறிவியலில் தேர்ச்சி பெற வேண்டும். இதனைக் கவனத்தில் கொண்டு உயிரியல், வேதியியல், இயற்பியல் போன்ற அடிப்படை அறிவியல் பாடப்பரிவுகளில் மாணவர்களை ஈர்ப்பதற்கான திட்டங்கள் வகுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 57
impact_mechanism: Strengthens the pipeline for future scientific research and innovation by encouraging more students to enter foundational science fields.

promise_components.component: Design programs to attract students to basic science subjects like Biology, Chemistry, and Physics.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of intent without specific, measurable actions. The nature of the 'programs' (e.g., scholarships, lab upgrades, outreach) is not defined, and there are no financial or enrollment targets. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is too vague, lacking details on the specific programs to be implemented, making any cost estimation impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a potential root cause of a weak R&D ecosystem: a declining interest in basic sciences. Building a strong foundation in these fields is a structural investment in the state's long-term innovation capacity.
coverage_gap_note: As an attraction program, it does not provide a direct benefit but aims to influence student choices.

promise_text_en: Higher education students with significant sporting talent will be awarded additional Academic Credits through a flexible curriculum.
promise_text_ta: விளையாட்டு திறன்மிகு மாணவர்களுக்கு, நெகிழ்வான (Flexible) பாடத்திட்டம் மூலம் கூடுதல் கல்வி மதிப்புகள் (Academic Credits) வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 57
impact_mechanism: Allows talented athletes to pursue both sports and academics without penalty by formally recognizing their efforts within the curriculum.

promise_components.component: Award additional Academic Credits to higher education students with significant sporting talent through a flexible curriculum.
promise_components.analysis: This is an academic policy change, not a direct financial expenditure. The costs would be administrative and related to curriculum redesign, which are not quantifiable from the reference data and are expected to be minimal.

fiscal_cost_note: No significant direct fiscal cost. This is a regulatory and academic policy change with negligible financial impact on the state budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This structurally alters the academic system to accommodate the needs of high-performing athletes. It fixes a systemic conflict between rigid academic schedules and the demands of elite sports training, creating a permanent, sustainable pathway.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are tightly focused on a very small group of high-performing athletes within the higher education system.

promise_text_en: It will be ensured that every higher education student receives additional skill training tailored to their interests and abilities to secure employment.
promise_text_ta: உயர்கல்வி பெறும் மாணவர்கள் ஒவ்வொருவரின் ஆர்வம், திறன் ஆகியவற்றைக் கணக்கில் கொண்டு, அவர்கள் வேலைவாய்ப்பை பெறுவதற்கான கூடுதல் திறன் பயிற்சிகள் வழங்கப்படுவது உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 57
impact_mechanism: Aims to guarantee job-readiness for all graduates by providing universally accessible, tailored skill training.

promise_components.component: Ensure every higher education student receives additional skill training tailored to their interests and abilities.
promise_components.analysis: The promise targets 'every' higher education student, but the total number of such students is not in the reference data. The cost per student for 'additional skill training' is also not available. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The ambition is universal for this group, but with no data on beneficiary numbers or per-unit cost, a fiscal estimate is impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: This represents a fundamental change to the higher education system, embedding skill development as a core component. It addresses the structural problem of graduate unemployability by creating a permanent mechanism to bridge the skills gap.
coverage_gap_note: The focus on higher education excludes a large portion of the youth population who do not attend college but also require skill development.

promise_text_en: Programs will be created to invite researchers from Tamil Nadu working worldwide as Visiting Faculty, allowing our students to benefit from their expertise.
promise_text_ta: உலகெங்கிலும் பணிபுரிந்து வரும் தமிழ்நாட்டைச் சேர்ந்த ஆராய்ச்சியாளர்களை வருகைதரு பேராசிரியர்களாக (Visiting Faculty) வரவழைத்து, அவர்களின் திறனையும் நமது மாணவர்கள் பயன்படுத்தும் வண்ணம் திட்டங்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 58
impact_mechanism: Leverages the expertise of the global Tamil diaspora to bring cutting-edge knowledge and international perspectives to local students.

promise_components.component: Create programs to invite researchers from Tamil Nadu working worldwide as Visiting Faculty.
promise_components.analysis: The promise does not specify the number of researchers to be invited or the duration of their visits. The costs for travel, accommodation, and honorariums are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is entirely dependent on the scale of the program (number of visiting faculty), which is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a structural channel for knowledge transfer from the global diaspora to local institutions. It addresses a root problem of academic isolation by building a permanent bridge to global research networks.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits will likely be concentrated in the premier institutions that are able to attract and host these high-profile researchers.

promise_text_en: An international science conference, with the participation of global scientists, will be held once every two years.
promise_text_ta: இரண்டு ஆண்டுகளுக்கு ஒருமுறை உலகளாவிய அறிவியல் அறிஞர்களின் பங்கேற்புடன் பன்னாட்டு அறிவியல் மாநாடு நடத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 58
impact_mechanism: Exposes local scientists and students to global research trends and fosters international collaboration.

promise_components.component: An international science conference to be held once every two years.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of hosting a major international conference is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the fiscal impact is unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost data unavailable — cannot calculate. The fiscal impact is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: A conference is a periodic event, not a systemic change. While beneficial for networking and knowledge sharing, it does not alter the underlying structures of scientific research, funding, or education within the state.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to the small community of scientists and researchers able to participate.

promise_text_en: A national history seminar, with the participation of history and archaeology experts, will be held once every two years.
promise_text_ta: தேசிய வரலாற்றுக் கருத்தரங்கம், இரண்டு ஆண்டிற்கு ஒருமுறை வரலாறு மற்றும் தொல்லியல்துறை வல்லுநர்கள் பங்கேற்புடன் நடத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 58
impact_mechanism: Promotes academic discourse on history and archaeology, reinforcing state-endorsed cultural and historical narratives.

promise_components.component: A national history seminar to be held once every two years.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of organizing a national-level seminar is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the fiscal impact is unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost data unavailable — cannot calculate. The fiscal impact is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: Similar to a conference, a seminar is an event-based initiative. It provides a platform for discussion but does not create lasting change in the educational or research infrastructure for history.
coverage_gap_note: Limited to academics and experts in the fields of history and archaeology.

promise_text_en: To strengthen students' creativity, annual sports, arts, and cultural festivals will be promoted in every college in Tamil Nadu. Festivals will also be held at the district and state levels, and the best contributors will be selected and given awards.
promise_text_ta: மாணவர்களின் படைப்பூக்கம் வலுப்பெறும் வகையில், தமிழ்நாட்டின் ஒவ்வொரு கல்லூரியிலும் ஆண்டுதோறும் விளையாட்டு, கலை, பண்பாட்டு விழாக்கள் முன்னெடுக்கப்படும். மாவட்ட, மாநில அளவுகளிலும் விழாக்கள் நடத்தப்பட்டு சிறந்த பங்களிப்பாளர்கள் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டு அவர்களுக்கு விருதுகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 58
impact_mechanism: Encourages extracurricular participation and talent development among college students by creating competitive platforms.

promise_components.component: Promote annual sports, arts, and cultural festivals in every college, with district and state level events and awards.
promise_components.analysis: The number of colleges in Tamil Nadu and the cost per festival are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost data unavailable — cannot calculate. The fiscal impact is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: These festivals provide a positive outlet and valuable experiences for students, addressing a lack of extracurricular activities. However, they are recurring events that manage student life rather than altering the core curriculum or career prospects.
coverage_gap_note: This promise excludes all non-college-going youth.

promise_text_en: Festivals will be held in all colleges to highlight the antiquity, evolution, and continuous changes occurring in Tamil society.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்துக் கல்லூரிகளிலும் தமிழின் தொன்மை, பரிணாம வளர்ச்சி, தமிழ்ச் சமூகத்தில் ஏற்பட்டு வரும் தொடர் மாற்றங்கள் ஆகியவற்றை எடுத்துரைப்பதற்கான விழாக்கள் நடத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 58
impact_mechanism: Fosters cultural identity and historical awareness among college students through dedicated campus events.

promise_components.component: Hold festivals in all colleges to highlight the antiquity, evolution, and changes in Tamil society.
promise_components.analysis: The number of colleges in Tamil Nadu and the cost per festival are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost data unavailable — cannot calculate. The fiscal impact is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: This is an event-based promise focused on reinforcing a specific cultural narrative among students. It does not create a structural change in the curriculum, pedagogy, or educational outcomes.
coverage_gap_note: This promise excludes all non-college-going youth and the general public.

promise_text_en: To incorporate new, timely changes into the curriculum and teach them to students, the training provided to teachers will also be periodically updated.
promise_text_ta: பாடத்திட்டங்களில் காலத்தின் தேவைக்கேற்ப செய்யப்படும் புதிய மாற்றங்களை உள்வாங்கி மாணவர்களுக்குக் கற்பித்திடும் வகையில், ஆசிரியர்களுக்கு அளிக்கப்படும் பயிற்சிகளிலும் அவ்வப்போது மாற்றங்கள் செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 58
impact_mechanism: Improves student learning outcomes by ensuring teachers are equipped with current knowledge and pedagogical methods.

promise_components.component: Periodically update the curriculum for teacher training to incorporate new and timely changes.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy reform with costs embedded in departmental operational budgets for curriculum development. No specific new expenditure can be quantified from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted, as this is a procedural reform. Costs are likely incremental and absorbed within existing education budgets.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to build a dynamic system for continuous professional development for teachers. Improving teacher quality is a core, structural component of a high-performing education system, addressing the root cause of outdated instruction.
coverage_gap_note: The promise's success depends on the quality and reach of the training delivery, not just the curriculum update.

promise_text_en: A major scheme will be implemented to provide encouragement and assistance for a larger number of Tamil Nadu students to pass professional courses like Chartered Accountant (CA) and Company Secretary (CS).
promise_text_ta: பட்டயக் கணக்காளர் (Chartered Accountant), நிறுவனச் செயலாளர் (Company Secretary) போன்ற படிப்புகளில் அதிக எண்ணிக்கையிலான தமிழ்நாட்டு மாணவர்கள் தேர்ச்சி பெறுவதற்கான ஊக்கத்தையும், உதவிகளையும் செய்வதற்கான பெருந்திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 58
impact_mechanism: Increases the number of qualified professionals from Tamil Nadu in key corporate roles by subsidizing their expensive and difficult training.

promise_components.component: Implement a scheme to provide encouragement and assistance for students to pass professional courses like CA and CS.
promise_components.analysis: The number of CA/CS aspirants and the nature of 'assistance' (e.g., coaching fees, stipends) are not defined in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost data unavailable — cannot calculate. The fiscal impact is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: This is an investment in high-level human capital that addresses the financial and support-system barriers preventing students from entering elite professions. By creating a new pathway to upward mobility, it offers a lasting change in opportunity.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits a very small and specific group of students pursuing elite professional courses.

promise_text_en: To ensure our state university students participate in leading global research, special schemes will be implemented to encourage our students and faculty to train at foreign universities through agreements, and to encourage foreign students and faculty to train at Tamil Nadu universities.
promise_text_ta: நமது அரசுப் பல்கலைக்கழக மாணவர்கள் உலக அளவிலான முன்னணி ஆய்வுகளில் பங்கு பெறுவதை உறுதி செய்திடும் வகையில், நமது பல்கலைக் கழகங்கள் அனைத்தும் வெளிநாட்டு பல்கலைக் கழகங்களுடன் ஒப்பந்தம் செய்து நமது மாணவர்களும், ஆசிரியர்களும் அங்கு பயிற்சி பெறவும், வெளிநாட்டு மாணவர்களும் ஆசிரியர்களும் தமிழ்நாட்டு பல்கலைக் கழகங்களில் பயிற்சி பெறவும் ஊக்குவித்திடச் சிறப்புத் திட்டங்கள் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 58
impact_mechanism: Enhances the quality of research and teaching in state universities by facilitating international exposure and knowledge transfer.

promise_components.component: Implement special schemes for student and faculty exchange with foreign universities.
promise_components.analysis: The number of participants and the cost per exchange (travel, living expenses, etc.) are not defined in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost data unavailable — cannot calculate. The fiscal impact is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative addresses the root cause of academic isolation by building institutional linkages for knowledge exchange. If successful, these partnerships create a permanent, structural enhancement of the state's higher education ecosystem.
coverage_gap_note: The direct benefits are limited to a very small, elite group of students and faculty at state universities.

promise_text_en: In Tamil Nadu, five lakh students who come forward for skill training under the Naan Mudhalvan scheme after completing their higher education will be provided with 6 months of training along with a stipend of ₹1,500.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில் உயர்கல்வி முடித்தபின் நான் முதல்வன் திட்டத்தின்கீழ் திறன்பயிற்சி மேற்கொள்ள முன்வரும் ஐந்து லட்சம் மாணவர்களுக்கு 6 மாத பயிற்சி ரூ.1500 உதவித் தொகையுடன் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 59
impact_mechanism: Incentivizes post-graduate skill acquisition by offsetting a portion of the living costs incurred during the training period.

promise_components.component: Provide a stipend of ₹1,500 for 6 months to 5 lakh students undergoing skill training under the Naan Mudhalvan scheme.
promise_components.analysis: The total cost is calculated as: 5,00,000 students × ₹1,500/month × 6 months = ₹450 crore per year.

fiscal_cost_note: Estimated annual cost: ₹450 crore. This represents approximately 0.35% of the state's discretionary expenditure (₹450 cr / ₹1,30,000 cr). This is fiscally feasible.
sustainability_reasoning: The stipend is a cash transfer that treats the symptom of financial hardship during training. The sustainable impact comes from the quality of the skill training itself, not the stipend, which merely facilitates participation.
coverage_gap_note: This specific benefit is limited to those who have completed higher education, excluding other youth.

promise_text_en: By 2030, skill development training will be provided to 5 million people: 2.5 million students under Naan Mudhalvan 2.0; 500,000 unemployed youth under Vetri Nichayam 2.0; 500,000 youth through formal apprenticeship; and 1.4 million people will receive upskilling and reskilling.
promise_text_ta: 2030-ஆம் ஆண்டிற்குள் 50 இலட்சம் நபர்களுக்கு திறன் மேம்பாட்டுப் பயிற்சிகள் வழங்கப்படும்: நான் முதல்வன் 2.0 திட்டத்தின்கீழ் 25 இலட்சம் மாணவர்கள்; வெற்றி நிச்சயம் 2.0-கீழ் 5 இலட்சம் இளைஞர்கள்; 5 இலட்சம் இளைஞர்களுக்கு முறையான பணிப்பயிற்சி; 14 இலட்சம் நபர்களுக்கு திறன் மேம்பாட்டு மற்றும் மறுதிறன் பயிற்சிகள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 59
impact_mechanism: Aims to create a skilled workforce aligned with industry demands on a massive scale, tackling unemployment and underemployment.

promise_components.component: Provide skill development training to 5 million people by 2030 through various schemes.
promise_components.analysis: The promise targets skilling approximately 4.9 million people by 2030 (2.5M students + 0.5M unemployed + 0.5M apprentices + 1.4M reskilling). The cost per person for skill training is not available in the reference data, so the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost data unavailable — cannot calculate. Given the massive scale, the total cost would be substantial, but it remains uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a direct investment in the productive capacity of the population, addressing the root cause of the 'skill gap'. A skilled workforce is a durable economic asset that drives growth, making this a fundamental, long-term solution if implemented effectively.
coverage_gap_note: The success hinges entirely on the quality of training and its link to actual employment, which is not guaranteed by the numbers alone.

promise_text_en: Skill training will be provided to 100,000 people in regions including Kanchipuram, Hosur, Thoothukudi, Chennai, Coimbatore, Kallakurichi, Salem, Ariyalur, Perambalur, Madurai, Trichy, Thanjavur, and Nagai, according to the needs of growing industries.
promise_text_ta: வளர்ந்து வரும் தொழில்நிறுவனங்களின் தேவைகளுக்கு ஏற்ப காஞ்சிபுரம், ஓசூர், தூத்துக்குடி, சென்னை, கோயம்புத்தூர், கள்ளக்குறிச்சி, சேலம், அரியலூர், பெரம்பலூர், மதுரை, திருச்சி, தஞ்சை, நாகை ஆகிய பகுதிகளில் 1 இலட்சம் நபர்களுக்கு திறன் பயிற்சி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 60
impact_mechanism: Reduces local skill shortages in key industrial clusters by providing demand-driven training to the local population.

promise_components.component: Provide skill training to 100,000 people in 13 specified industrial regions, tailored to local industry needs.
promise_components.analysis: The cost per person for skill training is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost data unavailable — cannot calculate. The fiscal impact is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: By tailoring training to specific local industries, this initiative builds a self-reinforcing ecosystem where local talent feeds local growth. This is a durable solution to regional unemployment and a constraint on industrial expansion.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes people in non-industrial or rural areas not covered by the 13 specified regions.

promise_text_en: To enable college students to face the challenges of emerging technology sectors, importance will be given to their future skills needs, and accordingly, skill development curricula and training, including in Artificial Intelligence (AI), will be created.
promise_text_ta: வளர்ந்து வரும் தொழில்நுட்பத் துறையின் சவால்களைக் கல்லூரி மாணவர்கள் எதிர்கொள்ளும் வகையில், கல்லூரி மாணவர்களின் எதிர்காலத் திறன் (Future Skills) தேவைகளுக்கு முக்கியத்துவம் அளித்து, அதற்கேற்ப செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவு (AI) உள்ளிட்ட திறன் மேம்பாட்டுப் பாடத்திட்டங்களும், பயிற்சிகளும் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 60
impact_mechanism: Improves human capital by aligning college curricula with current industry demands for technology skills like Artificial Intelligence.

promise_components.component: Create new skill development curricula for college students focusing on AI and future skills.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy and curriculum development initiative. The number of college students is not available in the reference data. The cost involves expert committees and content creation, which cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Provide training based on the new curricula.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of training depends on the number of trainers, duration, and infrastructure, none of which are specified. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is a statement of policy direction for the higher education department. Costs would be part of departmental budgets and are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root cause of the skills gap between academia and industry by updating the foundational educational content. It aims to create a more relevant future workforce, which is a long-term structural improvement.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes non-college-going youth and the existing workforce who may also need upskilling.

promise_text_en: New sector-specific skill training programs will be periodically revised. Opportunities will be created for not just the youth but everyone to get trained at any time during their working life, including evening and weekend classes for those who are employed.
promise_text_ta: துறைவாரியாகப் புதிய திறன்பயிற்சித் திட்டங்கள் அவ்வப்போது மாற்றியமைக்கப்படும். இளையோர் மட்டுமின்றி அனைவரும் பணிக்காலத்தில் எப்போது வேண்டுமானாலும் பயிற்சிபெறும் வாய்ப்பு உருவாக்கப்படும். குறிப்பாக, பணியில் இருப்போருக்கு மாலை வேளைகளிலும், வார இறுதி நாட்களிலும் இப்பயிற்சிகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 60
impact_mechanism: Enhances workforce adaptability and earning potential by providing continuous upskilling opportunities throughout a person's career.

promise_components.component: Periodically revise sector-specific skill training programs and offer lifelong learning opportunities.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy to make skill training continuous and accessible to all, not just youth. The number of potential beneficiaries is the entire workforce, but participation rates are unknown.

promise_components.component: Offer training via evening and weekend classes for employed individuals.
promise_components.analysis: This requires establishing training infrastructure with flexible timings. The scale and cost are not specified. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is a broad policy goal. The fiscal impact depends on the number of new centers, courses, and trainers, which are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the structural need for a continuously learning workforce in a rapidly changing economy. It moves beyond one-time training to a model of lifelong skill maintenance.
coverage_gap_note: May be less accessible to workers in remote areas or those with inflexible work schedules, even with evening classes.

promise_text_en: "Integrated Industrial Skill Hubs" will be established in industrial parks and estates to meet the demand for skilled workers from companies operating there and to create employment opportunities for local youth.
promise_text_ta: தொழில் பூங்காக்கள், தொழிற்பேட்டைகளில் செயல்படும் தொழில் நிறுவனங்களின் திறன்மிகு தொழிலாளர்களின் தேவைகளை நிறைவு செய்திடும் வகையிலும், உள்ளூர் இளைஞர்களுக்கு வேலைவாய்ப்பினை உருவாக்கித் தரும் வகையிலும், அப்பகுதிகளில் “ஒருங்கிணைந்த தொழில் திறன் வளாகங்கள்” அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 60
impact_mechanism: Reduces the mismatch between local labor supply and industrial demand by co-locating skill training facilities directly within industrial parks.

promise_components.component: Establish 'Integrated Industrial Skill Hubs' in industrial parks and estates.
promise_components.analysis: This is an infrastructure and training initiative. The number of industrial parks and therefore the number of hubs to be established is not specified in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Train local youth for employment in companies operating within these parks.
promise_components.analysis: The number of local youth to be trained is not specified. The cost depends on the number of hubs and trainees. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The capital and operational costs are unknown as the number and scale of the proposed hubs are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a permanent, structural link between training providers and employers, addressing the root cause of localized skill gaps. It's a supply-chain approach to human capital.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated on youth living near industrial estates, excluding those in other regions.

promise_text_en: To address and leverage rapid technological changes, 'Global Talent Gateway' centers with world-class infrastructure will be established in major cities like Chennai, Trichy, Madurai, Salem, and Coimbatore to provide high-quality skill development training.
promise_text_ta: வேகமாக வளர்ந்து வரும் தொழில்நுட்ப மாற்றங்களை எதிர்கொள்ளவும், பயன்படுத்திக் கொள்ளவும் தேவையான உயர்தரத் திறன் மேம்பாட்டுப் பயிற்சிகள் வழங்க, உலகத்தரம் மிக்க உள்கட்டமைப்பு வசதிகள் கொண்ட 'Global Talent Gateway' சென்னை, திருச்சி, மதுரை, சேலம், கோயம்புத்தூர் ஆகிய பெருநகரங்களில் நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 61
impact_mechanism: Creates high-quality, centralized training hubs in major cities to produce a talent pool capable of competing for global opportunities.

promise_components.component: Establish 'Global Talent Gateway' centers in 5 major cities (Chennai, Trichy, Madurai, Salem, Coimbatore).
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital-intensive infrastructure promise to build 5 high-end training centers. The cost per center is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost to build and equip 5 'world-class' centers is not provided and cannot be estimated from available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural investment in high-end human capital infrastructure. It aims to fix a lack of globally benchmarked training facilities, which is a foundational issue for a knowledge economy.
coverage_gap_note: Access is limited to those who can reach and afford training in the five specified major cities.

promise_text_en: An AI-powered 'Skill Registry' will be established. It will record the details of all skilled individuals, including higher education students, job seekers, and those looking to upskill, and will be updated in real-time to connect job providers and seekers.
promise_text_ta: AI ஆற்றல் மிக்க ‘திறன் பதிவேடு' (Skill Registry) நிறுவப்படும். உயர்கல்வி பயிலும் மாணவர்கள், படித்து முடித்து வேலைக்கு தயார் நிலையில் உள்ள இளைஞர்கள், கிடைத்த வேலையில் இருந்துகொண்டு தங்களது திறன்களை மேம்படுத்தி உயர் வேலைவாய்ப்புப் பெற விரும்பும் இளைஞர்கள் உட்பட, வேலைசெய்யும் வயதில் உள்ள அனைத்துத் திறனாளர்களின் சுய விவரங்களும் 'திறன் பதிவேட்டில்' பதிவு செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 61
impact_mechanism: Improves labor market efficiency by creating a centralized, real-time digital platform that matches skilled individuals with job providers.

promise_components.component: Establish an AI-powered 'Skill Registry' to record details of all skilled individuals and connect them with employers.
promise_components.analysis: This is a digital infrastructure project. The cost involves software development, AI integration, and ongoing maintenance. The cost is not specified but is a technology procurement rather than a recurring subsidy.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost to develop and maintain a complex, AI-powered statewide platform is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the structural problem of information asymmetry in the job market. A successful registry would be a permanent piece of digital public infrastructure that reduces friction between supply and demand for skills.
coverage_gap_note: May exclude individuals with low digital literacy or those in the informal sector whose skills are not easily registered.

promise_text_en: Higher education institutions in Tamil Nadu will be trained to obtain global vocational certification, enabling students to secure high-paying jobs globally after graduation. This will be implemented through the 'Naan Mudhalvan 2.0' scheme.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டின் உயர்கல்வி நிறுவனங்கள் உலகளாவிய தொழிற்பயிற்சி சான்று பெறும் வண்ணம் பயிற்றுவிக்கப்படுவர். கல்லூரிக் கல்வி முடிந்த பின்னர் இத்தகைய மாணவர்கள் உலகளாவிய வேலை வாய்ப்புகளில் உயர் ஊதியப்பணி பெறும் வாய்ப்பு உருவாக்கப்படும். இது நான் முதல்வன் 2.0 திட்டம் வாயிலாக செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 61
impact_mechanism: Elevates the quality and global recognition of local degrees by enabling institutions to achieve international vocational certifications.

promise_components.component: Train higher education institutions to obtain global vocational certification under the 'Naan Mudhalvan 2.0' scheme.
promise_components.analysis: This is an institutional capacity-building program. The cost involves training faculty, upgrading infrastructure, and paying for accreditation, which varies by institution and certifying body. The number of institutions is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The costs for institutional training and global certification fees are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root issue of educational quality and international recognition. By improving the institutions themselves, the benefits are sustained for future batches of students, making it a structural enhancement.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are confined to students of the specific institutions that successfully undergo and achieve certification.

promise_text_en: To analyze trends in the AI sector, identify departments at risk of job losses, and provide retraining on a war-footing, an advisory committee headed by the Chief Minister will be formed. This committee will guide the implementation of 'Tamil Nadu AI Mission 2.0'.
promise_text_ta: செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவுத் துறையின் வளர்ச்சி மற்றும் அதன் போக்குகளை ஆராய்ந்து, வேலையிழப்பு நேரும் துறைகள் எவை என அடையாளம் கண்டு, அத்துறையினருக்கு மாற்றுப் பயிற்சியினை போர்க்கால அடிப்படையில் அளிப்பது சமூகநீதி அரசின் கடமை. இத்தகைய சூழலை எதிர்கொள்ளத் தேவையான நடவடிக்கைகளைத் திட்டமிட முதலமைச்சர் தலைமையில் ஆலோசனைக் குழு அமைக்கப்படும். இந்தக் குழு 'தமிழ்நாடு Al Mission 2.0' செயல்பட வழிநடத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 62
impact_mechanism: Proactively manages the disruptive effects of AI on the public sector workforce through strategic planning, analysis, and targeted retraining.

promise_components.component: Form an advisory committee headed by the Chief Minister for 'Tamil Nadu AI Mission 2.0'.
promise_components.analysis: This establishes a high-level governance structure. The direct cost is administrative and minimal.

promise_components.component: The mission will identify at-risk departments and provide retraining on a war-footing.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of retraining is unknown, as it depends on the number of employees identified and the complexity of the new skills required. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of the committee is negligible, but the potential cost of mass retraining of the government workforce is substantial and not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a governance framework to address a long-term structural shift caused by technology. It is proactive, aiming to manage the transition rather than reacting to job losses, which is a structural approach to policy.
coverage_gap_note: Focuses exclusively on the public sector workforce, not the private sector which faces similar disruption.

promise_text_en: To leverage the power of AI, suitable methods and systems will be created in every department to improve public welfare and enhance the quality of government services. Plans will be developed and implemented to build the necessary human resources to utilize this capability.
promise_text_ta: இந்தப் பேராற்றலை ஒவ்வொரு துறையிலும் எவ்வாறு மக்களின் நலனை மேம்படுத்தவும், அரசு வழங்கும் சேவைகளின் தரத்தை மேம்படுத்தவும், அரசு வழங்கும் சேவைகளின் தரத்தை உயர்த்தவும், ஏதுவான வழிமுறைகளும், அமைப்புகளும் உருவாக்கப்படும். இந்தப் பேராற்றலைப் பயன்படுத்தத் தேவையான மனிதவள ஆற்றலை உருவாக்குதல் முதல் படியாகும். இதற்கான திட்டங்கள் உருவாக்கப்பட்டு செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 62
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve the efficiency, quality, and accessibility of public services for all citizens through the systematic, government-wide application of AI.

promise_components.component: Create methods and systems using AI in every government department.
promise_components.analysis: This is a massive, long-term modernization goal for the entire state administration. It implies significant investment in technology and process re-engineering across all departments.

promise_components.component: Develop and implement plans to build the necessary human resources.
promise_components.analysis: This involves a large-scale, continuous training program for the entire government workforce. The cost is substantial but not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is a long-term vision, not a single, costed project. The total cost would be enormous, spread across all departmental budgets over many years.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a fundamental, structural reform of the state's operating model. If successful, it would permanently change the nature of governance and service delivery, addressing root causes of inefficiency and poor service quality.
coverage_gap_note: Citizens with low digital literacy may be left behind if non-digital service channels are not maintained.

promise_text_en: A course on AI will be made a mandatory part of all undergraduate degree programs. Through this, there will be 8 lakh AI-literate graduates in Tamil Nadu within the next three years.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்துப் பட்டப்படிப்பு துறைகளிலும் AI குறித்த பாடப்பிரிவு இன்றியமையாததாக அமைக்கப்படும். இதன் வாயிலாக அடுத்த மூன்றாண்டுகளில் AI அறிந்த பட்டம் படித்த மாணவர்கள் 8 லட்சம் பேர் தமிழ்நாட்டில் இருப்பார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 62
impact_mechanism: Establishes a baseline of AI literacy for all university graduates, creating a large talent pool with foundational knowledge in this critical technology.

promise_components.component: Make a course on AI a mandatory part of all undergraduate degree programs.
promise_components.analysis: This is a curriculum mandate affecting all higher education institutions. The primary challenge and cost lie in curriculum design and faculty training, not direct student expenditure.

promise_components.component: Create 8 lakh AI-literate graduates in the next three years.
promise_components.analysis: The promise provides a target number of beneficiaries (8 lakh over 3 years). The reference data does not contain the total number of annual graduates to verify this figure.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of developing a curriculum and training faculty across all colleges in the state is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This structurally alters the higher education system to embed a crucial modern skill. It addresses the root need for a technologically literate workforce at a foundational level.
coverage_gap_note: Does not address AI literacy for the majority of the population that does not pursue higher education.

promise_text_en: AI Clinics will be launched in 10 districts with a high concentration of MSMEs. These will be modeled on Germany's Mittelstand 4.0-Competence Centres, allowing MSMEs to experiment with AI technology without making large initial investments.
promise_text_ta: சிறு, குறு, நடுத்தரத் தொழில் நிறுவனங்கள் பரவலாக இயங்கும் 10 மாவட்டங்களில் Al Clinics தொடங்கப்படும். இவை ஜெர்மனியில் செயல்படும் Mittelstand 4.0-Competence Centres மாதிரியில் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 62
impact_mechanism: Boosts MSME competitiveness by de-risking technology adoption, providing a shared, subsidized environment for them to experiment with and integrate AI.

promise_components.component: Launch 'AI Clinics' in 10 districts with high MSME concentration.
promise_components.analysis: This is a targeted infrastructure and service program. The cost involves setting up and operating 10 specialized centers with expert staff and technology.

promise_components.component: Clinics will be modeled on Germany's Mittelstand 4.0-Competence Centres.
promise_components.analysis: This suggests a model based on public-private partnership and hands-on support, aiming to help small firms innovate without bearing the full upfront cost and risk.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The capital and operational costs to establish and run 10 specialized technology centers are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a structural barrier to innovation for small businesses: the high cost and risk of adopting new technology. By creating a permanent support infrastructure, it aims for a lasting improvement in MSME productivity.
coverage_gap_note: The program is limited to 10 districts, leaving out MSMEs in the rest of the state.

promise_text_en: As a first step, AI training for teachers who will be training our students will be started immediately.
promise_text_ta: AI தொழில்நுட்பத்தில் ஆசிரியர்களுக்குப் பயிற்சி வழங்குதல்தான் முதல் படி. நமது மாணவர்களுக்கு இப்பயிற்சி வழங்கவுள்ள ஆசிரியர்களுக்கான AI பயிற்சி உடனடியாகத் தொடங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 62
impact_mechanism: Improves the quality of education by equipping government school teachers with skills in the high-demand field of Artificial Intelligence.

promise_components.component: AI training for government school teachers.
promise_components.analysis: The number of government school teachers is not available in the reference data. The cost of developing and delivering AI training modules is also not specified. Therefore, a cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost is unquantifiable as the number of beneficiaries (teachers) and the cost per training program are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This is an investment in human capital within the public education system. Upgrading teacher skills provides a long-term improvement in educational capacity, addressing the root need for a modern and relevant curriculum.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is limited to government school teachers, excluding teachers in private educational institutions.

promise_text_en: By 2030, six regional technology campuses with special innovation zones will be established in fields such as Artificial Intelligence, Quantum Computing, Blockchain, AVGC-XR, Mobility Tech, and EV software.
promise_text_ta: 2030-ஆம் ஆண்டுக்குள் செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவு, குவாண்டம் கணினியியல், பிளாக்செயின், அனிமேஷன் காட்சி விளைவு - விளையாட்டு - விரிவாக்கப்பட்ட நிழற்பார்வை தொழில்நுட்பங்கள் (AVGC - XR) இயக்கத் தொழில்நுட்பம் (Mobility Tech) மற்றும் மின்சார வாகன மென்பொருள் போன்ற துறைகளில் சிறப்பு புதுமை வளாகங்களுடன் கூடிய ஆறு மண்டல தொழில்நுட்ப வளாகங்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 63
impact_mechanism: Builds long-term economic capacity by creating physical infrastructure for high-tech research, innovation, and education across the state.

promise_components.component: Establish six regional technology campuses with special innovation zones by 2030.
promise_components.analysis: The promise involves significant capital expenditure for land, construction, and equipment for six large-scale campuses. The cost to establish a technology campus is not available in the reference data, making a fiscal estimate impossible.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost is unquantifiable. This represents a major, multi-year capital investment project whose total cost is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative aims to create permanent infrastructure for a knowledge-based economy. By establishing centers for R&D and talent development, it addresses the foundational requirement for attracting high-tech industries and fostering innovation.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated in high-tech sectors and the specific regions where the campuses are built, not the general population.

promise_text_en: By 2030, with the aim of establishing Chennai as a global hub for Animation, Visual Effects, Gaming, and Comics (AVGC), ₹10,000 crore in investments will be attracted, creating 20,000 high-paying jobs.
promise_text_ta: 2030-ஆம் ஆண்டிற்குள் சென்னை நகரத்தை உலகளாவிய அனிமேஷன், காட்சி விளைவு, விளையாட்டு மற்றும் முழுமையான அனுபவத் தொழில்நுட்பங்களின் சிறப்பு மையமாக நிலைநிறுத்தும் நோக்கில் ரூ.10,000 கோடி முதலீடுகளை ஈர்த்து, 20,000 உயர் ஊதிய வேலைவாய்ப்புகள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 63
impact_mechanism: Aims to stimulate economic growth and job creation by positioning Chennai as an attractive destination for private investment in the AVGC sector.

promise_components.component: Attract ₹10,000 crore in private investments for the AVGC sector by 2030.
promise_components.analysis: This is an industrial policy target, not a direct government expenditure. The ₹10,000 crore is the goal for private investment to be attracted. The cost to the state would be in the form of incentives, infrastructure support, and policy-making, which are not quantified.

promise_components.component: Create 20,000 high-paying jobs in the AVGC sector.
promise_components.analysis: This is a target outcome contingent on attracting the specified investment. It is not a direct government hiring program.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The ₹10,000 crore figure refers to targeted private investment, not a government budget allocation. The cost of state actions to attract this investment is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: The goal is to build a self-sustaining industry cluster, which represents a structural change to the state's economy. If successful, it creates a new, durable source of high-value employment and economic activity.
coverage_gap_note: Direct job benefits are targeted at a specific group of skilled professionals primarily within the Chennai metropolitan area.

promise_text_en: Action will be taken to create and nurture 100 Deep Tech startups by 2030. Six Sectoral Innovation Labs will be established to strengthen the infrastructure for next-generation entrepreneurship and intellectual property creation.
promise_text_ta: 2030-ஆம் ஆண்டிற்குள் 100 ஆழ்தொழில்நுட்ப (Deep Tech) தொடக்க நிறுவனங்களை உருவாக்கவும், வளர்க்கவும் நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும். 6 துறைசார் புதுமை ஆய்வகங்கள் (Sectoral Innovation Labs) நிறுவப்பட்டு, அடுத்த தலைமுறைத் தொழில் முனைவுத்திறன் மற்றும் அறிவுசார் சொத்து உருவாக்கத்திற்குத் தேவையான கட்டமைப்புகள் வலுப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 63
impact_mechanism: Fosters an innovation ecosystem by providing infrastructure and support for the creation of new technology-based companies.

promise_components.component: Create and nurture 100 Deep Tech startups by 2030.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of incubation, grants, or other forms of support for 100 startups is not specified.

promise_components.component: Establish six Sectoral Innovation Labs.
promise_components.analysis: The capital and operational costs for establishing six specialized labs are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The costs for both nurturing startups and establishing the physical labs are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative aims to build a permanent innovation pipeline, addressing the root challenge of translating research into commercial enterprises. It creates infrastructure and processes intended to have a lasting impact on the state's entrepreneurial capacity.
coverage_gap_note: The direct beneficiaries are a small, highly specialized group of entrepreneurs and researchers in deep tech fields.

promise_text_en: As Quantum technology is a rapidly growing field, Quantum Simulators will be established to provide training in this technology.
promise_text_ta: Quantam தொழில்நுட்பம் பெருமளவில் வளரும் துறையாக உருவெடுத்து வருகிறது. இந்தத் தொழில் நுட்பத்தில்பயிற்சி பெற Quantam Simulators அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 63
impact_mechanism: Enhances technical education by providing access to advanced simulation tools for an emerging high-technology field.

promise_components.component: Establish Quantum Simulators for training in Quantum technology.
promise_components.analysis: The number of simulators to be established and the cost per unit are not specified. The number of potential trainees is also unknown. Therefore, a cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of procurement and operation of quantum simulators is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This is an investment in advanced educational infrastructure. Providing access to tools for a frontier technology builds long-term human capital and research capability, addressing the need for a future-ready workforce.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to a very small and highly specialized cohort of students and researchers in quantum physics and computing.

promise_text_en: Necessary measures will be taken to protect people from the increasing summer heat caused by climate change.
promise_text_ta: காலநிலை மாற்றத்தால் கோடை காலத்தில் அதிகரித்து வரும் வெப்பத்தில் இருந்து மக்களைக் காத்திட தேவையான நடவடிக்கைகள் முன்னெடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 64
impact_mechanism: Signals the government's intent to address public health and safety risks associated with extreme heat.

promise_components.component: Take necessary measures to protect people from increasing summer heat.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of intent with no specific, measurable actions or budget attached. It serves as a preamble for subsequent, more detailed promises.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is too vague to quantify any fiscal impact.
sustainability_reasoning: As a standalone statement, this promise lacks concrete deliverables and a budget. It is primarily political signalling that acknowledges a public concern without committing to a specific, analyzable action.

promise_text_en: District Heat Officers will be appointed in all districts and cities. Their responsibilities will include operating cooling centers, issuing local heat warnings, coordinating emergency medical aid, and ensuring workplace safety during heat events.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களிலும், நகரங்களிலும் மாவட்ட வெப்ப அலுவலர்கள் நியமிக்கப்படுவர். குளிர்விப்பு முகாம்களை இயக்குதல், வட்டார அளவில் வெப்ப எச்சரிக்கைகளை வெளியிடுதல், அவசர மருத்துவ உதவியை ஒருங்கிணைத்தல் மற்றும் வெப்ப நிகழ்வுகளின்போது பணியிடப் பாதுகாப்பை உறுதிசெய்தல் ஆகியவை இந்த வெப்ப அலுவலர்களின் பொறுப்பாக இருக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 64
impact_mechanism: Creates a formal administrative structure at the local level to manage and respond to public health emergencies caused by extreme heat.

promise_components.component: Appoint District Heat Officers in all districts and cities.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating new government positions. The number of officers and their salary costs are not specified. The operational budget for their functions (e.g., running cooling centers, medical aid) is also not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The recurring salary expenditure for new officers and the significant operational budget required for their duties are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This measure institutionalizes a response to the recurring symptom of extreme heat. It provides relief and enhances safety during heatwaves but does not address the root cause of climate change that leads to rising temperatures.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness of these officers is entirely dependent on the budget and authority they are granted, which is not specified.

promise_text_en: For AI-based local climate forecasting, automated weather stations will be established in Micro Grids in every district. This will provide local flood and storm warnings, weather reports for farmers, accurate heat warnings, and data for local adaptation planning.
promise_text_ta: செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவு அடிப்படையில் உள்ளூர் காலநிலை முன்னறிவிப்புக்காக ஒவ்வொரு மாவட்டத்திலும் நுண்மின் வலையமைப்பில் (Micro Grids) தானியங்கி வானிலை நிலையங்கள் அமைக்கப்படும். இது வட்டார அளவிலான வெள்ளம் மற்றும் புயல் எச்சரிக்கைகள், விவசாயிகளுக்கான வானிலை அறிக்கைகள், துல்லியமான வெப்ப எச்சரிக்கைகள் மற்றும் அந்தப் பகுதிக்கான தகவமைப்புத் திட்டமிடல் (Local Adaptation) ஆகியவற்றை வழங்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 64
impact_mechanism: Improves climate resilience and disaster preparedness by building a permanent infrastructure for hyper-local weather data collection and forecasting.

promise_components.component: Establish automated weather stations in Micro Grids in every district for AI-based local climate forecasting.
promise_components.analysis: The number of 'Micro Grids' per district is not defined, and the cost per weather station and AI system is not specified. This would be a significant capital and operational expense.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The total number of stations and the cost of the associated technology are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: While this addresses the symptoms of climate change (extreme weather events), it does so by building permanent, structural capacity. This data infrastructure is a long-term asset that enhances the state's ability to plan, adapt, and respond.
coverage_gap_note: The system's utility depends on creating effective last-mile communication channels to disseminate warnings to all citizens.

promise_text_en: Electric bus services will be expanded to the cities of Tiruchirappalli, Salem, Tirunelveli, Erode, and Thanjavur. Unique charging stations will be established in each city, moving the state towards its goal of 30% vehicle electrification by 2030.
promise_text_ta: திருச்சிராப்பள்ளி, சேலம், திருநெல்வேலி, ஈரோடு மற்றும் தஞ்சாவூர் ஆகிய நகரங்களுக்கும், மின்பேருந்து சேவை விரிவுபடுத்தப்படும். ஒவ்வொரு நகரத்திலும் தனித்துவமான மின்னூட்ட நிலையங்கள் அமைக்கப்படும். இது 2030-க்குள் 30% வாகனங்கள் மின்மயமாக்கல் என்ற இலக்கை நோக்கி மாநிலத்தை முன் நகர்த்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 64
impact_mechanism: Reduces air pollution and carbon emissions in major cities by replacing fossil-fuel-based public transport with electric vehicles.

promise_components.component: Expand electric bus services to Tiruchirappalli, Salem, Tirunelveli, Erode, and Thanjavur.
promise_components.analysis: The number of electric buses to be procured for these five cities is not specified. The cost per bus and the cost of establishing charging infrastructure are also not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The procurement of a large fleet of electric buses and the creation of extensive charging infrastructure represent a very high but unspecified capital cost.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a capital investment in green public infrastructure. Shifting the transport fleet to electric directly addresses the root cause of transport-related emissions and represents a fundamental, long-term upgrade to the system.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are limited to public transport users in the five specified cities, excluding rural areas and other urban centers.

promise_text_en: In defined wildlife corridors across Dharmapuri, Krishnagiri, Coimbatore, the Nilgiris, and the Eastern Ghats, AI-based early warning systems equipped with thermal sensors and camera traps will be installed.
promise_text_ta: தருமபுரி, கிருஷ்ணகிரி, கோயம்புத்தூர், நீலகிரி, கிழக்குத் தொடர்ச்சி மலைப்பரப்பில் வரையறுக்கப்பட்ட வனவிலங்கு வழித்தடங்களில் வெப்ப உணர்விகள் (Thermal Sensors) மற்றும் கேமரா பொறிகளைக் கொண்ட செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவு அடிப்படையிலான முன்னெச்சரிக்கை அமைப்புகள் நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 64
impact_mechanism: Reduces human-wildlife conflict by deploying a technology-based system to monitor animal movement and provide advance warnings.

promise_components.component: Install AI-based early warning systems in wildlife corridors in specified districts.
promise_components.analysis: The promise specifies locations but not the number of systems, the length of corridors to be covered, or the cost per installation (camera traps, sensors, AI software). A cost estimate is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The scale of deployment and cost of the technology are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: The system manages the symptom of human-wildlife conflict by providing warnings. It is a technological intervention for safety but does not address the root causes of the conflict, such as habitat fragmentation and encroachment on wildlife corridors.
coverage_gap_note: The system is limited to defined corridors in a few districts, leaving other potential conflict zones unaddressed.

promise_text_en: Native tree species such as casuarina, palmyra, portia tree, Indian beech, and local mangrove varieties will be planted along the coastal areas from Kanyakumari to Tiruvallur. These forest belts will be created in areas with high sea erosion and cyclone impact.
promise_text_ta: கன்னியாகுமரி முதல் திருவள்ளூர் வரையிலான கடற்கரைப் பகுதிகளில் சவுக்கு, பனை, பூவரசு, புங்கை மற்றும் உள்ளூர் அலையாத்தி வகைகள் போன்ற நாட்டு மரவகைகள் நடப்படும். கடல் அரிப்பு அதிகம் உள்ள பகுதிகள் மற்றும் புயல் தாக்கத்துக்குள்ளான பகுதிகளில் இந்த வனப்பட்டைகள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 64
impact_mechanism: Creates natural barriers (shelterbelts) to mitigate coastal erosion and the impact of cyclones.

promise_components.component: Plant native tree species (casuarina, palmyra, etc.) along the coast from Kanyakumari to Tiruvallur.
promise_components.analysis: The promise specifies the action but not the scale (number of saplings, area to be covered, or density of planting). Reference data lacks information on the length of the Tamil Nadu coastline, cost of saplings, labour for planting, or maintenance costs. Therefore, a cost calculation is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is entirely dependent on the scale of plantation, for which no data is provided in the promise or reference material.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative builds natural, living infrastructure to mitigate the recurring risks of climate change and coastal erosion. If the trees survive and establish, they provide a long-term, self-maintaining solution rather than requiring repeated investment like engineered structures.
coverage_gap_note: This addresses coastal vulnerability but does not cover other climate-related risks in inland areas.

promise_text_en: Based on the five landscapes of Sangam literature (Kurinji, Mullai, Marutham, Palai, Neithal), five corresponding eco-parks will be established in ecologically suitable locations across Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: சங்க இலக்கியத்தின் ஐந்திணைப் பாகுபாட்டின் அடிப்படையில் குறிஞ்சி, முல்லை, மருதம், பாலை மற்றும் நெய்தல் ஆகிய ஐந்து நிலப்பரப்பு உயிர்ப்பூங்காக்கள் தமிழ்நாடு முழுவதும் சூழலியல் ரீதியான பொருத்தமான இடங்களில் நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 64
impact_mechanism: Creates new public green spaces and tourist attractions themed around historical-ecological concepts.

promise_components.component: Establish five eco-parks based on the five landscapes of Sangam literature (Kurinji, Mullai, Marutham, Palai, Neithal).
promise_components.analysis: The promise specifies the number of parks (five) but provides no details on their size, features, land acquisition requirements, or development costs. The reference data contains no information on the cost of establishing or maintaining parks.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. No data is available to estimate the cost of land acquisition, development, and maintenance for five large-scale parks.
sustainability_reasoning: While creating parks is a positive public good, this promise does not address a root cause of an existing problem. The framing around Sangam literature is primarily a cultural and political signal, making the promise more about branding and perception than solving a structural issue.
coverage_gap_note: The direct benefits are highly localized to the areas where the five parks will be established.
