promise_text_ta: மீன் சில்லறை விற்பனை, கருவாடு சில்லறை விற்பனை, கடற்பாசி வளர்ப்பது போன்ற சிறு தொழில்களில் ஈடுபட்டுள்ள பெண்களுக்கு அடையாள அட்டை வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 81
impact_mechanism: This provides formal recognition to women in informal businesses, which can serve as a gateway to accessing social security schemes, credit, and other government benefits.

promise_components.component: Identity cards will be issued to women in small-scale fish retail, dried fish sales, and seaweed cultivation.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative action. The number of eligible women is not available in the reference data. The cost involves printing and distribution, which is typically minimal and absorbed by departmental budgets.

fiscal_cost_note: The fiscal cost is negligible and would be part of routine administrative expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: An ID card provides formal recognition, which helps in accessing other services, but it does not change the fundamental economic conditions or income precarity of the work itself. It treats a symptom (lack of formal identity) of being in the informal economy.
coverage_gap_note: The promise excludes men in the same businesses and women involved in other parts of the fisheries value chain.

promise_text_en: To find a permanent solution to the issue of Tamil Nadu fishermen's arrests, we will continuously urge the Union Government to review the Indo-Sri Lankan agreement and retrieve Katchatheevu.
promise_text_ta: இந்தச் சிக்கலுக்கு நிரந்தரத் தீர்வு காண இந்திய - இலங்கை ஒப்பந்தம் மீளாய்வுச் செய்யப்பட்டு, கச்சத்தீவை மீட்கத் தொடர்ந்து ஒன்றிய அரசை வலியுறுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 81
impact_mechanism: This promise uses the state's political platform to advocate for a change in national foreign policy to resolve a long-standing issue affecting a specific group of citizens.

promise_components.component: Continuously urge the Union Government to review the Indo-Sri Lankan agreement and retrieve Katchatheevu.
promise_components.analysis: This action is one of political advocacy directed at the central government. The state government does not have the authority to implement this directly. There is no direct financial cost to the state.

fiscal_cost_note: There is no direct fiscal cost to the state budget.
sustainability_reasoning: While the promise correctly identifies a root cause of fishermen's arrests, the state's committed action is only to 'urge' the Union Government. This is a political position, not a deliverable state program, making it a matter of optics.
coverage_gap_note: The resolution of this international issue is entirely outside the state government's control.

promise_text_en: As part of the Thaayumanavar scheme, the most vulnerable families in urban and rural areas will be identified and provided with necessary assistance such as housing, social security, livelihood support, skill development, and bank loans, with the goal of eradicating ultra-poverty in Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: தாயுமானவர் திட்டத்தின் பகுதியாக, நகர்ப்புறம் மற்றும் கிராமப்புறங்களில் மிகவும் வறுமையில் வாடும் நலிவடைந்த குடும்பங்களை அடையாளம் கண்டு, அவர்களுக்கு வீட்டு வசதி, சமூகப் பாதுகாப்பு, வாழ்வாதாரம், திறன் மேம்பாடு, வங்கிக்கடன் உள்ளிட்ட பல்வேறு உதவிகளைத் தேவையின் அடிப்படையில் செய்து கொடுக்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 82
impact_mechanism: This aims to lift the most deprived families out of poverty by providing a coordinated, multi-pronged package of support addressing their core needs simultaneously.

promise_components.component: Identify the most vulnerable families and provide them with housing, social security, livelihood support, skill development, and bank loans.
promise_components.analysis: This is a comprehensive anti-poverty scheme. The number of 'most vulnerable families' to be targeted is not specified, and the value of the assistance package per family is not defined. Analysis: data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. Given its comprehensive nature, the cost would be substantial, likely requiring thousands of crores, but cannot be estimated without beneficiary numbers and benefit details.
sustainability_reasoning: By providing a bundle of support that includes assets (housing), capabilities (skills), and financial access (loans), the scheme aims to create a permanent pathway out of poverty. This is a structural approach to tackling the multi-dimensional nature of extreme poverty.
coverage_gap_note: The program's success is highly dependent on the ability to accurately identify the 'most vulnerable' and coordinate multiple government departments effectively.

promise_text_en: Villages will be developed based on the concept of providing urban amenities in rural areas. Village markets, sports, and wellness infrastructure will be created. The 'Uthamar Gandhi Model Villages' scheme will be implemented to achieve these goals.
promise_text_ta: கிராமப்புறங்களில் நகர்ப்புற வசதிகளை வழங்குதல் எனும் கருத்தாக்கத்தின் அடிப்படையில் கிராமங்கள் வளர்த்தெடுக்கப்படும். கிராமச் சந்தைகள், விளையாட்டு மற்றும் நல வாழ்வுக் கட்டமைப்புகள் உருவாக்கப்படும். உத்தமர் காந்தி மாதிரி கிராமங்கள் திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
scheme_name: உத்தமர் காந்தி மாதிரி கிராமங்கள் திட்டம் (Uthamar Gandhi Model Villages Scheme)
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 82
impact_mechanism: This seeks to reduce the rural-urban divide by investing in public infrastructure in villages, improving quality of life and potentially creating local economic opportunities.

promise_components.component: Develop villages with urban amenities, including village markets, sports, and wellness infrastructure under the 'Uthamar Gandhi Model Villages' scheme.
promise_components.analysis: This is a rural infrastructure development scheme. The number of villages to be included in the scheme is not specified, nor is the budget per village. Analysis: data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted as the number of 'model villages' and the financial outlay are not mentioned.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating durable public assets like markets and wellness centers is a structural investment. This infrastructure can improve local economies, health, and overall quality of life, addressing the structural deficit in rural amenities.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are confined to the selected 'model villages', which may create disparities with non-selected villages.

promise_text_en: Under the Chief Minister's Village Roads Scheme, 15,000 km of roads will be repaired at an estimated cost of ₹10,000 crore.
promise_text_ta: முதலமைச்சர் கிராம சாலைத் திட்டத்தின் கீழ் 15 ஆயிரம் கி.மீ நீளமுள்ள சாலைகள் ரூபாய் 10,000 கோடி மதிப்பீட்டில் சீர்செய்யப்படும்.
scheme_name: முதலமைச்சர் கிராம சாலைத் திட்டம் (Chief Minister's Village Roads Scheme)
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 82
impact_mechanism: This improves rural connectivity by repairing a significant length of village roads, reducing travel time and cost for people and goods.

promise_components.component: Repair 15,000 km of roads under the Chief Minister's Village Roads Scheme at a cost of ₹10,000 crore.
promise_components.analysis: The promise provides specific targets: 15,000 km of roads for ₹10,000 crore. Assuming implementation over a 5-year period, the annual cost would be ₹2,000 crore.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost is ₹10,000 crore. Annualized over 5 years, this is ₹2,000 crore per year, which is approximately 1.54% of the state's discretionary budget (₹2,000 cr / ₹1,30,000 cr). This is fiscally feasible.
sustainability_reasoning: Roads are a fundamental economic infrastructure. Improving them directly addresses the root cause of rural isolation, enabling better access to markets, education, and healthcare, which provides lasting benefits.
coverage_gap_note: The promise focuses on repairing existing roads, not necessarily building new ones to connect previously unconnected habitations.

promise_text_en: In the next 5 years, 30,000 km of rural roads will be upgraded for long-term durability. A "Rural Roads Maintenance Fund" will be established to ensure quality maintenance of rural roads suitable for all weather conditions.
promise_text_ta: அடுத்த 5 ஆண்டுகளில் 30,000 கி.மீ நீளமுள்ள கிராமப்புறச் சாலைகள், நீண்டகாலம் நிலைத்திருக்கும் வகையில் மேம்படுத்தப்படும். “ஊரகச் சாலைகள் பராமரிப்பு நிதியம்” தொடங்கி, அதன்மூலம் அனைத்துக் காலநிலைகளுக்கும் ஏற்ற வகையில் தரமான முறையில் கிராமப்புறச் சாலைகள் பராமரிக்கப்படும்.
scheme_name: ஊரகச் சாலைகள் பராமரிப்பு நிதியம் (Rural Roads Maintenance Fund)
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 82
impact_mechanism: This aims to fundamentally improve the quality and longevity of rural roads by combining a large-scale upgrade with a dedicated funding mechanism for ongoing maintenance.

promise_components.component: Upgrade 30,000 km of rural roads for long-term durability over the next 5 years.
promise_components.analysis: The cost for upgrading 30,000 km of roads is not specified. Analysis: data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Establish a 'Rural Roads Maintenance Fund' for quality maintenance.
promise_components.analysis: This is an institutional reform. The size of the fund and its annual allocation are not specified. Analysis: data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. The cost to upgrade 30,000 km of roads and the required corpus for the maintenance fund are not provided.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating a dedicated maintenance fund is a key institutional reform that addresses the root cause of infrastructure decay. It shifts from a reactive 'build-neglect-rebuild' cycle to a proactive model, ensuring the long-term sustainability of road assets.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness of the promise hinges on the actual funding allocated to the upgrade program and the maintenance fund, which are not specified.

promise_text_en: 3,000 new overhead water tanks will be constructed over the next 5 years at a cost of ₹1,000 crore to replace old tanks that are over 30 years old.
promise_text_ta: 30 ஆண்டுகளுக்கு மேற்பட்ட பழைய மேல்நிலை நீர்த்தேக்கத் தொட்டிகளுக்குப் பதிலாக 3 ஆயிரம் புதிய மேல்நிலை நீர்த்தேக்கத் தொட்டிகள் ரூ. 1000 கோடி மதிப்பீட்டில் அடுத்த 5 ஆண்டுகளில் கட்டப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 83
impact_mechanism: This ensures the continued safety and reliability of drinking water supply in numerous communities by replacing old, potentially hazardous water storage infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Construct 3,000 new overhead water tanks over 5 years to replace old ones, at a cost of ₹1,000 crore.
promise_components.analysis: The promise provides specific targets: 3,000 tanks for ₹1,000 crore over 5 years. The annual cost is ₹1,000 crore / 5 years = ₹200 crore.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost is ₹1,000 crore. The annualized cost of ₹200 crore per year represents approximately 0.15% of the state's discretionary budget (₹200 cr / ₹1,30,000 cr). This is highly feasible.
sustainability_reasoning: Replacing aging critical infrastructure is a fundamental structural investment. It addresses the root cause of potential water supply failures and contamination risks, ensuring the long-term provision of a basic public health necessity.
coverage_gap_note: This program focuses on replacing old tanks, not necessarily providing new tanks to areas that currently lack adequate water storage.

promise_text_en: Village Secretariats will be built in 1,000 selected populous villages, co-locating offices such as the Village Administrative Office, Panchayat Office, meeting hall, and Public Distribution Shop.
promise_text_ta: மக்கள்தொகை அதிகமுள்ள 1000 கிராமங்கள் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டு, அங்குக் கிராமச் செயலகம் கட்டப்படும். கிராம நிர்வாக அலுவலகம், ஊராட்சி அலுவலகம், கூட்ட அறை, பொது விநியோகக்கடை போன்ற அலுவலகங்கள் ஒரே இடத்தில் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 83
impact_mechanism: Improves citizen access to local government services by consolidating multiple offices into a single, accessible location in populous villages.

promise_components.component: Build 1,000 Village Secretariats in populous villages.
promise_components.analysis: The promise specifies the construction of 1,000 units. The cost per secretariat is not provided in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Co-locate Village Administrative Office, Panchayat Office, meeting hall, and Public Distribution Shop.
promise_components.analysis: This details the functional design of the secretariats. The cost of construction and integration is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of land acquisition and construction for 1,000 buildings is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates permanent physical infrastructure for local governance. It addresses the root problem of fragmented and difficult-to-access government services for villagers, making a lasting change to the service delivery model.
coverage_gap_note: The scheme is limited to 1,000 selected populous villages, excluding thousands of other villages in the state.

promise_text_en: A comprehensive Rural Buildings Maintenance Policy will be formulated. A total of ₹2,000 crore will be allocated over the next 5 years for the maintenance of public utility buildings.
promise_text_ta: விரிவான ஊரகக் கட்டடங்கள் பராமரிப்புக் கொள்கை வகுக்கப்படும். அடுத்த 5 ஆண்டுகளுக்கு மொத்தம் ரூ. 2,000 கோடி ஒதுக்கப்பட்டு பொதுப்பயன்பாட்டுக் கட்டடங்கள் பராமரிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 83
impact_mechanism: Ensures the longevity and usability of public infrastructure in rural areas by allocating dedicated funds for regular upkeep.

promise_components.component: Formulate a comprehensive Rural Buildings Maintenance Policy.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy formulation commitment with no direct fiscal cost.

promise_components.component: Allocate ₹2,000 crore over 5 years for maintenance.
promise_components.analysis: This translates to an annual allocation of ₹2,000 crore / 5 years = ₹400 crore per year.

fiscal_cost_note: Estimated annual cost is ₹400 crore. This represents approximately 0.31% of the ₹1.3 lakh crore discretionary budget (400 / 1,30,000). This is fiscally feasible.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root cause of infrastructure decay, which is the lack of dedicated maintenance funding. By establishing a policy and a funding stream, it moves from a reactive 'build-neglect-rebuild' cycle to a sustainable asset management model.
coverage_gap_note: This policy is specifically for rural buildings, not covering public utility buildings in urban areas.

promise_text_en: Solid and liquid waste management schemes will be implemented scientifically with modern technology to ensure all rural areas are maintained with complete cleanliness.
promise_text_ta: கிராமப்பகுதிகள் அனைத்தும் முற்றிலும் தூய்மையாகப் பராமரிக்கப்படும் வகையில், திட மற்றும் திரவக் கழிவு மேலாண்மைத் திட்டங்கள் நவீனத் தொழில்நுட்பத்துடன், அறிவியல்பூர்வமான முறையில் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 83
impact_mechanism: Improves public health and environmental conditions in rural areas through the systematic collection and processing of waste.

promise_components.component: Implement scientific solid and liquid waste management schemes in all rural areas.
promise_components.analysis: The number of rural local bodies, the volume of waste, and the cost of 'scientific' implementation with 'modern technology' are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on the number of villages, population density, and the specific technology chosen, none of which are specified.
sustainability_reasoning: A functional, scientific waste management system is a core piece of public health infrastructure. It directly solves the underlying problem of pollution and unsanitary conditions caused by unmanaged waste, creating a permanent improvement.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is specific to rural areas and does not address waste management in urban centers.

promise_text_en: Villages will be greened by planting and nurturing 10 crore saplings by 2030. The impacts of climate change will be mitigated by planting 2 crore saplings annually along roadsides and in open spaces.
promise_text_ta: 2030-ஆம் ஆண்டுக்குள் 10 கோடி மரக்கன்றுகளை நடவுசெய்து வளர்ப்பதன் மூலம் கிராமங்கள் பசுமையாக்கப்படும். ஆண்டுக்கு 2 கோடி மரக்கன்றுகளைச் சாலையோரம் மற்றும் திறந்தவெளிகளில் நடுவதன் வாயிலாகக் காலநிலை மாற்றத்தால் ஏற்படும் தாக்கங்கள் மட்டுப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 83
impact_mechanism: Increases green cover across the state to combat climate change effects, improve air quality, and enhance the local environment.

promise_components.component: Plant and nurture 10 crore saplings by 2030.
promise_components.analysis: This is a long-term target. The cost of saplings and multi-year nurturing is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Plant 2 crore saplings annually along roadsides and in open spaces.
promise_components.analysis: This sets an annual implementation target. At 2 crore saplings per year, the 10 crore target would be met in 5 years. Cost per sapling is not available.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of procurement, planting, and long-term nurturing for 2 crore saplings annually is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Increasing the state's tree cover is a direct, long-term intervention to address environmental degradation and climate change. If the saplings are nurtured to maturity, they become a lasting environmental asset.

promise_text_en: Through a special scheme for Peri-Urban Panchayats, urban-level amenities will be provided. This includes ensuring facilities like roads, street lights, adequate solid and liquid waste management, drinking water sources, green complexes, parking lots, and proper stormwater drain systems.
promise_text_ta: நகர்ப்புறங்களை ஒட்டியுள்ள ஊராட்சிகளுக்கு (Peri-Urban Panchayats) நகரங்களுக்கு இணையான வசதிகள் ஏற்படுத்தித் தரப்படும். குறிப்பாகச் சாலைகள், தெருவிளக்குகள், திட மற்றும் திரவக் கழிவு மேலாண்மை, குடிநீர் ஆதாரங்கள், பசுமை வளாகங்கள், வாகன நிறுத்துமிடங்கள், முறையான மழைநீர் வடிகால் அமைப்புகள் போன்ற வசதிகள் உறுதிசெய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 83
impact_mechanism: Upgrades the basic infrastructure in fast-growing areas bordering cities to improve living standards and manage urban sprawl.

promise_components.component: Provide urban-level amenities (roads, lights, waste management, water, etc.) to Peri-Urban Panchayats.
promise_components.analysis: The number of designated 'Peri-Urban Panchayats' and the cost of upgrading their diverse infrastructure to 'urban-level' are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This is a complex, multi-sectoral promise with no specified budget or number of target locations.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root cause of poor living conditions in peri-urban areas, which is the gap between rapid population growth and inadequate infrastructure. Providing foundational amenities like roads and water systems is a permanent upgrade.
coverage_gap_note: This special scheme explicitly excludes both core urban areas and remote rural villages.

promise_text_en: We will act with the vision of "Our cities rising globally in infrastructure."
promise_text_ta: “உட்கட்டமைப்பில் உலகளவில் உயரும் நம் நகரங்கள்” என்ற நோக்கத்துடன் செயல்படுவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 84
impact_mechanism: This is a vision statement and does not contain a mechanism for tangible change.

promise_components.component: Act with the vision of 'Our cities rising globally in infrastructure.'
promise_components.analysis: This is a non-specific, non-measurable statement of intent. It does not contain a concrete action or target.

fiscal_cost_note: No cost can be attributed to a vision statement.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise is a slogan, not a policy. It lacks any specific, measurable, or actionable commitment, making it a form of political signalling without material substance.

promise_text_en: Beautiful "Complete Streets" with footpaths and shade-giving trees will be created in corporation areas.
promise_text_ta: மாநகராட்சிப் பகுதிகளில் “Complete Streets” அதாவது நடைபாதை, நிழல் தரும் மரங்கள் என எழில் மிகுந்த சாலைகள் நகரங்களில் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 84
impact_mechanism: Improves pedestrian safety, promotes non-motorized transport, and enhances urban aesthetics by redesigning streets for people, not just cars.

promise_components.component: Create 'Complete Streets' with footpaths and shade-giving trees in corporation areas.
promise_components.analysis: The number of corporation areas, the length of streets to be redesigned, and the cost per unit are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is dependent on the scale of the project, which is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: Redesigning a street is a permanent change to the physical urban environment. It addresses the root cause of pedestrian-unfriendly cities—car-centric design—by creating lasting infrastructure for walking and public life.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is limited to corporation areas, excluding municipalities, town panchayats, and rural roads.

promise_text_en: By 2030, all households in urban areas of Tamil Nadu will be provided with piped water connections, and daily water supply will be ensured.
promise_text_ta: வரும் 2030-ஆம் ஆண்டிற்குள் தமிழ்நாட்டின் நகர்ப்புறங்களில் அமைந்துள்ள அனைத்து வீடுகளுக்கும் குடிநீர்க் குழாய் இணைப்பு கொடுக்கப்பட்டு தினந்தோறும் குடிநீர் வழங்குவது உறுதிசெய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 84
impact_mechanism: Aims to achieve universal access to safe and reliable drinking water in cities, which directly improves public health and quality of life.

promise_components.component: Provide piped water connections to all households in urban areas by 2030.
promise_components.analysis: The number of urban households currently lacking a connection is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Ensure daily water supply.
promise_components.analysis: This implies significant upgrades to water sources, treatment, and distribution networks. The cost for this is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of last-mile connections and major network augmentation to ensure daily supply is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Providing a permanent, reliable piped water network is a foundational public health intervention. It is a one-time capital investment that solves the underlying problem of water access and delivers continuous benefits for decades.
coverage_gap_note: This promise focuses on urban areas, leaving out the distinct challenges of rural water supply.

promise_text_en: Action will be taken to create 20% green spaces and parks in the urban areas of Tamil Nadu by 2030.
promise_text_ta: 2030-ஆம் ஆண்டில், தமிழ்நாட்டின் நகர்ப்பகுதியில், 20 விழுக்காடு பசுமைப் பகுதிகள், பூங்காக்கள் அமைத்திட உரிய நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 84
impact_mechanism: Improves urban quality of life, public health, and environmental resilience by mandating the creation of parks and green areas.

promise_components.component: Create 20% green spaces and parks in the urban areas of Tamil Nadu by 2030.
promise_components.analysis: The current percentage of green space and the total urban area are not specified. The cost of land acquisition and development is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Land acquisition in urban areas is extremely costly and variable, making estimation impossible without more data.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the deficit of public green spaces in dense urban environments. Parks and green belts are permanent changes to the urban landscape that provide lasting environmental, social, and health benefits.
coverage_gap_note: This is an urban-focused promise and does not apply to rural areas.

promise_text_en: Wastewater will be fully collected, treated, and 30% will be recycled.
promise_text_ta: கழிவுநீர் முழுமையாகச் சேகரிக்கப்பட்டு, சுத்திகரிக்கப்பட்டு, 30 விழுக்காடு மறுசுழற்சி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 84
impact_mechanism: Reduces water pollution and augments water supply by creating a circular system for wastewater management.

promise_components.component: Fully collect all wastewater.
promise_components.analysis: This requires a comprehensive underground drainage network. The current coverage gap and cost are not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Treat all collected wastewater.
promise_components.analysis: This requires building sufficient sewage treatment plant (STP) capacity. Data on current capacity vs. required capacity is not available.

promise_components.component: Recycle 30% of treated wastewater.
promise_components.analysis: This requires advanced treatment technology and a separate distribution network for recycled water. Costs are not available.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This is a massive, multi-faceted infrastructure project with no specified costs or current capacity data.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a permanent infrastructure solution to two root problems: water pollution from untreated sewage and water scarcity. A full-cycle water management system is a foundational environmental and public health asset.
coverage_gap_note: While the goal is universal, achieving 'full collection' in unplanned settlements and remote areas will be a major challenge.

promise_text_en: Modern cultural auditoriums will be established in Chennai, Coimbatore, Madurai, Trichy, Salem, and all major corporations.
promise_text_ta: சென்னை, கோவை, மதுரை, திருச்சி, சேலம் மற்றும் அனைத்துப் பெரிய மாநகராட்சிகளிலும் நவீன பண்பாட்டு அரங்கங்கள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 84
impact_mechanism: Enhances cultural life and provides venues for arts and community events in major cities.

promise_components.component: Establish modern cultural auditoriums in Chennai, Coimbatore, Madurai, Trichy, Salem, and all major corporations.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of constructing and maintaining modern auditoriums is not available in the reference data. The total number of 'major corporations' is not specified. Therefore, a cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise does not state a budget. Cost data for construction and maintenance of auditoriums is not available in the reference data. Cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides valuable cultural infrastructure but does not address underlying issues like funding for the arts or artist livelihoods. It is a facility-based solution that addresses a quality-of-life deficit, not a systemic problem.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes residents of smaller towns, municipalities, and rural areas.

promise_text_en: Bio-CNG plants will be set up in Coimbatore, Madurai, Tambaram, Erode, Salem, Tiruppur, Tiruchirappalli, Tirunelveli, Thoothukudi, and Thanjavur corporations. Three more Bio-CNG plants will be set up in Chennai Corporation.
promise_text_ta: Bio-CNG ஆலைகள், கோயம்புத்தூர், மதுரை, தாம்பரம், ஈரோடு, சேலம், திருப்பூர், திருச்சிராப்பள்ளி, திருநெல்வேலி, தூத்துக்குடி, தஞ்சாவூர் ஆகிய மாநகராட்சிகளில் அமைக்கப்படும். சென்னை மாநகராட்சியில் மேலும் மூன்று Bio-CNG ஆலைகள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 84
impact_mechanism: Converts organic urban waste into a cleaner fuel source (Bio-CNG), reducing landfill burden and promoting renewable energy.

promise_components.component: Set up 13 Bio-CNG plants in 11 specified corporations (10 corporations + 3 in Chennai).
promise_components.analysis: The cost per Bio-CNG plant for construction and operation is not available in the reference data. Therefore, a total cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise does not state a budget. Cost data for Bio-CNG plant construction and operation is not available in the reference data. Cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural solution that turns a liability (waste) into an asset (energy). It addresses the root cause of organic waste accumulation and provides a sustainable alternative fuel.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes corporations not on the list, as well as all municipalities and rural areas.

promise_text_en: Waste to Energy Plants will be set up in Chennai, Tambaram, and Coimbatore corporations.
promise_text_ta: கழிவுகளில் இருந்து மின்சாரம் உற்பத்தி செய்யும் ஆலைகள் (Waste to Energy Plants) சென்னை, தாம்பரம் மற்றும் கோயம்புத்தூர் மாநகராட்சிகளில் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 84
impact_mechanism: Reduces landfill volume by incinerating non-recyclable waste to generate electricity.

promise_components.component: Set up Waste to Energy Plants in Chennai, Tambaram, and Coimbatore corporations.
promise_components.analysis: The cost per Waste to Energy plant is not available in the reference data. Therefore, a total cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise does not state a budget. Cost data for Waste to Energy plant construction and operation is not available in the reference data. Cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: Creates a permanent infrastructure to handle a specific waste stream, reducing reliance on landfills. However, its environmental sustainability depends heavily on the technology used and adherence to emission norms.
coverage_gap_note: Limited to three corporations, leaving out all other urban and rural areas.

promise_text_en: Material Recovery Facilities (MRF) will be established in all corporations to segregate urban waste. The segregated waste will be recycled.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்து மாநகராட்சிகளிலும் நகர்ப்புறக் கழிவுகளைப் பிரித்தெடுக்க Material Recovery Facilities — MRF வசதிகள் அமைக்கப்படும். பிரிக்கப்பட்ட கழிவுகள் மறுசுழற்சி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 84
impact_mechanism: Enables systematic recycling by establishing facilities to sort and process segregated waste in all corporations.

promise_components.component: Establish Material Recovery Facilities (MRF) in all corporations to segregate and recycle urban waste.
promise_components.analysis: The total number of corporations in Tamil Nadu and the cost per MRF are not available in the reference data. Therefore, a total cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise does not state a budget. Cost data for MRF construction and operation is not available in the reference data. Cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a foundational step for a functional recycling system. It moves beyond just collection to processing, which is a structural fix for the waste management chain, but its success depends on effective at-source segregation.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes all municipalities and rural areas, which also generate waste.

promise_text_en: Public toilets will be built and maintained on a Public-Private Partnership (PPP) basis in high-traffic areas of all corporations and first-grade municipalities for public convenience.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்து மாநகராட்சிகள் மற்றும் முதல்தர நகராட்சிகளிலும் பொதுமக்கள் பெருமளவில் வந்து செல்லும் இடங்களில் பொது - தனியார் கூட்டு முயற்சி அடிப்படையில் (PPP) பொதுக்கழிப்பறைகள் அமைக்கப்பட்டு பராமரிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 84
impact_mechanism: Improves public sanitation and hygiene by increasing the availability of clean toilets in high-traffic urban areas through a PPP model.

promise_components.component: Build and maintain public toilets on a PPP basis in high-traffic areas of all corporations and first-grade municipalities.
promise_components.analysis: The number of corporations, first-grade municipalities, and 'high-traffic areas' is not specified. The cost per toilet and the financial details of the PPP model are not available in the reference data. Therefore, a cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise does not state a budget. The state's share of cost under the PPP model is unknown, and construction/maintenance costs are not in the reference data. Cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: Lack of public toilets is a basic infrastructure deficit. Building them is a direct, structural solution to a public health and dignity issue. The PPP model aims to make maintenance sustainable.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes smaller municipalities and rural areas.

promise_text_en: Necessary infrastructure will be created to collect all wastewater generated in urban areas. Treatment plants will be set up to treat the collected wastewater.
promise_text_ta: நகர்ப்புறங்களில் உருவாகும் கழிவுநீர் அனைத்தையும் சேகரிக்கத் தேவையான உட்கட்டமைப்பு ஏற்படுத்தப்படும். இவ்வாறு சேகரிக்கப்படும் கழிவுநீரைச் சுத்திகரிக்க சுத்திகரிப்பு நிலையங்கள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: Protects water bodies and public health by creating a comprehensive system to collect and treat all wastewater in urban areas.

promise_components.component: Create infrastructure to collect and treat all wastewater generated in urban areas.
promise_components.analysis: The volume of wastewater in 'urban areas' and the cost of collection networks and treatment plants are not available in the reference data. This represents a massive infrastructure project for which a cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise does not state a budget. This is a massive, multi-year infrastructure project, but specific data is not available to make an estimate.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to close a critical gap in urban infrastructure. Treating all wastewater prevents pollution at its source, a truly structural and long-lasting solution to protect public health and the environment.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes rural areas, where untreated wastewater is also a significant issue.

promise_text_en: Tertiary treatment plants will be set up at 30 MLD capacity treatment plants to further improve the quality of treated water. All measures will be taken to use this water for agricultural and industrial needs.
promise_text_ta: 30 MLD திறன் கொண்ட சுத்திகரிப்பு நிலையங்களில், சுத்திகரிக்கப்பட்ட நீரின் தரத்தை மேலும் உயர்த்தும் வண்ணம் மூன்றாம் நிலை சுத்திகரிப்பு நிலையங்கள் அமைக்கப்படும். இவை வேளாண்மை மற்றும் தொழில்துறையினரின் தேவைகளுக்குக் கூடுதலாகப் பயன்படுத்த அனைத்து நடவடிக்கைகளும் எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: Conserves fresh water resources by upgrading treated wastewater to a quality suitable for industrial and agricultural reuse.

promise_components.component: Set up tertiary treatment plants at 30 MLD capacity treatment plants for reuse of water.
promise_components.analysis: The number of existing 30 MLD plants is not specified in the reference data. The cost of a tertiary treatment plant add-on is also not available. Therefore, a cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise does not state a budget. Cost data for tertiary treatment technology is not available in the reference data. Cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: By creating a system for water reuse, this promise structurally alters water management practices. It addresses the problem of water scarcity by creating a circular water economy.
coverage_gap_note: Limited to locations with existing 30 MLD treatment plants.

promise_text_en: The solid waste management system will be restructured, taking the successful recycling model of Kamikatsu town in Japan as an example.
promise_text_ta: மறு சுழற்சியில் முழு வெற்றி கண்டுள்ள ஜப்பான் நாட்டின் Kamikatsu நகர மாதிரியை எடுத்துக்காட்டாகக் கொண்டு திடக்கழிவு மேலாண்மை முறை மாற்றியமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: Aims to achieve near-zero waste by fundamentally redesigning the state's solid waste management system based on a model of intensive citizen-led segregation and recycling.

promise_components.component: Restructure the solid waste management system based on the Kamikatsu, Japan model.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy and system change promise. The cost involves massive public awareness campaigns and overhauling the entire logistics chain. No cost data is available in the reference data to estimate the financial implications.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise does not state a budget. The cost of such a systemic overhaul is immense and cannot be estimated from the provided data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is the definition of a structural approach, seeking to change the entire system from the ground up. Its success is highly contingent on achieving massive behavioral change across a large, diverse population.
coverage_gap_note: The feasibility of applying a small-town, homogenous community model to a large, diverse state is a major implicit gap.

promise_text_en: Old garbage dumps will be cleared using bio-mining, and all urban areas will be transformed into garbage-free zones.
promise_text_ta: பழைய குப்பை மேடுகளும் Bio-Mining முறையில் அகற்றப்பட்டு, நகர்ப்புறங்கள் அனைத்தும் குப்பைகளற்ற பகுதிகளாக மாற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: Reclaims land occupied by old landfills and eliminates a major source of pollution by processing legacy waste through bio-mining.

promise_components.component: Clear old garbage dumps using bio-mining and transform all urban areas into garbage-free zones.
promise_components.analysis: The number, size, and volume of 'old garbage dumps' in 'all urban areas' are not specified. The cost per ton of bio-mining is not available in the reference data. Therefore, a cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise does not state a budget. Cost data for bio-mining projects is not available in the reference data. Cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a restorative structural change. It permanently removes a source of pollution and reclaims land, fixing a past failure in the waste management system.
coverage_gap_note: Does not address the ongoing generation of new waste, which other promises target.

promise_text_en: Stormwater drain facilities will be established in all required locations in Tamil Nadu's urban areas within the next five years.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டின் நகர்ப்புறங்களில் தேவைப்படும் அனைத்து இடங்களிலும் அடுத்த ஐந்து ஆண்டுகளுக்குள் வெள்ளநீர் வடிகால் வசதி ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: Mitigates urban flooding by constructing a comprehensive network of stormwater drains in all vulnerable urban areas over five years.

promise_components.component: Establish stormwater drain facilities in all required locations in Tamil Nadu's urban areas within five years.
promise_components.analysis: The length of drains required in 'all required locations' and the cost per kilometer of construction are not available in the reference data. Therefore, a cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise does not state a budget. This is a massive, multi-year infrastructure project, but specific data is not available to make an estimate.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a classic structural intervention. It builds permanent physical infrastructure to solve a recurring problem (flooding), fundamentally improving the safety and functioning of urban areas.
coverage_gap_note: The focus is on urban areas, while rural flooding is also a significant issue.

promise_text_en: Structures to absorb and retain floodwater will be created in all parks. At least 3% of urban land will be converted into "Sponge City" infrastructure.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்துப் பூங்காக்களிலும் வெள்ளநீரை உறிஞ்சி தக்க வைத்துக் கொள்ளும் கட்டமைப்புகள் உருவாக்கப்படும். நகர்ப்புற நிலங்களில் குறைந்தது 3 விழுக்காடு “Sponge City” உட்கட்டமைப்பாக மாற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to mitigate urban flooding by creating infrastructure that absorbs and retains rainwater, reducing runoff and waterlogging.

promise_components.component: Create floodwater absorption structures in all parks.
promise_components.analysis: The number of parks and the cost per structure are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Convert 3% of urban land into 'Sponge City' infrastructure.
promise_components.analysis: The total urban land area in Tamil Nadu and the cost per unit area for conversion to 'Sponge City' infrastructure are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from the available data. This would be a significant capital expenditure project.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root cause of urban flooding—impermeable surfaces and inadequate drainage—by fundamentally changing land use and water management. It creates a lasting solution rather than just managing flood events.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is limited to urban areas and does not address flooding issues in rural regions.

promise_text_en: Major roads in Tamil Nadu's urban areas will be converted into concrete roads, making them durable and suitable for all seasons.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டின் நகர்ப்புறத்திலுள்ள முக்கிய சாலைகள் கான்கிரீட் சாலைகளாக மாற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to improve the durability of urban roads and reduce maintenance costs by replacing existing surfaces with concrete.

promise_components.component: Convert major roads in urban areas to concrete roads.
promise_components.analysis: The total length of 'major roads in urban areas' and the cost per kilometer for conversion to concrete are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from the available data. Road conversion is a high-cost capital project.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a long-term capital investment that creates a durable public asset. Concrete roads have a longer lifespan and lower maintenance needs compared to asphalt, addressing the root issue of road degradation.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes non-major urban roads and all rural roads, which also require maintenance and upgrades.

promise_text_en: 50 new 'Semmozhi Poongas' (Classical Language Parks) will be created across all corporations and major municipalities in Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாடு முழுவதும் அனைத்து மாநகராட்சிகள் மற்றும் முக்கிய நகராட்சிகளில் 50 புதிய செம்மொழிப் பூங்காக்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to enhance urban green spaces and public recreational areas by establishing new, themed parks.

promise_components.component: Create 50 new 'Semmozhi Poongas' (Classical Language Parks).
promise_components.analysis: The cost to acquire land and develop one park is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost for 50 parks cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from the available data. It would involve land acquisition and development costs.
sustainability_reasoning: This improves the quality of urban life and provides recreational spaces, which is a genuine benefit. However, it does not address a foundational economic or social problem; it enhances amenities rather than fixing a structural deficit.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are localized to residents living near the 50 new park locations.

promise_text_en: All street lights in urban areas will be replaced with smart LED lights.
promise_text_ta: நகர்ப்புறங்களில் உள்ள சாலை விளக்குகள் அனைத்தும் smart LED விளக்குகளாக மாற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to reduce municipal energy consumption and improve nighttime public safety by upgrading street lighting infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Replace all street lights in urban areas with smart LED lights.
promise_components.analysis: The total number of street lights in urban areas and the cost per smart LED light unit (including installation) are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from the available data. While there is an upfront capital cost, it is expected to generate long-term savings on electricity bills.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a one-time upgrade to public infrastructure that provides lasting benefits in energy efficiency and reduced operational costs. It addresses the root issue of high energy consumption from outdated technology.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is limited to urban areas, excluding street lighting needs in villages and rural roads.

promise_text_en: New sports grounds will be created in areas that lack them.
promise_text_ta: விளையாட்டுத் திடல்கள் இல்லாத பகுதிகளில் புதிய திடல்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to promote public health and community recreation by creating sports facilities in underserved areas.

promise_components.component: Create new sports grounds in areas that lack them.
promise_components.analysis: The number of areas identified as lacking sports grounds and the cost to develop one ground (including land acquisition) are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating permanent community assets addresses the structural lack of recreational infrastructure. It provides a lasting facility for public health and youth engagement, tackling the root cause of limited access.
coverage_gap_note: The benefit is targeted only to the specific, undefined areas that are chosen for the new grounds.

promise_text_en: New electric crematoriums will be set up in corporation and municipal areas. Permission will be granted for people from surrounding villages to use them.
promise_text_ta: மாநகராட்சி, நகராட்சி பகுதிகளில் புதிய மின் மயானங்கள் அமைக்கப்படும். அவற்றை சுற்றுப்புற கிராமத்தினரும் பயன்படுத்திக் கொள்ள அனுமதி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to provide modern, accessible, and dignified end-of-life services by expanding the network of electric crematoriums.

promise_components.component: Set up new electric crematoriums in corporation and municipal areas.
promise_components.analysis: The number of new crematoriums to be built and the cost per unit are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a gap in essential public service infrastructure. Building permanent facilities is a structural improvement that meets a recurring community need in a more modern and environmentally friendly way.
coverage_gap_note: While villages can use them, the facilities are located in urban areas, potentially creating access issues for remote rural populations.

promise_text_en: To meet the growing demand for housing, commercial space, and public areas due to widespread urbanization, new regulations will be formulated by comparing building policies, including FSI, from major cities in the country.
promise_text_ta: மாநிலத்தில் பரவலாக ஏற்பட்டுவரும் நகர்ப்புற வளர்ச்சியின் காரணமாக வீடுகளுக்கான தேவைகள், தொழில் வணிக நிறுவனங்களுக்கான இடவசதி, பொது இடங்களின் தேவை ஆகியவை பெருகிவருகிறது. இவற்றுக்கான இத்தேவையை நிறைவு செய்ய நாட்டின் முக்கிய நகரங்களில் உள்ள FSI உள்ளிட்ட கட்டடக் கொள்கைகளை ஒப்பிட்டு உரிய புதிய விதிமுறைகள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to manage and guide urban growth by updating the legal and regulatory framework for construction.

promise_components.component: Formulate new building regulations, including FSI, by comparing with other major cities.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory action, not a direct expenditure. The cost is limited to administrative and consultative processes, which are negligible in the context of the state budget.

fiscal_cost_note: No significant fiscal cost. This is a policy formulation exercise.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise addresses the root cause of haphazard urban development by changing the underlying rules (like FSI) that govern it. A well-formulated policy can shape urban form, density, and housing supply for decades.

promise_text_en: Considering the population growth and rapid expansion of suburban areas in major corporations like Trichy, Madurai, Coimbatore, and Salem, new 'Global Cities' with modern, world-class facilities will be developed near these corporations.
promise_text_ta: திருச்சி, மதுரை, கோயம்புத்தூர், சேலம் ஆகிய பெரிய மாநகராட்சிகளின் அருகாமையில், நவீன உலகத்தரமான வசதிகளுடன் புதிய நகரங்கள் (Global Cities) உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 85
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to decongest existing major cities and spur economic growth by developing new, self-contained urban centers with modern infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Develop new 'Global Cities' near Trichy, Madurai, Coimbatore, and Salem.
promise_components.analysis: The scale, scope, and cost of developing a 'Global City' are not defined and are not available in the reference data. Such projects are massive, multi-decade undertakings with costs likely running into thousands or lakhs of crores.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost cannot be calculated but would be astronomically high, far exceeding the state's discretionary budget. It would be impossible without massive central government funding and private sector investment.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural attempt to reshape the state's economic geography and manage urbanization. If successful, it creates new, lasting centers of economic activity and population, addressing the root problem of over-concentration in a few metro areas.
coverage_gap_note: The direct benefits are concentrated in four specific regions, leaving out the rest of the state.

promise_text_en: The quality of our bridges and roads will be improved using modern road technology, AI monitoring, and Intelligent Transport Systems, which will reduce accidents.
promise_text_ta: நவீனச் சாலைத் தொழில்நுட்பம், A.l. கண்காணிப்பு, Intelligent Transport Systems ஆகியவற்றால் நம் பாலங்கள், சாலைகளின் தரம் மேம்படுத்தப்படும். விபத்துகள் குறைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 86
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to enhance road safety and infrastructure longevity by integrating modern technology for monitoring and management.

promise_components.component: Improve bridges and roads using modern road technology, AI monitoring, and Intelligent Transport Systems (ITS).
promise_components.analysis: The scope of deployment (which roads/bridges), and the cost of AI monitoring or ITS implementation are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from the available data. Technology implementation can have a wide range of costs depending on the scale.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root causes of accidents and infrastructure decay by moving from a reactive to a proactive management system. Using technology for monitoring and traffic management is a structural upgrade to how public assets are maintained and operated.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is vague on the extent of coverage, likely focusing on major arteries rather than the entire road network.

promise_text_en: Roads leading to famous pilgrimage sites and tourist destinations will be upgraded to a standard that welcomes international tourists.
promise_text_ta: புகழ்பெற்ற வழிபாட்டுத் தலங்களுக்கும், சுற்றுலாத் தலங்களுக்கும் செல்லும் சாலைகள் மேம்படுத்தப்பட்டு, உலகச் சுற்றுலாப் பயணிகளை வரவேற்கும் தரத்தில் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 86
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to boost the tourism economy by improving the primary infrastructure—road access—to key destinations.

promise_components.component: Upgrade roads leading to famous pilgrimage sites and tourist destinations.
promise_components.analysis: The total length of roads to be upgraded and the cost per kilometer for upgrading to 'international tourist' standard are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from the available data. This would be a capital-intensive project.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural investment in economic infrastructure. By improving physical access, it addresses a key bottleneck for the tourism sector, creating a lasting asset that can generate economic returns.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are targeted at the tourism industry and travelers, not the general population directly.

promise_text_en: To reduce traffic congestion in urban and suburban areas, roads will be widened and infrastructure facilities improved. Ring roads and bypass roads will be constructed in necessary urban areas.
promise_text_ta: நகர்ப்புறம் மற்றும் புறநகர்ப் பகுதிகளில் போக்குவரத்து நெரிசலைக் குறைக்கும் வகையில், சாலைகள் அகலப்படுத்தப்பட்டு உட்கட்டமைப்பு வசதிகள் மேம்படுத்தப்படும். தேவைப்படும் நகர்ப்புறப் பகுதிகளில் சுற்றுச்சாலைகளும், பை-பாஸ் சாலைகளும் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 86
impact_mechanism: Reduces travel time and vehicle operating costs by increasing road capacity and diverting through-traffic from congested urban centers.

promise_components.component: Widen roads in urban and suburban areas and improve infrastructure facilities.
promise_components.analysis: This is a general statement of intent for capital expenditure. The promise does not specify the length of roads (in km) to be widened or the number of cities, so a cost cannot be calculated from the given data.

promise_components.component: Construct ring roads and bypass roads in necessary urban areas.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital-intensive promise, but the number of urban areas and the scope of the projects are not defined. Cost is incalculable without these details.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The promise is for capital expenditure, but lacks specific targets like kilometers of roads or number of projects. Costs for such projects are highly variable and depend on land acquisition and construction tenders.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a capital investment that creates a lasting physical asset. It directly addresses the physical constraints causing traffic congestion, providing a long-term solution that enables economic activity.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to road users in the specific urban and suburban areas selected for these projects, excluding other regions.

promise_text_en: By improving road design and construction, fatalities from road accidents will be reduced, and safe road travel will be ensured.
promise_text_ta: சாலைகளின் வடிவமைப்பு மற்றும் கட்டுமானத்தை மேம்படுத்தி, சாலை விபத்துகளால் ஏற்படும் உயிரிழப்புகளைக் குறைப்பதுடன், பாதுகாப்பான சாலைப்பயணம் உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 86
impact_mechanism: Prevents accidents and reduces their severity by systematically engineering safer road environments for all users.

promise_components.component: Improve road design and construction to reduce fatalities from road accidents.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy goal rather than a discrete project. It implies updating engineering standards and focusing on safety audits for new and existing roads. The financial cost is embedded within overall road project budgets and cannot be isolated from the available data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is integrated into all future road construction and maintenance budgets and depends on the specific safety interventions chosen, which are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: By embedding safety into the design and construction process, this creates a permanent improvement in the road network's safety characteristics. It addresses a root cause of accidents (unsafe infrastructure) rather than just focusing on driver behavior.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits will accrue over the long term as new roads are built and old ones are upgraded; the immediate impact on the entire existing network is limited.

promise_text_en: Wayside amenities such as fuel stations, EV charging stations, restaurants, restrooms, parking facilities, and ATMs will be established on both sides of major highways in Tamil Nadu for the use of travelers and heavy vehicle drivers.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில் உள்ள முக்கிய நெடுஞ்சாலைகளில் வழியோர வசதிகள் (Wayside Amenities) ஏற்படுத்தித் தரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 86
impact_mechanism: Improves safety and comfort for long-distance travelers and commercial vehicle drivers by providing planned, safe, and clean rest stops.

promise_components.component: Establish wayside amenities (fuel, EV charging, restaurants, restrooms, parking, ATMs) on both sides of major highways.
promise_components.analysis: This is an infrastructure development promise. The number of amenity centers is not specified. Such projects are often executed in a Public-Private Partnership (PPP) model, where the direct cost to the government may be limited to land facilitation. A cost cannot be calculated from the given data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of facilities and the financing model (fully state-funded vs. Public-Private Partnership) are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Creates permanent physical infrastructure that enhances the utility and safety of the highway network for all users. This is a long-term improvement that addresses the lack of safe rest areas, a contributing factor to driver fatigue.
coverage_gap_note: Primarily benefits travelers and drivers on major highways, excluding those using smaller state, district, or rural roads.

promise_text_en: Three new Multi-Modal Logistics Parks will be created. By integrating road, rail, sea, and air transport networks, Tamil Nadu will be established as the premier logistics hub in South Asia by 2030.
promise_text_ta: மூன்று புதிய Multi-Modal Logistics Parks உருவாக்கப்படும். தமிழ்நாட்டைத் தெற்காசியாவிலேயே முதன்மையான சரக்கு மேலாண்மை (Logistics) மையமாக 2030-க்குள் நிலைநிறுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 86
impact_mechanism: Reduces logistics costs and transit times for goods by creating large-scale, integrated hubs for road, rail, sea, and air transport.

promise_components.component: Create three new Multi-Modal Logistics Parks.
promise_components.analysis: This is a large-scale infrastructure promise. The cost of such parks is typically in the thousands of crores each, but is not provided in the reference data. These are usually developed with significant central government support and private investment.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost per park is not provided, and the funding split between the state, central government, and private investors is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a fundamental piece of economic infrastructure that lowers transaction costs for the entire economy. It addresses the root cause of inefficient goods movement and has a long-lasting structural impact on the state's competitiveness.
coverage_gap_note: The direct benefits are concentrated in the industrial, manufacturing, and logistics sectors, not the general public or service-based economy.

promise_text_en: Industrial Corridors will be established to connect major industrial areas, thereby creating more employment opportunities in backward regions.
promise_text_ta: பின்தங்கிய பகுதிகளிலும் அதிக வேலைவாய்ப்புகளை உருவாக்கும் வகையில், முக்கியத் தொழில் பகுதிகளை இணைக்கும் வகையில், தொழில்துறை வழித்தடங்கள் (Industrial Corridors) ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 86
impact_mechanism: Stimulates industrial growth and employment in less-developed regions by connecting them to major economic centers via high-quality infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Establish Industrial Corridors to connect major industrial areas and create employment in backward regions.
promise_components.analysis: This is a high-level economic development strategy, not a single project. The promise is too general to cost, as it does not specify the location, length, or scope of the corridors. These are typically long-term, high-value projects involving central government partnership.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The promise lacks specifics on the corridors' length, location, or scope.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a strategic, long-term investment in economic geography. It aims to create self-sustaining industrial clusters by providing the necessary infrastructure, addressing the root cause of regional imbalance and lack of non-farm jobs.
coverage_gap_note: Regions not located along the proposed corridors will not see direct benefits and could face relative economic decline.

promise_text_en: Over the next 5 years, 10,000 new buses with modern facilities will be brought into public use.
promise_text_ta: அடுத்த 5 ஆண்டுகளில் மேலும் புதிதாக நவீன வசதிகளைக் கொண்ட 10,000 புதிய பேருந்துகளைப் பொதுமக்களின் பயன்பாட்டிற்குக் கொண்டு வருவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 87
impact_mechanism: Improves public transport availability, reliability, and quality by replacing old vehicles and expanding the state's bus fleet.

promise_components.component: Procure 10,000 new buses with modern facilities over the next 5 years.
promise_components.analysis: This involves procuring 2,000 buses per year. The current fleet is ~21,000 buses, so this represents a significant renewal and expansion of nearly 48%. The cost of a bus is not provided in the reference data, so the total capital outlay cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost per bus is not specified in the reference data. This is a capital expenditure to be spread over 5 years.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a capital investment in a core public service. A modern and adequate bus fleet is a structural requirement for affordable mass mobility, which can reduce congestion and pollution in the long term.
coverage_gap_note: People in areas with no bus service will still be unserved unless the new buses are specifically allocated for route expansion.

promise_text_en: New Integrated Bus Terminals will be constructed in corporations, municipalities, and town panchayats that experience high bus traffic congestion.
promise_text_ta: பேருந்துப் போக்குவரத்தால் அதிக நெரிசல் ஏற்படக் கூடிய மாநகராட்சிகள், நகராட்சிகள் மற்றும் பேரூராட்சிகளில் புதிய ஒருங்கிணைந்த பேருந்து நிலையங்கள்/முனையங்கள் (Integrated Bus Terminus) அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 87
impact_mechanism: Decongests city centers and improves passenger experience by creating modern, integrated transport hubs for inter-city and local buses.

promise_components.component: Construct new Integrated Bus Terminals in corporations, municipalities, and town panchayats with high bus traffic congestion.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure promise. The number of terminals is not specified, only the criteria for their location. The cost per terminal is highly variable and not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number and scale of the terminals are not defined, making cost estimation impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: This involves creating permanent infrastructure assets that solve the physical problem of inadequate and poorly located bus stands. It provides a long-term solution to urban traffic management and improves the public transport system.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are confined to residents and travelers in the specific urban areas where the new terminals are built.

promise_text_en: Quality bus shelters with seating facilities for passengers will be constructed at all major bus stops in urban and rural areas.
promise_text_ta: நகர்ப்புற மற்றும் ஊரகப் பகுதிகளில் உள்ள முக்கிய பேருந்து நிறுத்துமிடங்கள் அனைத்திலும் பயணிகள் அமரும் வசதிகளுடன் கூடிய தரமான பேருந்து நிழற்குடைகள் (Bus Shelters) அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 87
impact_mechanism: Improves the comfort, safety, and dignity of public transport users by providing shelter from weather while they wait for buses.

promise_components.component: Construct quality bus shelters with seating facilities at all major bus stops in urban and rural areas.
promise_components.analysis: This is a widespread, small-scale capital expenditure promise. The total number of 'major bus stops' across the state is not available in the reference data, nor is the cost per shelter.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of required shelters and the cost per unit are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: While the shelter is a physical asset, its primary function is to make the symptom of waiting for a bus more tolerable. It improves comfort but does not address the root causes of poor bus service, such as low frequency or unreliability.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes passengers waiting at stops not designated as 'major'.

promise_text_en: Mini-bus services will be expanded to benefit all people living in remote areas with narrow access roads.
promise_text_ta: குறுகிய அணுகு சாலைகள் கொண்ட கடைக்கோடிப் பகுதிகளில் வசிக்கும் அனைத்து மக்களும் பயனடையும் வகையில் சிற்றுந்து வசதிகள் விரிவுபடுத்தப்படும்.

promise_text_en: Mini-bus services will be introduced even on narrow roads in areas along the Metro and electric train corridors in Chennai and its suburbs, enabling residents to use the train services.
promise_text_ta: சென்னை மற்றும் புறநகர் பகுதிகளில் மெட்ரோ மற்றும் மின்சார ரயில் வழித்தடங்களை ஒட்டியுள்ள பகுதிகளில் வசிக்கும் பொதுமக்களும் ரயில் சேவைகளைப் பயன்படுத்திடும் வகையில் குறுகலான சாலைகளிலும் சிற்றுந்துப் போக்குவரத்து அறிமுகப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 87

promise_components.component: Introduce mini-bus services on narrow roads in areas along the Metro and electric train corridors in Chennai and its suburbs.
promise_components.analysis: This is a feeder service expansion aimed at solving the last-mile problem for urban rail users. The number of mini-buses or routes required is not specified, so a cost cannot be calculated.

promise_text_en: We will continuously urge the Union Government to reactivate the new broad-gauge line projects: Tindivanam - Tiruvannamalai, Morappur - Dharmapuri, and Madurai - Thoothukudi (via Aruppukottai).
promise_text_ta: திண்டிவனம் - திருவண்ணாமலை, மொரப்பூர் - தருமபுரி, மற்றும் மதுரை - தூத்துக்குடி (அருப்புக்கோட்டை வழியாக) புதிய அகலப்பாதை திட்டங்களை மீண்டும் செயல்பாட்டுக்கு கொண்டுவர வேண்டும் என ஒன்றிய அரசைத் தொடர்ந்து வலியுறுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 88
impact_mechanism: Improves rail connectivity in specific corridors by advocating for the revival of stalled broad-gauge line projects.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union Government to reactivate the Tindivanam - Tiruvannamalai new broad-gauge line project.
promise_components.analysis: This is an advocacy promise. Project cost is borne by the Union Government (Indian Railways). No direct fiscal cost to the state. Project cost data unavailable.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union Government to reactivate the Morappur - Dharmapuri new broad-gauge line project.
promise_components.analysis: This is an advocacy promise. Project cost is borne by the Union Government (Indian Railways). No direct fiscal cost to the state. Project cost data unavailable.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union Government to reactivate the Madurai - Thoothukudi (via Aruppukottai) new broad-gauge line project.
promise_components.analysis: This is an advocacy promise. Project cost is borne by the Union Government (Indian Railways). No direct fiscal cost to the state. Project cost data unavailable.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is to urge the Union Government. Project costs are borne by the central government. Direct fiscal impact on the state budget is negligible.
sustainability_reasoning: New railway lines are long-term capital assets that address structural gaps in transportation infrastructure, fostering economic activity and connectivity for decades. The promise itself is advocacy, but the intended outcome is structural.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated along the three proposed rail corridors, not the entire state.

promise_text_en: We will urge the Union Government to complete the doubling of the Villupuram-Thanjavur line and the expansion of the Tambaram-Chengalpattu line to a 4th track.
promise_text_ta: விழுப்புரம் - தஞ்சாவூர் (Doubling) விரிவாக்கம் மற்றும் தாம்பரம் - செங்கல்பட்டு (4-ஆவது பாதை) விரிவாக்கம் ஆகிய ரயில்வே திட்டங்களை நிறைவேற்ற ஒன்றிய அரசை வலியுறுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 88
impact_mechanism: Increases rail network capacity on key routes by advocating for track doubling and expansion.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union Government to complete the doubling of the Villupuram-Thanjavur line.
promise_components.analysis: This is an advocacy promise. Project cost is borne by the Union Government (Indian Railways). No direct fiscal cost to the state. Project cost data unavailable.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union Government to expand the Tambaram-Chengalpattu line to a 4th track.
promise_components.analysis: This is an advocacy promise. Project cost is borne by the Union Government (Indian Railways). No direct fiscal cost to the state. Project cost data unavailable.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is to urge the Union Government. Project costs are borne by the central government. Direct fiscal impact on the state budget is negligible.
sustainability_reasoning: Expanding existing rail capacity is a structural improvement that addresses bottlenecks, reduces travel time, and allows for more frequent services. It enhances the efficiency of existing capital assets.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to commuters and freight users on these two specific, high-traffic rail lines.

promise_text_en: We will urge the Union Government to implement new railway projects including: Tirupattur-Krishnagiri, doubling of Chengalpattu-Arakkonam (via Kanchipuram), Ennore/Minjur-Singaperumalkoil, Coimbatore-Karur (via Palladam), Coimbatore-Salem, Thoothukudi-Tirunelveli (direct), Ariyalur-Thanjavur, Kumbakonam-Virudhachalam, and Erode-Palani.
promise_text_ta: திருப்பத்தூர் - கிருஷ்ணகிரி, செங்கல்பட்டு - அரக்கோணம் (காஞ்சிபுரம் வழியாக), எண்ணூர்/மீஞ்சூர் - சிங்கப்பெருமாள்கோவில், கோயமுத்தூர் - கரூர் (பல்லடம் வழியாக), கோயமுத்தூர் - சேலம், தூத்துக்குடி - திருநெல்வேலி (நேரடியாக), அரியலூர் - தஞ்சாவூர், கும்பகோணம் - விருத்தாச்சலம், மற்றும் ஈரோடு - பழனி ஆகிய புதிய இரயில்வே திட்டங்களை நிறைவேற்ற ஒன்றிய அரசை வலியுறுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 88
impact_mechanism: Expands the state's railway network by advocating for a comprehensive list of new lines and track doubling projects.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union Government to implement nine new railway line and doubling projects across the state.
promise_components.analysis: This is an advocacy promise covering a large number of projects (Tirupattur-Krishnagiri, Chengalpattu-Arakkonam doubling, etc.). All costs are borne by the Union Government (Indian Railways). No direct fiscal cost to the state. Project cost data unavailable.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is to urge the Union Government. The costs for these numerous, large-scale projects are borne by the central government. Direct fiscal impact on the state budget is negligible.
sustainability_reasoning: These projects represent a major structural upgrade to the state's core transportation infrastructure, creating new economic corridors and enhancing capacity. The sheer number of projects makes full implementation a long-term goal.
coverage_gap_note: While the list of projects is extensive and covers many regions, it is not exhaustive of all potential rail needs in the state.

promise_text_en: If the MRTS rail service is handed over to the Tamil Nadu government, the state government will provide a service equivalent to the Metro rail.

source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 88
impact_mechanism: Improves urban mobility in Chennai by integrating the MRTS line with the Metro network under state control.

promise_components.component: If the MRTS rail service is handed over to the Tamil Nadu government, the state will provide a service equivalent to the Metro rail.
promise_components.analysis: This is a conditional promise. If the handover occurs, the state assumes the financial responsibility for upgrading and operating the line. The cost of this upgrade is not specified and cannot be calculated from reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is conditional on the handover from Indian Railways. The upgrade cost to Metro standards would be a significant, uncosted capital expenditure for the state government.

coverage_gap_note: This benefit is exclusively for Chennai commuters along the MRTS corridor.

promise_text_en: We will urge the Union Government to grant permission to implement the Metro Rail project in the metropolitan cities of Coimbatore and Madurai.
promise_text_ta: கோவை மற்றும் மதுரை ஆகிய பெருநகரங்களில் மெட்ரோ ரயில் திட்டம் செயல்படுத்த அனுமதிக்குமாறு ஒன்றிய அரசை வலியுறுத்துவோம்.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union Government to grant permission to implement the Metro Rail project in Coimbatore.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is to urge for permission. Implementation would require massive, uncosted funding commitments from both the state and Union governments. The state's share is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Metro rail is a classic structural solution to urban traffic congestion and pollution. It provides a long-term, high-capacity alternative to road transport, fundamentally altering a city's mobility landscape.

promise_text_en: We will continuously urge the Union Government to immediately grant permission for setting up a new airport in the Hosur region, which is crucial for industrial development.
promise_text_ta: ஓசூர் பகுதியில் புதிய விமான நிலையம் அமைப்பதற்கு உடனடியாக அனுமதி அளிக்க ஒன்றிய அரசைத் தொடர்ந்து வலியுறுத்துவோம்.

promise_components.component: Continuously urge the Union Government to grant permission for setting up a new airport in the Hosur region.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is to urge the Union Government. The project cost is borne by the central government or a public-private partnership. Direct fiscal impact on the state budget is negligible.

coverage_gap_note: This project serves the specific industrial and commercial needs of the Hosur region.

promise_text_en: We will continuously urge the Union Government to immediately start the expansion work for the Coimbatore airport, for which the state government has already completed all necessary land acquisition.
promise_text_ta: கோவை விமான நிலைய விரிவாக்கப் பணிகளை உடனடியாகத் தொடங்க தொடர்ந்து வலியுறுத்துவோம்.

promise_components.component: Continuously urge the Union Government to immediately start the expansion work for the Coimbatore airport.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is to urge the Union Government. As the state has already acquired the land, there is no new direct cost to the state. The construction cost is borne by the central government.

impact_mechanism: Supports regional trade and industry by enabling air freight through a new cargo terminal.

promise_components.component: Take action through the Union Government to establish a Cargo Terminal at Thoothukudi airport.
promise_components.analysis: This is an advocacy promise. The cost and implementation of an airport cargo terminal are the responsibility of the Union Government (Airports Authority of India). No direct fiscal cost to the state.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is to act through the Union Government. The project cost is borne by the central government. Direct fiscal impact on the state budget is negligible.
sustainability_reasoning: A cargo terminal is a structural asset that addresses a key logistics need. It provides a permanent facility to improve the export and import capabilities of local industries, tackling a root cause of trade friction.
coverage_gap_note: This project specifically serves the freight and logistics needs of the Thoothukudi region's industries.

promise_text_en: To promote port-led economic growth, 3 new minor ports will be established.

promise_components.component: Upgrade Cuddalore port to world-class standards.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure project. The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from the reference data.

promise_text_en: Under the Kalaignar Kanavu Illam scheme, 5 lakh new houses will be built in the next 5 years. In total, 10 lakh new houses will be built across Tamil Nadu in the next 5 years under various schemes.
promise_text_ta: கலைஞர் கனவு இல்லம் திட்டத்தின்கீழ் அடுத்த 5 ஆண்டுகளில் 5 இலட்சம் புதிய வீடுகள் கட்டித்தரப்படும். பல்வேறு திட்டங்களின்கீழ் அடுத்த 5 ஆண்டுகளில் தமிழ்நாட்டில் மொத்தம் 10 லட்சம் புதிய வீடுகள் கட்டித் தரப்படும்.
