source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 90
impact_mechanism: Provides permanent, secure housing for families in need, improving living standards and creating a stable asset.

promise_components.component: Build 10 lakh new houses across Tamil Nadu in the next 5 years under various schemes.
promise_components.analysis: This averages 2,00,000 houses per year. The target beneficiaries are likely among the ~1.2 crore BPL households. The cost per house is not specified, so a total cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Of the total, 5 lakh houses will be built under the Kalaignar Kanavu Illam scheme.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The unit cost per house is not provided. Housing schemes often involve central government funding, which is not detailed here.
sustainability_reasoning: A house is a foundational, long-term asset that provides security and stability for a family. This directly addresses the root problem of homelessness or inadequate shelter for the poor.
coverage_gap_note: The plan for 10 lakh houses would cover a fraction of the ~1.2 crore BPL households in the state.

promise_text_en: The Kalaignar Kanavu Illam scheme will be extended to town panchayat areas as needed.
promise_text_ta: கலைஞர் கனவு இல்லம் திட்டம் தேவைக்கேற்ப பேரூராட்சிப் பகுதிகளுக்கும் விரிவுபடுத்தப்படும்.
scheme_name: கலைஞர் கனவு இல்லம் திட்டம் (Kalaignar Kanavu Illam Scheme)
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 90
impact_mechanism: Expands the geographic eligibility of a state housing scheme to include needy families in semi-urban areas.

promise_components.component: The Kalaignar Kanavu Illam housing scheme will be extended to town panchayat areas as needed.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy decision to expand the scope of a housing program. The number of additional beneficiaries or houses is not specified, so no cost can be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This is an extension of an uncosted promise (Promise 1), and the incremental number of houses is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: By extending an existing structural program (providing housing) to a new demographic/geographic group, this promise also addresses a root cause, albeit for a wider audience.
coverage_gap_note: The phrase 'as needed' suggests the extension may not be universal across all town panchayats, but based on specific assessments.

promise_text_en: A review will be conducted to identify and eliminate outdated government rules and certification requirements.
promise_text_ta: அரசு விதிமுறைகள், சான்றுகள் ஆகியவற்றில் எவை தற்காலத்தில் தேவையற்றவை என்று ஆய்வு செய்து, அவற்றை நீக்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 90
impact_mechanism: Improves ease of doing business and reduces bureaucratic friction for citizens by modernizing the regulatory framework.

promise_components.component: Conduct a review to identify outdated government rules and certification requirements.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative reform process. The cost is the staff time of government officials, which is part of their existing salaries.

promise_components.component: Eliminate the identified outdated rules and requirements.
promise_components.analysis: This is the implementation phase of the administrative reform. It has no direct new fiscal cost.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is an administrative reform initiative whose costs are absorbed within existing government operational budgets.
sustainability_reasoning: Simplifying or eliminating obsolete rules permanently reduces bureaucratic friction and compliance costs. This is a structural change to the operating environment for citizens and businesses.

promise_text_en: A single-window system will be created for citizens to report grievances regarding government services and track the status of their petitions to get them resolved.
promise_text_ta: அரசு வழங்க வேண்டிய சேவைகளில் மக்கள் சந்திக்கும் குறைபாடுகளை, கோரிக்கை மனுவின் நிலை ஆகியவற்றை ஒரே சாளரத்தின் (Single Window) வழியே எடுத்துக் கூறித் தீர்வுபெறும் நடைமுறை உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 90
impact_mechanism: Improves government accountability and service delivery by creating a centralized, trackable system for citizen complaints.

promise_components.component: Create a single-window system for citizens to report grievances regarding government services.
promise_components.analysis: This involves developing an IT platform. The cost for development and maintenance is not specified.

promise_components.component: Enable tracking of the status of petitions to get them resolved.
promise_components.analysis: This is a feature of the proposed IT system, allowing for user-side transparency.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost to develop and maintain a state-wide IT grievance portal is not specified, but such projects are typically manageable within state IT budgets.
sustainability_reasoning: While it addresses the symptom (the grievance) rather than the cause of service failure, a well-implemented system becomes a permanent piece of governance infrastructure that enhances accountability.
coverage_gap_note: Effectively excludes citizens without the digital literacy or access needed to use the online portal, unless physical access points are also established.

promise_text_en: A 'Super App' will be developed to enable the public to easily access necessary government services, fulfilling the dream of 'all services at your fingertips'.
promise_text_ta: பொதுமக்களுக்கு அரசிடமிருந்து தேவைப்படும் சேவைகளை எளிமையாகப் பெறும் வகையில் ஒரு பெரும் செயலி (Super App) உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 90
impact_mechanism: Simplifies citizen access to government services by consolidating them into a single, unified mobile application.

promise_components.component: Develop a 'Super App' to enable public access to necessary government services.
promise_components.analysis: This is a digital infrastructure project. The cost of development, integration with multiple departments, and maintenance is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost for developing a complex, secure 'Super App' integrated with numerous government departments is not provided.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative creates a new, permanent digital infrastructure for service delivery. However, it only changes the access channel, not the underlying quality or complexity of the services themselves.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes the digitally disconnected population, who may have high dependency on government services.

promise_text_en: The procedures for 1000 government services, including certificates and No Objection Certificates (NOCs), will be reformed to simplify access for the public and business enterprises.
promise_text_ta: பொதுமக்கள் மற்றும் தொழில் நிறுவனங்களுக்கு அரசுத்துறைகளிலிருந்து தேவைப்படும் பல்வேறு சேவைகளை எளிமையாக்கிடும் வகையில் 1000 அரசு சேவைகளின் நடைமுறை மாற்றியமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 90
impact_mechanism: Reduces time, cost, and complexity for citizens and businesses when accessing government services by simplifying procedures.

promise_components.component: Reform the procedures for 1000 government services, including certificates and NOCs.
promise_components.analysis: This is a large-scale administrative process re-engineering project. The cost is primarily the administrative effort of government staff, not a new fiscal outlay.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a process reform initiative that does not require a dedicated budget allocation beyond existing administrative salaries.
sustainability_reasoning: Directly targets the root cause of bureaucratic inefficiency by re-engineering the processes themselves. Successful reform creates a permanent improvement in the citizen-government interface.

promise_text_en: The government's online services will be improved to allow for obtaining certificates online (Online Certification).
promise_text_ta: சான்றிதழ்களை இணையதளத்திலேயே (Online Certification) பெற்றுக் கொள்ளும் வகையில் அரசின் இணைய சேவை மேம்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 90
impact_mechanism: Allows citizens to obtain government certificates without physically visiting offices, saving time and money.

promise_components.component: Improve the government's online services to allow for obtaining certificates online.
promise_components.analysis: This is an e-governance initiative to enhance existing online portals. The cost for IT system upgrades is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of improving existing government IT infrastructure is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: An improved online certification system is a permanent upgrade to digital public infrastructure. It addresses the access method, which is a structural barrier, but not the rules of the service itself.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes citizens without reliable internet access or the digital skills to navigate online portals.

promise_text_en: A facility will be created to provide all necessary information about the implementation of government schemes to the public through electronic information boards in the respective offices.
promise_text_ta: மக்களுக்கான அரசுத் திட்டங்களின் செயல்பாடுகளைப் பற்றி அனைவரும் அறிந்து கொள்ளத் தேவையான தகவல்கள் அனைத்தும், தொடர்புடைய அலுவலகங்களில் மின்னணு தகவல் பலகைகள் வாயிலாக அறியும் வசதி உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 91
impact_mechanism: Increases transparency by providing public information on scheme implementation at the point of service delivery.

promise_components.component: Install electronic information boards in government offices to display information on scheme implementation.
promise_components.analysis: This is a transparency initiative requiring hardware procurement and a data backend. The number of offices and cost per unit are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of offices and the cost per electronic board and its supporting data system are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the symptom of information asymmetry. Such hardware-based solutions often fall into disuse if the backend data pipeline is not robustly maintained, making it more of a signal of transparency than a structural fix.
coverage_gap_note: Only benefits citizens who physically visit the specific government offices where these boards are installed and functional.

promise_text_en: The practice of repeatedly applying for certificates from government departments will be eliminated. Obtained certificates will be stored and protected in a consolidated system like DigiLocker, and a facility will be created for the owner or authorized government departments to access them.
promise_text_ta: அரசுத் துறைகளில் ஒவ்வொரு முறையும் சான்றிதழ் கேட்டுப்பெறும் முறை தவிர்க்கப்படும். பெறப்படும் சான்றிதழ்கள் ஒரு தொகுப்பாக DigiLocker போன்ற அமைப்பின் உதவியுடன் சேமிக்கப்பட்டு பாதுகாக்கப்படும். உரியவரோ, அல்லது அவரது அனுமதியுடன் தேவைப்படும் அரசுத்துறையோ அதனைப் பெறும் வசதி உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 91
impact_mechanism: Eliminates redundant paperwork and simplifies verification by creating a single, authoritative digital repository for citizen certificates.

promise_components.component: Create a consolidated system like DigiLocker to store and protect obtained certificates.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a state-level digital locker or deeply integrating with the national DigiLocker system. The cost is for a major IT infrastructure project.

promise_components.component: Eliminate the practice of repeatedly applying for certificates from government departments.
promise_components.analysis: This is the primary benefit of the system, enabled by inter-departmental access to the digital locker.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost to develop or integrate a comprehensive digital locker system across all government departments is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of bureaucratic friction: the repetitive, manual submission and verification of documents. A successful digital locker is a permanent piece of public infrastructure that fundamentally changes government processes.
coverage_gap_note: Full realization of benefits depends on universal digital access and literacy; a non-digital alternative would be needed for inclusion.

promise_text_en: A 100% e-office procedure will be implemented in all government offices, from the Village Administrative Office to the Chief Secretariat.
promise_text_ta: கிராம நிர்வாக அலுவலகம் முதல் தலைமைச் செயலகம் வரை உள்ள அனைத்து அரசு அலுவலகங்களிலும் 100 விழுக்காடு மின்னணு அலுவலக நடைமுறை செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 91
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve government efficiency and reduce corruption by digitizing all official processes from local to state levels.

promise_components.component: Implement 100% e-office procedure in all government offices.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural and capital-intensive promise. The cost of hardware, software, network infrastructure, and training for all government employees across thousands of offices is not calculable from the reference data. The number of government offices is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost cannot be estimated as it depends on the number of offices, employees, and the specific technology stack chosen, none of which are available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative fundamentally changes the process of governance, creating a permanent digital infrastructure. If successful, it addresses the root causes of administrative delays, lack of transparency, and opportunities for petty corruption.
coverage_gap_note: Citizens without digital literacy or access may be disadvantaged by a fully digital system.

promise_text_en: The system where only government departments provide quality certification will be changed, and a system of third-party auditing and certification by experts will be gradually introduced in government departments.
promise_text_ta: அரசுத்துறை மட்டுமே தரச் சான்றளிக்கும் முறை மாற்றியமைக்கப்பட்டு, நிபுணத்துவம் வாய்ந்த நபர்களைக் கொண்ட மூன்றாம் தரப்பு ஆய்வு செய்து சான்றளிக்கும் முறை அரசுத்துறைகளில் படிப்படியாக அறிமுகம் செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 91
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve the quality and accountability of government services by introducing independent verification.

promise_components.component: Introduce a system of third-party auditing and certification by experts in government departments.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change. The cost would depend on the number of departments audited, the scope and frequency of audits, and the fees for expert auditors. This data is not available in the reference set.

fiscal_cost_note: The annual cost is not calculable, as it depends on the scale of the auditing program and professional fees, which are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Introducing independent oversight addresses a structural weakness in government self-assessment. It creates a permanent mechanism for external accountability and quality control, which can lead to lasting improvements in service delivery.

promise_text_en: A system of accepting self-certification from the public, stating their compliance with regulations, will be introduced. The government will conduct field inspections only when necessary.
promise_text_ta: பொதுமக்களே தாங்கள் விதிமுறைகளை ஏற்று இணங்கி நடப்பதாக வழங்கிடும் சுயசான்றுகளை (Self Certification) ஏற்கும் முறை அறிமுகப்படுத்தப்படும். தேவைப்படும் போது மட்டுமே அரசு கள ஆய்வு மேற்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 91
impact_mechanism: Aims to simplify compliance for citizens and businesses by shifting from a pre-approval model to a trust-based, post-verification model.

promise_components.component: Introduce a system of accepting self-certification from the public for regulatory compliance.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural reform. While it may reduce upfront administrative workload for the government, it requires a robust backend system for random audits and enforcement. The net fiscal impact is not calculable from the provided data.

fiscal_cost_note: The net cost or savings from this procedural change cannot be calculated from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This represents a fundamental shift in the regulatory philosophy, from seeking permission to declaring compliance. It addresses the root cause of bureaucratic red tape and 'inspector raj', potentially improving the ease of doing business and citizen interactions.

promise_text_en: Government departments providing essential services to the public, such as the Registration Department and the Transport Department, will be completely modernized with advanced technology.
promise_text_ta: பொதுமக்களுக்கு இன்றியமையாத சேவைகளை வழங்கும் அரசுத் துறைகளான பத்திரப்பதிவுத் துறை, போக்குவரத்துத் துறை போன்ற துறைகள் அனைத்தும் நவீனத் தொழில்நுட்பத்துடன் முற்றிலும் மாற்றியமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 91
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve citizen experience in high-contact departments through technology upgrades.

promise_components.component: Completely modernize essential service departments like Registration and Transport with advanced technology.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure promise. The cost is dependent on the specific technologies chosen, the number of offices to be upgraded, and the extent of process re-engineering. This data is not available.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost for modernization is not calculable as no specific budget or technology details are provided.
sustainability_reasoning: Upgrading core service delivery infrastructure provides a lasting improvement in efficiency, transparency, and user experience. It addresses the root cause of poor service stemming from outdated systems and processes.
coverage_gap_note: Citizens without digital access or literacy might face challenges with fully modernized, tech-heavy systems.

promise_text_en: New family cards (ration cards) will be issued annually based on proper applications.
promise_text_ta: ஆண்டுதோறும், புதிய குடும்ப அட்டைகள் முறையான விண்ணப்பங்கள் பெறப்பட்டு வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 92
impact_mechanism: Ensures newly formed or excluded households can access PDS benefits through a regular, predictable application process.

promise_components.component: Issue new family cards (ration cards) annually based on proper applications.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural promise to regularize an existing government function. The number of new applications per year is not in the reference data, so the marginal administrative cost cannot be calculated. The subsidy cost would increase with each new card issued.

fiscal_cost_note: The administrative cost is not calculable. The subsidy cost depends on the number of new cards issued annually, which is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Issuing new ration cards is an ongoing government activity. Promising to do it on a fixed annual schedule is a minor administrative tweak, not a new benefit or structural reform. It signals responsiveness but doesn't change the PDS system itself.

promise_text_en: 10,000 fair price shops will be renovated with necessary facilities for the public, and new fair price shops will be established in areas where they are needed.
promise_text_ta: 10,000 நியாய விலைக் கடைகள் பொதுமக்களுக்குத் தேவையான வசதிகளுடன் புதுப்பிக்கப்படும்; தேவைப்படும் இடங்களில் புதிய நியாயவிலைக் கடைகள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 92
impact_mechanism: Improves the public's experience and efficiency of the PDS system by upgrading the physical infrastructure of ration shops.

promise_components.component: Renovate 10,000 fair price shops with necessary facilities.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to renovate 10,000 shops is not calculable as the cost per renovation is not provided in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Establish new fair price shops in needed areas.
promise_components.analysis: The number of new shops and the cost to build each one are not specified, so the cost is not calculable.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost cannot be calculated as the cost per renovation and the number and cost of new shops are not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Improving the physical condition of ration shops enhances the dignity and experience of accessing subsidies, which is a genuine benefit. However, it treats a symptom (poor facilities) of the PDS system, not the root cause of poverty that necessitates the system.
coverage_gap_note: This promise does not address the quality, quantity, or timeliness of the goods supplied at the shops.

promise_text_en: All financial resources required to implement the new schemes promised in this election manifesto will be ensured through excellent financial management.
promise_text_ta: இந்தத் தேர்தல் அறிக்கையில் உறுதியளிக்கப்பட்டுள்ள புதிய திட்டங்களைச் செயல்படுத்திடத் தேவையான நிதி ஆதாரங்கள் அனைத்தும் சிறப்பான நிதி மேலாண்மையால் உறுதிசெய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 93
impact_mechanism: This is a statement of intent, claiming fiscal prudence will create room for new spending.

promise_components.component: Ensure financial resources for new schemes through excellent financial management.
promise_components.analysis: This is a non-quantifiable political assertion. It does not contain a specific, measurable action. 'Excellent financial management' is subjective and cannot be analyzed with numbers.

fiscal_cost_note: Not applicable. This is a statement about how funds will be managed, not a spending promise itself.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a generic and unverifiable statement of good intent, common in political manifestos. It lacks any concrete policy mechanism and serves primarily as political signalling to assure voters of fiscal competence.

promise_text_en: We will fight to reclaim Tamil Nadu's financial rights and secure all funds that are legally due to us.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டின் நிதி உரிமைகளை மீட்டெடுத்து நமக்கு சட்டப்படி கிடைக்க வேண்டிய அனைத்து நிதிகளையும் போராடிப் பெறுவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 93
impact_mechanism: Aims to increase state revenue by lobbying or legally challenging the central government for a larger share of funds.

promise_components.component: Fight to reclaim Tamil Nadu's financial rights and secure all legally due funds.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political promise concerning fiscal federalism. The outcome is not within the state's sole control and depends on the Union government's response. The amount of 'due funds' is a contentious figure and cannot be quantified from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a potential revenue promise, not a cost. The amount is speculative and cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: While addressing a real issue of fiscal federalism, the promise is framed as a 'fight,' which is a political posture. Since the outcome is dependent on the central government, it is more of a political statement than a deliverable plan.

promise_text_en: Measures will be undertaken to save government funds by reducing unnecessary expenditure, implementing welfare schemes for eligible beneficiaries, and completing infrastructure projects within the stipulated time.
promise_text_ta: தேவையற்ற செலவினங்களைக் குறைப்பதன் மூலமும், தகுதியான பயனாளிகளைக் கண்டறிந்து நலத்திட்டங்களைச் செயல்படுத்தியும் உட்கட்டமைப்புப் பணிகளை உரிய காலத்திற்குள் முடித்தும், அரசு நிதியைச் சேமிப்பதற்கான நடவடிக்கைகள் மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 93
impact_mechanism: Aims to increase fiscal space for welfare by improving efficiency in government expenditure and project implementation.

promise_components.component: Reduce unnecessary expenditure, improve targeting of welfare schemes, and complete infrastructure projects on time.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise of good governance. The potential savings from reducing 'unnecessary' expenditure, preventing leakages through better targeting, and avoiding cost overruns are not calculable from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a promise of savings, not cost. The potential amount saved is not calculable.
sustainability_reasoning: These measures address the root causes of fiscal inefficiency and waste within government operations. If implemented, they would create a more sustainable financial framework, though achieving them is notoriously difficult.
coverage_gap_note: Stricter targeting of beneficiaries may lead to the exclusion of some currently receiving benefits.

promise_text_en: We will control the fiscal deficit within the legally permissible limits and ensure the necessary allocation of funds for the government's various initiatives.
promise_text_ta: நிதிப் பற்றாக்குறையைச் சட்டப்படி அனுமதிக்கப்பட்ட அளவிற்கு உள்ளாகக் கட்டுப்படுத்தி, அரசின் பல்வேறு முயற்சிகளுக்குத் தேவையான நிதி ஒதுக்கீடுகளை உறுதிசெய்வோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 93

promise_components.component: Control the fiscal deficit within legally permissible limits.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise to adhere to the existing Fiscal Responsibility and Budget Management (FRBM) Act. It is a statement of intent to follow standard, legally-mandated fiscal practice, not a new initiative.

fiscal_cost_note: Not applicable. This is a statement about fiscal discipline, not a cost item.
sustainability_reasoning: Promising to obey the law is the minimum expectation for a government, not a new benefit for the public. This serves as political signalling to financial markets and observers about fiscal prudence.

promise_text_en: A special development plan for the northern districts will be implemented, including establishing industrial parks for electronics and auto components, non-leather footwear manufacturing, food processing infrastructure, youth skill training, IT parks, and comprehensive drinking water projects.
promise_text_ta: மின்னணு மற்றும் வாகன உதிரிபாகங்கள் தயாரிப்பு, தொழிற்பூங்காக்கள் அமைப்பு, வேலைவாய்ப்புகளைப் பெருக்கக் கூடிய தோல் அல்லாத காலணி உற்பத்தி, காய்கறி, கனிவகைகள் மற்றும் உணவு பதப்படுத்துதல் தொழில்களுக்கான உட்கட்டமைப்பு, இளைஞர்களுக்கான திறன் பயிற்சி, I.T. பூங்காக்கள் மற்றும் முழுமையான குடிநீர் திட்டங்கள் நடைமுறைப்படுத்துதல் உள்ளிட்ட வடமாவட்டங்களுக்கான சிறப்பு வளர்ச்சித் திட்டம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 94

promise_text_en: A special development plan for the Delta districts will be implemented, including building expressways to promote industrial investment, a Dry Port in Trichy, implementation of the Clean Cauvery Scheme-2030, integrated tourism management plans, intensive development of water resources for agriculture, and schemes for maritime economic development.
promise_text_ta: தொழில் முதலீடுகளை ஊக்குவிக்க விரைவுச் சாலைகள் அமைத்தல், திருச்சியில் ஏற்றுமதிக்கு தேவையான உலர் துறைமுகக் கட்டமைப்பு (Dry Port), தூய்மை காவிரித் திட்டம்-2030 செயலாக்கம், ஒருங்கிணைந்த சுற்றுலா மேலாண்மைத் திட்டங்கள், வேளாண்மைக்கான நீராதார உட்கட்டமைப்பு தீவிர மேம்பாடு, கடல்சார் பொருளாதார வளர்ச்சிக்கான திட்டங்கள் உள்ளிட்ட டெல்டா மாவட்டங்களுக்கான சிறப்பு வளர்ச்சித் திட்டம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 94
impact_mechanism: This plan seeks to boost the Delta districts' economy through enhanced connectivity, logistics, environmental restoration, and diversification into tourism and maritime sectors.

promise_text_en: A development plan for the southern districts will be implemented at a cost of ₹20,000 crore, including special schemes for agricultural exports, laying pipelines, improving roads and public transport, establishing common facility centers for MSMEs, special tourism development projects, youth skill development centers, and a coastal district special development plan.
promise_text_ta: வேளாண் பொருட்கள் ஏற்றுமதிக்கான சிறப்புத் திட்டங்கள், குழாய்கள் அமைத்தல், சாலைகள் மற்றும் பொதுப் போக்குவரத்து மேம்பாடு, சிறு குறு நடுத்தரத் தொழில் நிறுவனங்களுக்கான பொதுவசதி மையங்கள் அமைத்தல், சிறப்பு சுற்றுலா வளர்ச்சித் திட்டங்கள், இளைஞர்களுக்கான திறன் வளர்ச்சி மையங்கள், கடலோர மாவட்ட சிறப்பு வளர்ச்சித் திட்டங்கள் உள்ளிட்ட தென்மாவட்டங்களுக்கான வளர்ச்சித் திட்டம் ஆகியவை 20 ஆயிரம் கோடி ரூபாயில் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 94
impact_mechanism: This promise injects a specified capital sum into southern districts to upgrade infrastructure and build capacity in key sectors like agriculture, MSMEs, and tourism.

promise_components.component: Implement a development plan for southern districts at a cost of ₹20,000 crore.
promise_components.analysis: The promise provides a total outlay of ₹20,000 crore. The timeline is not specified. Assuming implementation over a 5-year term, the annual expenditure would be ₹20,000 crore / 5 = ₹4,000 crore per year.

fiscal_cost_note: Total cost is ₹20,000 crore. If spread over 5 years, the annual cost is ₹4,000 crore. This represents approximately 3.08% of the state's discretionary budget (₹4,000 crore / ₹1,30,000 crore). This level of spending appears feasible within the state's budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a capital investment plan aimed at creating productive assets and enabling infrastructure (roads, MSME centers, skill centers). It addresses the root causes of underdevelopment by building the region's capacity for economic growth, rather than offering temporary relief.
coverage_gap_note: The plan is specific to southern districts and does not cover other regions of the state.

promise_text_en: By 2030, developmental disparities between districts will be reduced, and Tamil Nadu will stand tall as a state where all districts have achieved balanced growth.
promise_text_ta: 2030-ஆம் ஆண்டுக்குள் மாவட்டங்களுக்கு இடையேயான வளர்ச்சி வேறுபாடுகள் குறைக்கப்பட்டு, அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களும் சீரான வளர்ச்சி பெற்ற மாநிலமாகத் தமிழ்நாடு தலைநிமிர்ந்து நிற்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 94
impact_mechanism: This sets a high-level policy goal of achieving balanced regional development across the entire state by a target date.

promise_components.component: Reduce developmental disparities between districts by 2030.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of intent or a vision, not a specific, measurable program. It lacks concrete actions or a budget. The other regional development plans are the instruments to achieve this goal.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a policy goal, not a specific scheme with a budget. The cost is embodied in the various regional development plans. Therefore, it is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: While the goal of balanced growth is structural, the promise itself is a declaration of intent without a new, specific, or actionable mechanism. It serves as political signalling, with the actual substance contained in other, more concrete development plan promises.

promise_text_en: A special mega-project with an outlay of ₹2000 crore will be implemented in the western districts to advance industrial and agricultural development, including urban development, attracting high-tech investments, modern skill development centers, textile export infrastructure, modernizing the textile industry, creating special clusters for MSMEs, and promoting agricultural production and processing.
promise_text_ta: மேற்கு மாவட்டங்களில் தொழில் மற்றும் வேளாண் வளர்ச்சி அடுத்தகட்டத்திற்குக் கொண்டு செல்லப்படும். அந்த வகையில் நகரப்பகுதிகள் மேம்பாடு, நவீன முறையில் உயர் தொழில்நுட்ப நிறுவன முதலீடுகளை ஈர்த்தல், நவீன திறன் மேம்பாட்டு பயிற்சி மையங்கள், பல்வேறு வகை ஜவுளி ஏற்றுமதிக்கான உட்கட்டமைப்புகள், புதிய ஜவுளித் தொழில்நுட்பத்துடன் ஜவுளித் தொழிலை நவீனமயமாக்குதல், மாவட்டங்கள் சார்ந்த சிறு, குறு, நடுத்தரத் தொழில்கள் வளர்ச்சிக்கான சிறப்புக் குழுமங்கள் அமைத்தல் மற்றும் கடனுதவி ஏற்பாடுகள், வேளாண்மை உற்பத்தி மற்றும் பதப்படுத்துதல் தொழில்களை ஊக்குவித்தல் ஆகியவற்றை உள்ளடக்கி ஒரு சிறப்புப் பெருந்திட்டம் ரூ.2000 கோடி மதிப்பீட்டில் நடைமுறைப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 95
impact_mechanism: This promise allocates a specific fund to boost the industrial and agricultural base of the western districts, focusing on modernization and high-tech growth.
